\n

RE: Let this oﬃcially writ consumer complaint serve as my document to you that I here now CONTEST the REPORTING\n of claims included in the letter and as such necessitate the reporter\n and any or all accepting data repositories equally to demonstrate inarguable confirmation that each claim was made fairly, truly, correctly, timely, verifiably, validly, and else wise in full assurances of no deviation from the standards detailed and preconditioned to be adhered to with accordance to the necessarily perfect full and utilized Metro 2 Data-filled Field Formatted reporting standards. I DO NOT DISPUTE\n any aspect of claim itself, nor do I acknowledge it, however I do question its adequacy of reporting\n because By federal law no claim can be forwarded not substantiate-able of being to a degree of MAXIMUM potential ACCURACY and a MAXIMUM viable COMPLETION\n . In Accordance with CRRG 3-4, I believe the INTEGRITY of claims recited as being questionable at best.\n \n \n

\n

MY PERSONAL 20-digit TRACKING NUMBER IS: \n \n {{tracking}}\n \n \n

\n

Destination of my Consumer Complaint is \n \n

\n

{{ba1}}\n \n \n

\n

To Whom it concerns CAPABLE of ensuring compliant reporting,

\n

In consonance with FEDERAL and my state’s reporting regulations each any and ALL aspects of each any and all claims reporting including those of each any and all data\n points(i.e. data fields) HAS AT A VERY MINIMUM THE HOPE AND EXPECTATION THAT IT’S data IS credibly proven to be impartial, appropriate, ACCURATE, TIMELY, ADEQUATELY unabbreviated, KNOWN TO BE MINE, VERIFIABLE, PHYSICALLY VALIDATED\n AND IN ADHERENCE TO CREDIT REPORTING INDUSTRY’S STANDARD(S) obviously to a degree of no lesser than a MAXIMUM POSSIBILITY! Surely, if the reporting procedures and or processes are potentially derelict or else wise poorly perfunctory\n then there can be no authentic certainty of a claim’s nor claimer’s absolute satisfying of the minimal mandates to assume privilege of lawful reporting, therefore\n the report-ability of any such claim’s reporter is and should be contested and challenge made for the Sayer to prove indisputable and compliantly reported COMPLIANT each any and all of the claim(s) and each any and all aspect(s) of said claim(s)!\n

\n

Remove NOW the below listed claim(s) failing to meet minimal criterion for the alleging data reporting furnisher to have assumed PRIVILEGE to report.\n I contest the reportability of any and each claim from which the claimer fails to accept my query you for absolute certifiably compliant demonstrated document evidence of facts to prove undeniable all facts of the allegation(s)\n even to the necessarily reporting principals mandate to be certifiably compliant, particularly in relationship to the required used and perfectly Complete Metro 2 Compliance standards as dictated by the CDIA in its near annual\n CRRG where 3-4 states “ANY DEVIATION FROM THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA” . I contend each contesting and defy made by me in this notification is in regard to a reporting that was with at least one or\n more deviations, thereby calling into doubt its possibility of being made known to the mandatory degree no lesser than that of a MAXIMUM likely ACCURACY and a MAXIMUM credible COMPLETENESS! The following is suspiciously believed,\n REMOVE NOW, or PROVE certifiable complaint reporting was physically verified and validated as certain each any and all dubious claims below for which I now contest the data furnisher’s privilege to report and that of any potential accepting data repository’s privilege to gather and make available for prospective reviewers of my consumer credit profile history and or creditors:

\n

\n

PLEASE NOW REMOVE FROM REPORTING THE FOLLOWING:\n \n \n

\n

\n

^In your most recent response to me you claimed inability to understand or \"determine the nature of your (my) request.. \" and or elsewise failed to demonstrate descriptively and correctly that the claim(s) communicated were adequately done so in certifiable compliance with each any and all mandates of reporting laws and the requisite reporting\n standards for your industry. Given the seemingly overwhelming evidence I then and now demonstrate as to be apparent omissions of required announced data, misreporting’s of data and or deviations from the imperiously adhered\n to reporting standards signaling less than assured confidence in your claim(s) as questionable, I find it significantly diﬃcult to believe your reporting ethics and eﬀorts are consistently as sincere and veridical as legally\n required to be. Allow me to break it down simpler for you to digest. Mind you, I am under assumption your firm complies with my state (nor ANY STATE’s) and the federal mandates to report unresistently, truly, accurately, and\n completely. Am I wrong to have assumed you'd adhere to your own industry's published standards for that compliant reporting? If so, there should be no divergence in your reportings in regards to fairness of reporting, truthfulness\n of reporting, accuracy of reporting, timeliness of reporting, knowledge of ownership of responsibility of claim reporting, the physical verification of claim reputed, the expressed claim's undeniable validity, and or the claim's\n surety to be confirm-able as being documented truly attestably compliant in all reporting processes even with the inclusion and adherence to the irremissibly practiced metro 2 format. If NOT, I contend that your reporting practice\n is unfair, inconsistent, erroneous, untrue, inaccurate, incomplete, untimely, not verifiable not validate-able much less being substantially inferior to mandated rumored certifiable compliant metro 2 format standards.

\n

Ensure your reporting is indeed veracious and just else remove now and enduringly. FURTHER, NOTE THE SUSPECTED REPORTING SHORTCOMINGS BELOW AS YOU INVESTIGATE LEGITIMACY OF THE INJURIOUS ACCUSATIONS AGAINST ME, so you can and DO come into alignment with federally mandated scrupulous reporting codes in your final decision(s). Please consider this image for all matters above and below:

\n

\n

\n

The currently reported Account with account number displayed as this information is \n {{accounts-number-tu}} on Trans Union in this reported claim on my Trans Union report, shown as this information is \n {{accounts-number-ex}} on Experian in this reported claim on my Experian report, and alleged as this information is \n {{accounts-number-eq}} on Equifax in this reported claim on my Equifax report. Any inconsistency, incompleteness, inaccuracy, or omission of the reported item serves as a variation from the mandatorily utilized reporting industry’s own Metro 2 Data-filled Field Formatted reporting compliance standards, of which there can be NO DEVIATION without JEOPARDIZING THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA (see CDIA CRRG 3-4) and as so is lawfully questionable until evident confirmation of all aspect(s) of claim(s) are factually true, correct, complete, timely, physically verifiable, and elsewise undeniably valid particularly if not certifiably compliant in full according to the above-mentioned Metro 2 formatted industry requirements. *****************************************************************************************************

\n

I am contending that the needed criteria for a data reporting furnisher to assume the PRIVILEGE to report is not necessarily\n satisfied. As such, I am CONTESTING that reporter's and that of any accepting data repository's PRIVILEGE to report until and unless they successfully meet my demand to demonstrate in document confirmation the disclosed claim(s) made were done so in absolute adherence to the necessarily\n certified compliant reporting process(es) even so in full outright and perfect accordance to the obligatorily applied Metro 2 Data-filled Field Formatted reporting standards,\n of which there can be NO DEVIATION FROM without JEOPARDIZING the INTEGRITY of the data claimed, which unfairly and beyond a shadow of a doubt FAILS to satisfy the federal reporting regulations to do so ONLY to a degree no lesser\n than a descriptively correct MAXIMUM conceivable ACCURACY and COMPLETENESS. Mind you, each the suspicious data reporting furnisher AND the accepting data repositories\n BOTH could and even SHOULD have been and remained testimonially COMPLIANT throughout the reporting processes in total conjunction with any and all federal and state laws and or any applicable standards, be them mentioned or\n not. No AUTHORITY has RIGHT to report, but rather only a VERY CONDITIONAL PRIVILEGE to report undoubtedly honorable, truthful, correct, total, timely, verifiable, validated, and or elsewise COMPLIANT details. To continue reporting\n in disregard to any potential questionable claim deemable a deviation from the standards I content is WILLFUL NON-COMPLIANCE of the alleging data reporting furnisher and potentially as well any accepting data repository. IGNORANCE\n of requisites to ethically and legally report is NOT a lawful escape from liabilities for inadequacies in reporting practices, so I today, even here and now, DEMAND that you act immediately to modify your reporting as necessary\n such that you claim(s) are in fact documentable as factually civil, factual, correct, intact, timely, verified, validated, and accepted to b e compliant. Alternatively, I demand you to REMOVE FROM REPORTING any such claim where\n the alleging data reporting furnisher and or the accepting data repository(ies) have failed to ensure absoluteness and certification of the unprejudiced compliant accurate accurate integral timely verified valid claim(s) versus\n me. I do NOT dispute the owed parties RIGHT to COLLECT a certified obediently recorded debt but DO CONTEST its ability to retain the very PRIVILEGE to report if not done so in perfect alignment of any and all applicable statutes,\n rules, regulations, and or standards elsewise. IF YOU HAVE A RIGHT TO REPORT NON-acquiescently, please demonstrate evidence testifying to that right, else REMOVE FROM REPORTING NOW any claim unworthy!

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n
\n

Thank you for your time and help in this matter.

\n
\n

SINCERLY, \n {{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n

\n

P.s. My NEXT oﬃcial notice will be a notification of my LOITS! So that you do not need for a legal dictionary, a LOITS declaration is a written communication Of Intent To Suit! You BEST be PROVEN COMPLIANT to ALL necessities and standards of FCRA COMPLIANCE and also of the implemented CRSA enacted CDIA implemented Metro 2 Compliance mandates as well. I will demand verification that each employee at your firm which MIGHT have seen or conducted any business on the file you allege mine has been properly trained by a certified and qualified instructor of the Metro 2 data field formatted reporting standards. I am NOT shy in detailing my DOUBTS you can withstand the requisites to survive a court hearing versus me as I leverage your DEFICIENCIES for a slew of victories being awarded a minimum of $1000 In keeping with VIOLATION Pursuant to TIME, and there certainly appears to be a bucket full. So, let’s do this! Anything OTHER than your missive describing to me that you have already begun or completed the annulment of these unproven claims versus me and have eradicated ENTIRELY any and all aspects of records of what you allege being mine (yeah!) will IMMEDIATE compel me to assume your hostile to my demands of proper reporting and I will assume that your ignorance of appropriate and adequate duties are willful and intentionally injurious. Being such, civil suits are obvious however criminal charges are not out the question, particularly if your chicanery-led subterfuge brings forth or allows.\n

\n

It is MY RIGHT to DENY YOU AUTHORITY TO REPORT DEFICIENT of factual verifiability of validation of only CORRECT TIMELY CLAIMS which as well are CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT IN their reporting, even to the defective perfect and certified METRO 2 format reporting standard(s) of compliance!\n \n

\n

MY PERSONAL 20-digit TRACKING NUMBER IS: \n \n {{tracking}}\n \n \n

\n

Destination of my Consumer Complaint is \n \n

\n

TO : {{ba1}}\n \n \n

\n

Re: Unproven, Invalid, Not docilely or else wise Unauthorized Credit claims of delinquency and or derogatoriness's despite significant deficiencies of claim's truth,\n accuracy, completeness, timeliness, ownership, verifiability, validity and certifiable compliant reporting else wiseeach deficiency requires immediate and permanent removal of claim's reporting or else is a infraction of reporting\n regulations and standards of compliant reporting(s).

\n

To Whom it concerns

\n

Upon further investigation, I have retained new copies of my credit reports, and noticed that you did not furnish the credit bureaus with the required disclosure, within the period required by law. You are required by federal law to place a “notice of dispute” on my account within 30 days of my lawfully leveraged consumer compliant. I have retained a record of your receipt and proof as well of the exact date of receipt, as well as a time-stamped copy of my credit reports, showing that you have violated the Credit Reporting Act, Section 623(a)(3) and/or the Debt Collection procedures and or processes Act Section 807(8), the mandatory metro 2 formatted reporting standard(s) of compliance and others even by your deficiencies and also by not placing the disclosure within the required 30-day period.

\n

Be aware that I am making a final goodwill attempt to have you clear up this matter. The listed item is undeniably not certified dutifully , provable as and or is plain and simply entirely inaccurate and incomplete and represents a very serious error in your reporting. Either way the claim is in dire disregard of my consumer rights and your required perfect provable compliant reporting(s) of only correct timely verified valid claim(s) even in regard to the infelicitous perfect correct certifiable Metro 2 format reporting standard(s) of lawful reporting! YOU MUST ERADICATE the claim(s) of any delinquency and or derogatoriness that is questionable such as in this exact circumstance. Delete now as follows:

\n

\n

PLEASE NOW REMOVE FROM REPORTING THE FOLLOWING:\n \n \n

\n


{{#accounts}}\n \n

\n

Acccount Name #{{index}} : {{account name}}\n \n \n

\n

Account #{{index}} ALLEGED : {{account number}}\n \n \n

\n

{{#paraghraphs}}{{randomnmspin}}{{/paraghraphs}}\n

\n

{{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}{{/accounts}}\n \n \n

\n

*****************************************************************************************************

\n

Let it be known in clarity that at all times I am maintaining a careful record of my communications with you for the purpose of filing a compliant with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and the Attorney General's oﬃce, and\n potentially even a civil suit should you continue in your non-compliance of federal laws under the Credit Reporting Act, or any other standard of requisite reporting be it mentioned or not. I further remind you that you may\n be liable for your willful non-compliance, as In keeping with FCRA 623(a)(3) - Responsibilities of furnishers of to consumer reporting agencies [15 U.S.C. 1681s-2] (3) Duty to provide of dispute. If the completeness or accuracy\n of any furnished by any person to any consumer reporting agency is disputed to such person by a consumer, the person may not furnish the to any consumer reporting agency without that such is disputed by the consumer. (B) Time\n of (I) The required under subparagraph (A) shall be provided to the customer prior to, or no later than 30 days after, furnishing the negative to a consumer reporting agency described in section 603(p).

\n

As you have violated federal law, by not properly providing the credit bureaus with proper within the required timeframe, and I have evidence of such, via certified mail receipts, you must now remove the item. Any other action\n (or inaction) on your behalf may result in a small claims action against your company. So you are aware, I would be seeking a minimum of $1,000 in damages In Accordance with violation for at least one or more of the following\n and other statues and or standards not necessarily mentioned to this point:

\n

• Defamation

\n

• Negligent Enablement of Identity Fraud

\n

• Violation of the Debt Collection practices Act (including but not limited to Section 807-8)

\n

• Violation of the Credit Reporting Act (including but not limited to Section 623-b)

\n

You will be required to appear in a court venue local to me, in order to formally defend yourself. My contact is as follows:

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n
\n

\n
\n

My First and Last Name is and ONLY is : {{firstname}} {{lastname}}
\n \n My Address Street Number, Street Name, City, and State is and only is

\n

{{address}}\n \n \n

\n

P.S. Please be aware that dependent upon your response, I may be detailing any potential issues with your company via an online public press release, including documentation of any potential small claims action. I am also including\n a copy of my compliant to the organizations below:

\n

CC: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau

\n

CC:Attorney General's Office

\n

CC:Better Business Bureau

\n

****To begin, I would like to ensure you have and ONLY RETAIN current, TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, and MANDATED REPORTED information per FCRA regulations, any and all others that might be reported now or else wise I DEMAND, as is my lawful RIGHT(s) to do so, that you annul permanently and immediately any and all deficient of these afore-noted conditions, mentioned or not, especially if related directly or indirectly to any potentially injurious information be it true or unknown! Again, I DO NOT AUTHORIZE you to mis-report any mis-information now or ever, please review and ENSURE your adequate and full accordance to the laws upon which govern your practice of reporting consumer credit profiles.\n \n \n

","\n

I am writing you with this formal grievance and a call for prompt action(s) on your part. You are improperly reporting inaccurately to the major credit bureaus and damaging my credit. You are behaving dishonorably in considerations of the FCRA aka the Fair Credit Reporting Act. The dishonorable behavior(s) feasibly be subject to fines and damages. I am providing you but this one last fortuity for adequate modification of this account. Previously, I had sent you a letter advising you that you were incorrectly reporting. Additionally in that request I in fact did assert your necessary requisite(s) to update my file. Due to your now obvious continued misreporting(s) albeit any all or each unfair and or surely unethically non-compliantly reported in that it resembles that my forwarded note was shockingly neglected .\n \n \n

My challenge includes presentation of evidence that all claims made are in perfect complete adherence in full accordance with the mandatorily utilized Metro 2 Data-filled field formatted reporting standards\n .\n \n

\n

To whom it concerns,\n

\n

My state and applicable federal reporting regulations require that no claim of negativity is reported unsubstantiated, unfairly, untruthfully, unproven, spuriously nor elsewise potentially as questionably. With this, I demand removal from reporting or necessarily with substantial modification of the alleged claim(s) , as currently listed, to a status undoubtable in its fair and compliant reporting. Do so in particularly for at least the following listed alleged claim(s) apparently with potential deficiencies of reporting.\n

","\n

Please ensure no other such information exists on my report.

","\n

Rather, this lawful consumer complaint is my contesting versus the data reporting furnisher(s) very conditional privilege to report if unable, unwilling, untimely, and or else wise non-compliant in satisfying\n at least the established minimal requisites for ethical and lawful reporting of consumer . My complaint is that there is not suﬃcient evidence proving the reported claims of derogatoriness or delinquencies versus me are firmly rooted to be compliant in its reporting, a mandated to\n report. "],"name":"re","random":true},{"info":["\n

Sir/Ma’am,\n

\n

I am in receipt of a current credit report of which questionably suggests that I now or in past have owed you something, yet there is nothing that substantiates your reporting or claim thereof so I demand that you dismiss all claims and eradicate any injurious reporting(s) versus me , particularly if currently reported item(s) are potentially deficient of the mandatory document evidence of physically verified factual proof of the truth of claim, truth of reporting, accuracy of claim, correctness of reporting, completeness of claim, fullness of reporting, timeliness of claim, timeliness of reporting, ownership or responsibility elsewise of claim, ownership or responsibility else wise of the reporting, and or the complete and perfect certified Metro 2 format reporting standard(s). I demand that you display to me your lawful authority to forcibly conduct business with any contesting consumer much less me! Particularly removed is your right to act in dereliction as you hold me under threat of financial and or creditworthiness injury(ies). I here now DEMAND that if you are unwilling or unable to do as requested, as demanded, and as otherwise mandatory to retain or regain compliance of reporting no later than 20 days from your receipt of this lawful notice of consumer complaint that you immediately and forevermore thereafter cease any and all derogatory and or injurious actions versus me , to include but not limited to the foul actions to report and or collect unverified, untrue, invalid, or else wise not certifiably compliant claim(s) and or debt(s). Let it be in clarity that I am well aware of the FACT that absent legal authority or a written agreement between us that you can not force me to conduct any business interaction(s) with you and I will NOT! Certainly if you elect still to injure me , even to the slightest, it undoubtedly would be a show of merciless harassment or even willful extortion , a CRIMINAL OFFENSE in my state of residence! Any such behavior will directly or indirectly lead me to act accordingly, so please rectify your chicanery-laden subterfuge as alleged on my current consumer credit profile history by eradication and or removal from reporting the delinquently reported item(s) listed below.

In consideration of the item(s) here below displayed, as reported, I am forwarding this official notice of my rightful consumer complaint and item challenge contesting report-ability of claim, as displayed as reported. I do so rightfully since federal reporting laws as well as applicable state laws and standards of adequate reporting require that any injurious claim reported be so with a MAXIMUM POSSIBLE ACCURACY and a MAXIMUM POSSIBLE COMPLETENESS, either and or each being potentially deficient in this reporting as displayed. DEFICIENT REPORTING can NOT be assumed adequately accurate nor assumed to be adequately complete in its reporting, as is its minimal requirements to be ethically and lawfully reported, be it verifiably true, correct, timely and or else wise validated in claim’s reality and in regard to its collect-ability status. Collect-ability does NOT assure REPORT-ABILITY. Please consider closely the imaged items below, POTENTIALLY each being meant as the same item YET significantly dis-similar enough to suspect questionable reporting exists such as inconsistencies, potential errors, missing but required reported data, misreported data that actually is potentially not available data thereby indicative of potential deceptive reporting (unlawful too), and or other ailments of the displayed reporting of this(ese) item(s).\n \n

","\n

This is my THIRD and FINAL WRITTEN REQUEST that you immediately remove all unverified accounts from my credit report. The accounts listed below that remain on my credit report are in violation of 15 USC Section 1681. Failure to\n obey the law will result in judicial intervention, subjecting your company to damages under the FCRA, including but not limited to actual damages, consequential damages, attorney’s fees and interest. UNVERIFIED ACCOUNTS STILL\n REMAIN ON MY REPORT, meaning that factually NOT properly TRUE CORRECT COMPLETE VALIDATED and CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT REPORTING claims are listed upon my credit profile in violation of REQUISITES of regulatory reporting laws and\n standards of reporting, particularly in relationship to considerations of the FCRA and FDCPA laws and the mandatory perfect and complete METRO 2 formatted reporting standard(s) for compliance!!! This is a violation of Federal\n Law. Case law is clear, you may NOT “PARROT” information received from an account holder via phone call, computer email or log, E-Oscar, etc., to verify any account you are reporting on. Nor is it my responsibility to verify\n the account! In clarity, YOUR COMPANY MUST personally have PHYSICAL possession of the documents, IN YOUR OWN FILE, to verify the truth, the correctness, the completeness, the validity of, and the certified compliance of reporting\n of the accused derogatory item(s) of reporting, be it true or not. Your failure to provide me same as requested, in violation of the law, is clear evidence that the account is truly unverified, therefore NOT COMPLIANTLY REPORTED\n in vile infraction of law and my consumer right(s). Your failure, therefore, to remove the unverified accounts is a willful violation of the Fair Credit Reporting Act Section 616. You are required under Section 611(5) (A) of\n the Fair Credit Reporting Act to promptly DELETE all information that is not properly verified. If you do not have the documentation in your own PHYSICAL possession, the item accused is factually UNVERIFIED, and in such as\n well not factually proven true, correct, valid and or certified compliantly reported. Make no mistake, I i n t e n d o n p u r s u i n g a l l a v a i l a b l e r e m e d i e s u n d e r F e d e r a l L a w t o e n f o r c\n e m y r i g h t s . Failing to remove any and all not compliant and or any and all unverified accounts is damaging my creditworthiness and reputation on a continued basis, such that I will deem purposeful injurious and in need\n to seek juris rectification. Since the accounts have NOT been shown by you to be properly verified, I demand the accounts listed herein be removed immediately. The FOLLOWING reporting derogatory allegations of information are\n either UNTRUE, INCORRECT, INCOMPLETE, UNTIMELY, NOT MINE, NOT MY RESPONSIBILITY, or otherwise NOT PROVEN COMPLIANT to regulatory federal reporting laws and or standards and MUST be eradicated immediately, do so TODAY, even\n right NOW! The obvious infractions are as follows: Please delete this erroneous information immediately or else wise adequately PHYSICALLY VERFIFY PROPERLY the absolute factual documented TRUTH, ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, VALIDITY,\n METRO 2 FORMAT REPORTING and any and all aspects of mandatorily CERTIFIED COMPLIANCE OF REPORTING otherwise be it mentioned or be it now. Should you be deficient or unwilling to timely demonstrate proof as required I DEMAND\n that you REMOVE THE FOLLOWING items of reporting:

In accordance with the Fair Credit Reporting Act Section 611 (15 U.S.C. § 1681I) \n and the understood STANDARDS of acceptable lawful COMPLIANT REPORTING STANDARDS such as the METRO 2 Five Points of Compliance and other potentially applicable standards and or regulatory requisites of reporting I am rendering\n this officially writ consumer CHECK OF COMPLIANT REPORTING and CHALENGE versus any and all DEFICIENCIES of reporting and or inability to DOCUMENT factual reporting verifiability of validness, truth, accuracy, completeness,\n timeliness, ownership(s) of responsibility, and or certifiability of the mandated compliant PROCESSES of reporting and mandatorily perfect complete certifiable METRO 2 FORMAT compliance \n of reporting standard(s). Beyond this, I am practicing my right to challenge questionable information reporting that I have found on my personal credit report, be it due to potentially erroneous and or misleading claims/data,\n or be it due to UNVERIFIABLE or INVALIDATE and or not CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT REPORTED claims REGARDLESS of circumstances else wise. REPORTING REQUISITES and standards of appropriate reporting are MANDATES NOT OPTIONS\n of reporting, even correct true claims NOT reported precisely according to requisites of certifiable compliant reporting PROCESS and or FORMAT (ie METRO 2 DATA FIELD FORMATTED reporting's) are DEFICIENT of report-ability\n if not ABSOLUTELY documented and provable. OBVIOUSLY at a bare minimum any alleged reporting data furnisher would be necessarily required to at least be able to verify my complete file information EXACTLY AS I HAVE INDICATED ABOVE and NO OTHER WAY including full First and Last names, my current correct resident address Street Number and Street Name as well as City and State, my factually correct date of birth and the factually correct last four of my reported SSN#. ANY DEFICIENCIES require IMMEDIATE and COMPLETE ERADICATION of reporting PERMANATELY!\n

Obviously, it’s your obligation to ensure any and each claim(s) alleged derogatory versus me are fully satisfactory of any and all reporting requirements and all established requisite reporting standards, be it federally/ state/ or elsewise applicable, essential, and or compelled. You have NOT demonstrated factually your successful satisfying of at least the minimal criterion to even assume a continued privilege to report versus me. I contest your reporting privilege and CHALLENGE you to demonstrate proof of you adequacy and successful achieving of PRIVILEGE to report fair information versus me.\n

\n

Might I remind you that per my state's and that of the federal reporting regulations each and any aspect of data or information elsewise allegedly reported must be done so to a confirmable degree of MAXIMUM possible accuracy AND completion\n . Per CDIA, the CRRG’ s listed requisites for fair, accurate, complete, and compliant reporting in full accordance with each the FCBA, the FCRA, the ECOA, and each and any applicable other state and or federal regulations for lawful reporting is the mandatorily utilized Metro 2 Data-filled field formatted reporting standards\n . Also, Per CDIA'S CRRG 3-4, \"ANY DEVIATION FROM THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA\n \"... Clearly failing to adequately and factually adhere perfectly and completely to the aforementioned mandated utilized Metro 2 Data-filled field formatted reporting standards makes impossible to assume data reporting\n furnisher or the accepting data repository have acted to ensure fair and compliant reporting practices and certainly makes questionable their satisfying of the federal mandates to only report alleged claims of delinquent\n or derogatory information to a provable degree of MAXIMUM POSSIBLE ACCURACY AND COMPLETION. Further, the continued inadequate reporting in which there may be one or more deviations from the mandatorily utilized reporting standards even beyond consumer’s written notice contesting the reportability of the potential deficient data is to be evidence of each or either of the data reporting furnisher's and or the accepting repository(ies)' noncompliance, be it willful or done so in ignorance. I here now Challenge you and or any other entity that may otherwise be related to any potential reporting deviation(s) from the above-mentioned required utilized and perfected Metro 2 Compliance standards for ethical fair and lawful reporting to demonstrate by physical verified and validated documentation that confirms your certifiably compliant reporting processes or else it is demanded you most immediately return to fair and compliant reporting in preciseness to any and each requisite of reporting practices, to include any and each requirement applicable to either and each of my state's regulatory reporting laws and as well any of the federal reporting regulatory reporting laws and as well in total undeniable adherence to the reporting industry's mandatorily utilized and perfected reporting standards. I do not Authorize you nor any entity to report versus me unfairly and or in deviation from the established fair reporting standards. Any deviation surely denounces the likelihood that any failing data reporting furnisher did indeed satisfy at least the minimal criterion to assume it has successfully achieved the conditional privilege to report. I contend that noncompliance of reporting practices is akin to unfair even unethically unlawful reporting practices, in contradiction of that assumed reporting privilege.\n

\n

I demand you REMOVE FROM REPORTING this claim below immediately and until able and willing to timely confirmate the certifiably compliant , true, accurate, timely, complete, verified, and elsewise validated reporting of claims related to my contesting of your report-ability and forwarded challenge to prove satisfactory achieving of the very conditional PRIVILEGE to report said claim(s) versus me ethically and legally.\n

\n

Per Credit Reporting Industry mandates, you MUST abide and adhere to any and all state and federal laws and standards including that of the Metro 2 data-filled field formatted reporting standards\n , of which there can be n o deviation from without jeopardizing the integrity of the data alleged (per CDIA's CRRG 3-4) \n by a data reporting furnisher or accepting repository. That in mind, Please consider this image for all matters above and below:\n \n

","\n

Per FEDERAL and my state’s reporting regulations each any and ALL aspects of each any and all claims reporting including those of each any and all data points(i.e. data fields) HAS AT A VERY MINIMUM THE HOPE AND EXPECTATION THAT IT’S INFORMATION IS FACTUALLY CONFIRMED to be FAIR, TRUE, ACCURATE, TIMELY, ADEQUATELY COMPLETE, KNOWN TO BE MINE, VERIFIABLE, PHYSICALLY VALIDATED AND IN ADHERENCE TO CREDIT REPORTING INDUSTRY’S STANDARD(S) undeniably to a degree of no lesser than a MAXIMUM POSSIBILITY! Surely, if the reporting practices are potentially derelict or else wise deficient then there can be no true certainty \n of a claim’s nor claimer’s absolute satisfying of the minimal requirements to assume privilege of lawful reporting, therefore the report-ability of any such claim’s reporter is and should be contested and challenge made for the Sayer to prove indisputable and CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT each any and all of the claim(s) and each any and all aspect(s) of said claim(s)!\n

\n

Remove NOW the below listed claim(s) failing to meet minimal criterion for the alleging data reporting furnisher to have assumed PRIVILEGE to report. I contest the reportability of any and each claim from which the claimer fails to accept my challenge to prove undeniable all facts of the allegation(s) even to the requisite reporting practices mandate to be certifiably compliant, particularly in relationship to the mandatorily utilized and perfectly complete Metro 2 Compliance standards as dictated by the CDIA in its near annual CRRG where 3-4 states “ANY DEVIATION FROM THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA”. I contend each contesting and challenge made by me in this notice is in regard to a reporting that was with at least one or more deviations, thereby calling into doubt its possibility of being reported to the mandatory degree no lesser than that of a MAXIMUM POSSIBLE ACCURACY and a MAXIMUM POSSIBLE COMPLETENESS! The following is suspiciously reported, REMOVE NOW, or PROVE certifiable complaint reporting was physically verified and validated as factual each any and all alleged claims below for which I now contest the data furnisher’s privilege to report and that of any potential accepting data repository’s privilege to gather and make available for prospective reviewers of my consumer credit profile history and or creditors:\n

","\n

I am writing you with this formal objection of claim(s) as reported when reported and a call for prompt action(s) on your part. You are improperly reporting improperly to the and Experian and damaging my credit. You are with infraction(s) of the FCRA aka the Fair Credit Reporting Act. The infraction(s) could be subject to fines and damages. I am providing you but this one last hope for rectifying of this account. Previously, I had sent you a letter advising you that you were incorrectly reporting. Additionally in that request I in fact did assert your necessary requisite(s) to modify appropriately my file. Due to your now obvious continued misreporting(s) albeit any all or each unfair and or surely unethically non-compliantly reported in that it seems that my forwarded letter was unexpectedly derided

I have recently been informed that there is negative information reported by the below data reporting furnishers concerning me or some individual potentially mistook as being me. I am referencing files you maintain under my social security number. The below denoted item(s) reported by the also detailed accusing data reporting furnisher(s) are contentious at best given fact there appears at least 1+ deviations from the established credit reporting industry’s expected abided by reporting standards for consumer credit portfolios, namely that of the mandatorily utilized Metro 2 Data-filled Field Formatted reporting standards of which the CDIA signaled “ANY DEVIATION FROM THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA” which sure seems akin to the federal regulatory reporting mandates (LAWS) which hint to requisite that any prospective reporters of information MUST HAVE in play procedures, processes and practices to ensure that any allegations made are done so to a degree no lesser than that of a MAXIMUM POSSIBLE ACCURACY\n and a MAXIMUM POSSIBLE COMPLETENESS. It is NOT A STRETCH to suggest that entities failing to meet BOTH the regulatory requisites AND have also failed to act with certifiable compliant reporting procedures, processes and or practices in conjunction with the above noted CDIA statement in concern to non-compliance of the standards established surely it is reasonable to wonder if a reporter has acted so egregious to have potentially eradicated their assumed-privilege to report data of derogatory nature versus a consumer. In similar question would be the curiosity if or not such a violating entity has acted in willful even unlawful disregard of consumer rights and their own regulatory responsibilities. Did the reporting party(ies) act in willful negligence? Or in reckless abandon if not in absolute ignorance despite certainty of fact that any each and all reporters know better or SHOULD HAVE KNOWN BETTER being that reporting standards were in fact established for the very purpose to better ensure a reporter’s greater likelihood of successfully abiding by the state and federal reporting requirements of which they are under absolute obligation to obey. \n With the above statements and considerations please act now to remove from reporting any derogatory claim forwarded by any below listed entity of which failed to report adequately by each the regulatory requisites as well\n as the established and mandatorily utilized credit reporting industry’s Metro 2 Compliance standards:\n \n

","\n

YOU, as does ANY entity involved with consumer credit reporting undoubtedly MUST make demonstrated testimonial certificate of facts to your affirmed confirmation of everyone even each any and or all of the still unproven to be compliant ,true, correct or complete. CERTIFICATE in COMPOSITION in CERTAINTY all aspects of allegations versus me or YOU MUST ERADICATE such derogatory and injurious claims.\n \n \n

\n

Please DELETE TODAY even right NOW or unequivocally avouch physically to every single one even each any or all of the excerpts, dated assignments, ledger balances, audited enumerations, documents of identification, each of the 426-character format fielded P6 statements ,pay status codes, alpha-/ numeric-/and or alphanumeric source codes. Further certificate affirmably every single one even each any and or all of the minimal five (5) portioned personal identifiers, and even the unabbreviated 386 pieces of confirmation to collect. Per Metro 2 format, FCRA, FDCPA, and or my state reporting laws you MUST CERTIFICATE the AFFIRMED CONFIRMATION of every aspect of FACTS to the irrefutable full TRUTH, CORRECTNESS, completeness, timeliness, ownership, responsibility, state reporting mandates, federal reporting laws applicable, and standards of compliance laws including adequate and exact correct complete metro 2 data field formatted reporting. Your hesitancy or unwillingness to do so promptly WILL result in my seeking of enacting my consumer and or civil rights and making inquiry to a civil court nearest me for a resolution, likely MONETARILY in nature, to your improper , unethical, and likely illegal misbehavior concerning this matter of discussion. PLEASE consider the following FACTS: \n \n \n

\n

FACT #1) \n \n \n \n

\n

“e-OSCAR is a web-based, Metro 2 compliant, automated system” \n \n \n

\n

FACT #2) \n \n \n \n

\n

Per the link \n \n \n

\n

https://www.federalreserve.gov/boarddocs/rptcongress/fcradispute/fcradispute200608.htm#toc4\n  \n \n \n

\n

“...If the furnisher is using e-OSCAR, the system forwards the information automatically to any other nationwide CRA to which the furnisher reported the disputed item” \n \n \n

\n

FACT #3) \n \n \n \n

\n

Per the link http://www.e-oscar.org/about-e-oscar.aspx \n , “ If an account is modified or deleted, carbon copies are sent to each CRA with whom the DF has a reporting relationship.” \n \n \n

\n

FACT #4) \n \n \n \n

\n

Per the link http://www.e-oscar.org/about-e-oscar.aspx \n \n \n

\n

“CRAs include Equifax, Experian, Innovis and TransUnion, their affiliates or Independent Credit Bureaus and Mortgage Reporting Companies. “ \n \n \n

\n

FACT #5) \n \n \n \n

\n

Per the link \n \n \n

\n

https://www.federalreserve.gov/boarddocs/rptcongress/fcradispute/fcradispute200608.htm#toc4\n  \n \n \n

\n

The FCRA requires DF to DELETE, MODIFY (correct/update) ,or PERMANENTLY block the reporting of disputed information that is found to be inaccurate or INCOMPLETE or cannot be verified… \n \n \n

\n

FACT #6) \n \n \n \n

\n

And more, per the link \n \n \n

\n

https://www.federalreserve.gov/boarddocs/rptcongress/fcradispute/fcradispute200608.htm#toc4\n  \n \n \n

\n

to have been provably placed and or assigned with each any and or all of the potentially involved debt collection agency(ies)? If alleged related to a check I may have written, present evidence of that check’s alleged amount and date written let alone its supposed lawfully photo-identified and verifiably validated owner of the instrument’s signature, if any exists! What is the compliantly reported and mandatorily indicated 2-digit BSCF17A Account Status?\n If reported or alleged, what is the supposed BSCF14 Terms Frequency \n of the claim(s)? Regardless, document proof of its appropriate reporting or else eradicate the claim altogether! If this alleged derogatoriness is due to bounced check(s), detail the facts related to your claim(s)’ date of non-sufficient funds notice(s) and as well the supposed date of check’s writing! If the delinquency(ies) is elsewise related, prove that original claimer’s first delinquency date and demonstrate evidence this is in alignment with each any and all reporter’s supposed but mandatorily submitted BSCF25 FCRA COMPLIANCE \n DATE as well as each any and all’s again supposed but mandatorily submitted BSCF20 Compliance Condition Code(s) \n and BSCF37/ J1S10/ and/or J2S10 ECOA code(s) \n and if reported provide proof any alleged is applicable. More, what precisely in each any and all of the alleging circumstances of deficiency noted in this letter for which I am contesting the supposed reporter’s PRIVILEGE TO REPORT\n original credit grantor’s name or alleged payee for which I defaulted against? If a company of some sort, demonstrate to me document proof of each any and all such entity(ies)’s compliantly reported creditor classification code\n , particularly if any alleged is related to any health or medical elsewise claim(s). If have please provide any each and all involved party(ies)’s 6- charactered record identifier (HRCF2) \n and any associated header record field 3 \n “2-charactered” Cycle identifier \n related to any claim made by any one or more creditor(s)/collector(s)/debt buyer(s). Provide evidence that each’s HRCF12-13 reporter name and reporter address \n and HRCF14 reporter contact/telephone number \n is adequate and correct as reported. Demonstrate the requisite reported 8-digit HRCF8 last date(s) of activity \n for any alleging reporter(s) or proof why your non-submission is accurate and lawful or else remove any from reporting right now and do not rereport unless said requisite proof exists and is demonstrated timely! What of the mandatorily accurately reported claimer’s 20-charactered BSCF5 reporter’s identification number \n and each claimed item’s properly reported account identifier information \n per BSCF7 \n standards. If any contested reporter is such that they forwarded or received a debt from any other non-original credit grantor entity, please identify in writing if indeed each involved party denoted its appropriate and mandatorily submitted K2Segment field 1 \n aka Purchased From/Sold To Segment Identifier as well as both the also requisite reported fields 2 and 3 of that same K2Segment \n in regards to the correctly identified PF/ST Indicator value \n and the accompanying 30-charactered PF/ST name(s). \n

According to Regulation V 1022.42: Reasonable policies and procedures concerning the accuracy and integrity of furnished information. Furnishers must have strong policies in place\n to have the highest possible accuracy, but it has not been done in this case.

\n

In addition, a per the metro 2 data formatted standards of legal reporting of consumer accounts and profile history and per the Fair Credit reporting act, namely section 609 a1A,\n it is in CLARITY that you are MANDATED to retain COMPLIANCE at all times, particularly upon notification by an infringed consumer that you are deficient of your requisites to report adequately and a challenge (or dispute) is\n lodged versus any data information previously NOT proven PHYSICALLY to be aﬃrmed valid or is UNABLE to be demonstrated as true, accurate, complete, timely, and otherwise fully compliant to laws upon a documented declaration\n of concern by the consumer. If you are unwilling or UNABLE to do so in a federally defined TIMELY manner you MUST rectify your infractions by RETURNING TO or retaining federal reporting COMPLIANCE TODAY, even RIGHT NOW,\n .As such, I DEMAND that you CERTIFICATE the verification and validity of the following claims or DELETE NOW: Since the accounts have NOT been shown by you to be properly verified, I demand the accounts listed herein be removed\n immediately. Make no mistake, I i n t e n d o n p u r s u i n g a l l a v a i l a b l e r e m e d i e s u n d e r F e d e r a l L a w t o e n f o r c e m y r i g h t s . Since the accounts have NOT been shown by\n you to be properly verified, I demand the accounts listed herein be removed immediately. The FOLLOWING reporting derogatory allegations of information are either UNTRUE, INCORRECT, INCOMPLETE, UNTIMELY, NOT MINE, NOT MY RESPONSIBILITY,\n or otherwise NOT PROVEN COMPLIANT to regulatory federal reporting laws and or standards and MUST be eradicated immediately, do so TODAY, even right NOW! The obvious infractions are as follows: Please delete this erroneous information\n immediately or else wise adequately PHYSICALLY VERFIFY PROPERLY the absolute factual documented TRUTH, ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, VALIDITY, METRO 2 FORMAT REPORTING and any and all aspects of mandatorily CERTIFIED COMPLIANCE OF\n REPORTING otherwise be it mentioned or be it now. Should you be deficient or unwilling to timely demonstrate proof as required I DEMAND that you REMOVE THE FOLLOWING items of reporting:

","\n

Delete now the following claim(s) one or more of being not certified with assent supposed or elsewise revealed, unverifiable, invalid, untrue, inaccurate, inadequately full or incomplete to preconditioned to be standard, untimely\n communicated, not inarguable by cite proof to be of a known ownership of my responsibility, inconsistently described, deficiently reported, questionably expressed and or else wise appearing to potentially be a deviation of\n or from the Metro 2 Standard of ethical, lawful, and compliant reporting of delinquent , derogatory, and or else wise possibly negative claims purported versus me as the consumer. Unconfirmed and or not certifiably Compliant

\n

Concerning the above AND below noted unproven to be verified and certified benevolently recited claim(s), It is undoubtable your responsibility to appropriately and fairly report claims and do so in the exact means established\n by your industry as the STANDARD which magnifies the LAWS regulating your reporting rights and or practices. In line with my state’s statutes, regulations, laws, and or accepted standards of Legal consumer credit reporting\n and By means of those of all applicable federal statutes, regulations, laws, and or standards of the same, any claim(s) still yet not demonstrated versus consumers must be such that it(they) is(are) physically verified (verifiable)\n and validated( Validatable) to be of at least a ”maximum imaginable accuracy and a maximum achievable completion” (see 15 USC 1681). Additionally, Per CDIA, if a claim is proclaimed it must be of a testimonially compliant condition\n (that is, the claim must be certified and or certifiable in its chronicle testament of absolute confirmation of claim’s total truth and undeniable facts) at a minimum to the adequate and established industry standard(s) for\n ethical and lawful reporting(s), i.e. of the proper reporting process(es) to include even the used Metro 2 Format reporting compliance standard (as outlined in CDIA’s 2020 CRRG). Further, In accord with that same 2020 Credit\n Reporting Resource Guide, DNP 3-4, “ANY DEVIATION from these standards jeopardizes the integrity of the data” . Given the following noted professed claims currently divulged versus me have at least one potential deviation from\n the standard for ethical and lawful certifiable compliant reporting, I contest the believability of the claim(s) is questionable at best and therefore even fails to meet the legally required conditions set forth by the FCRA\n of a minimum necessity to be of a maximum conceivable accuracy and a maximum credible completion. Surely, the claim(s) ostensible versus me could have been rumored in accordance to established CDIA standards and so, yet to\n date despite my request thereof and for, no such confirmation has been documented nor any testament made to such! ","\n

My state and all applicable federal laws and standards of ethical reporting of consumer information must meet minimal criteria of compliant described or be removed. You do NOT have option to keep not confirmed certifiably compliant\n data so do NOT. Please attest to the factual compliance of reporting process(es) and the mandated Metro 2 Data Field Format standard of lawful ethical reporting as is related to any alleged and demonstrated cite evidence of\n physically verifiable truth of claim, correctness of claim, timeliness of claim, ownership and responsibility of claim's negativity , or proof of undoubtable validity of claim's negativity else wise in every respect as divulged.\n note the CERTIFIED COMPLIANT REPORTING of factually testimonial claim's of negativity or else eradicate claim today, even RIGHT NOW!

For you to cling to or return to REQUIRED COMPLIANT LAWFUL REPORTING, you MUST modify or blackout from reporting or demonstrate document PROOF of validity to every aspect of derogatory claims,\n unquestionable or not, as related to its reality AND its current reporting, or remove altogether the claim of negativity(ies).

\n

As you are aware OR SHOULD BE AWARE, per FCRA 1681(i) any and all unverified claims MUST be promptly deleted in the event that you do not have OR are unwilling OR are unable OR are UNTIMELY in presentation of your physical possession\n of any and all requisite documentation to guarantee claim’s truth, accuracy, completeness, timeliness, verifiability, validity and certified compliant reporting(s) even including its perfect entire Metro 2 Format reporting\n standard. It is NOT satisfactory NOR lawful for you to return communication merely stating that the claim(s) of negativity are or have been verified somehow, as this is NOT within the needed\n COMPLIANCE of regulatory law NOR within the accepted STANDARDS of ethical reporting! With ANY of your future written communications I request that you also PLEASE provide me with an updated and ACCURATE corrected report thereby\n presenting absolute PROOF that you have , indeed, complied with law and abided by established reporting standards as well.

"],"name":"top","random":true},{"info":["\n

Please supply the following information in complete detail:
>Why you think I owe the debt, and to whom I owe it, including:
>The name and address of the creditor to whom the debt is currently owed, the account number used by that creditor, and the amount owed.
>If this debt started with a different creditor, provide the name and address of the original creditor, the account number used by that creditor, and the amount owed to that creditor at the time it was transferred.
When you identify the original creditor, please provide any other name by which I might know them, if that is different from the official name. In addition, tell me when the current creditor obtained the debt and who the current creditor obtained it from.
>Provide verification and documentation (retail installment contract etc.) that there is a valid basis for claiming that I am required to pay the debt to the current creditor.
>If you are asking that I pay a debt that somebody else is or was required to pay, identify that person. Provide verification and documentation about why this is a debt that I am required to pay.\n \n \n

\n

The amount and age of the debt, specifically:\n \n \n \n

\n

>A copy of the last billing statement sent to me by the original creditor.
>If there have been any additional interest, fees, or charges added since the last billing statement from the original creditor, provide an itemization showing the dates and amount of each added amount. In addition, explain how the added interest, fees or other charges are expressly authorized by the agreement creating the debt or are permitted by law.
>If there have been any payments or other reductions since the last billing statement from the original creditor, provide an itemization showing the dates and amount of each of them.
>If there have been any other changes or adjustments since the last billing statement, please provide full verification and documentation of the amount you are trying to collect. Explain how that amount was calculated. In addition, explain how the other changes or adjustments are expressly authorized by the agreement creating the debt or permitted by law.
>Have you made a determination that this debt is within the statute of limitations applicable to it? Tell me when you think the statute of limitations expires for this debt, and how you determined that.\n \n \n

\n

Due Diligence and Rights to Collect:\n \n \n \n

\n

 >If you fail to provide any of the information or documentation I have asked for, please say why. If you do not provide it, and do not adequately explain why, I will understand that you are unable to confirm or document your claims.
>I would like more information about your firm before I discuss the debt with you. Does your firm have a debt collection license from my state? If not, say why not. If so, provide the date of the license, the name on the license, the license number, and the name, address and telephone number of the state agency issuing the license. >If you are contacting me from a place outside my state, does your firm have a debt collection license from that place? If so, provide the date of the license, the name on the license, the license number, and the name, address and telephone number of the state agency issuing the license.\n \n \n

\n

Regulatory Compliance:\n \n \n \n

\n

 >Is your firm aware of (Complying with the Credit Bureau Settlement Agreement)?
>Does your firm participate or utilize any type of ACDV (Automated Credit Dispute Verification) software or system?
>Does your firm outsource data entry for your collection process (if so please provide the legal name and address of that data entry firm)? >Is your firm currently Metro 2 compliant in its credit bureau reporting procedures (if not pleaser provide a signed declaration and waiver memorandum you have filed with the credit bureau or credit bureau reporting service that details the full process and steps your firm is undertaking to become Metro2 compliant)?
>As a requirement of the Credit Bureau and the CFPB debt validation requirement, please detail your firm's process of verification and validation for each disputed credit item (also include the name, title, and License number for the reviewing officer)?
>In addition, please provide a COMPLETE (Metro 1 or Metro 2) snap shot of the debt report you have provided to the CRA's (including a full P-segment –trailing segment of the report)? >Provide a SIGNED notice of Compliance with regulatory measures as required by both the CFPB and the Credit Bureau Settlement Agreement (signed by your compliance officer, validating this DEBT and including the the name, title, and License number for the reviewing officer)? I was also INFORMED by the CFPB supervisor that YOUR Firm has 30 days to PRODUCE ALL of the ABOVE noted information. If your firm CANNOT produce ALL of the above noted documentation in the allotted time frame, I will accept a written NOTIFICATION stipulating that your firm CANNOT COMPLY with the FDCPA and formally withdrawing your claim to this alleged debt is demanded. If you choose to ignore this demand, I will pursue a direct course offered under the SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT entered into by the Credit Reporting Agencies with the ATTORNEY GENERAL OF THE STATE OF NEW YORK BUREAU OF CONSUMER FRAUDS & PROTECTION and 37 other states that specifically EMPOWERS a working group to remediate and hold accountable and sanction data furnishers who fail to meet the requirements of the FDCPA and CFPB compliance guidance for Professional Debt Collection Practices. If your firm chooses not to respond to this VALIDATION demand and its conditions I will NOT hesitate to FILE suit and SEEK my own payday against your firm for malicious collection activities-see Fields v. Wilber Law Firm, Donald L. Wilber and Kenneth Wilber, USCA-02-C-0072, 7th Circuit Court, Sept. 2004. You have 30 days from the post mark date of this validation demand to answer.\n \n \n

\n

In THANKS I close,

My CURRENT True legal FIRST & LAST name,Street NUMBER & Street NAME ,CITY and STATE is & ONLY IS EXACTLY as Follows:\n \n \n

****Even BEFORE WE BEGIN,TAKE CLEAR THAT I AM AN EDUCATED AND LEARNED STUDENT OF REPORTING STANDARDS concerning MY CONSUMER AND ALSO MY CIVIL RIGHTS,LITIGATION IS NOT MY ENEMY BUT MY ALLI .If you are confused as to the appropriately reported ramifications OF BEING deviant OF NOT ONLY COMPLIANCE BUT determinative COMPLIANCE AS WELL MUCH LESS ,ACCURATE AND REPORTING, I suggest you consult immediately with your of current standard(s) counsel prior to your erroneous decision to counter me minus adequate documentation of every single one even each any and or all of the aspects, notations, and fragments of allegations accused of me as you have currently reporting ILLEGALLY! . This is your formal to cease and desist all collection activities in regard to the above account. The CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 compliant reporting format REQUIRES the precise and exact fully 426-character P-Segment or Trailing Segment that is to include the minimally five portioned PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS to which databasing of suspicious tradeline information occurs. CRSA, auto-populating ANY data field input entry and or application of Slash Entries (such as 11111 or 00000,etc) into the Metro 2 system is automatic call for deletion due to any and all repeating entry as NULL and VOID. Moreover, the regulatory obligation dictates that any and all data furnishers MUST include an attached TRAILING SEGMENT that absolutely accurately and completely includes ALL of the account of allegation(s) specifics! Must be performed in a REAL-TIME browser LOCKDOWN to be lawful. CRSA implementation, if a data furnisher fails to respond within 20 calendar days, e-Oscar is to terminate contest in favor of consumers and or auto-escalate any and all consumer complaints to a certified Metro 2 compliance trained SPECIALIST. Being at or beyond the Phase III of the Implementation of the CRSA,SMART auto-responders are not compliant and unlawful if used by furnishers or accepted by CRAs. Federal laws mandate MANUAL ENTRY for any and all consumer's FULL P-Segment PREVIOUS coding for a RESPONSE, please certificate in testimonial fact to this occurring. Submit/re-submit shuﬄing to populate the metro 2 data fields are illegal. By ignoring my statutory validation request your firm is in direct violation of the FDCPA. Responsible, Lawful, ethical, and compliant consumer credit reporting is the technical accuracy in EVERY single item retained and or to or by any consumer credit reporting agency. Metro 2 compliance requires exacting P-segment, to include the minimal five(5) portion personal identifiers as well as a PRECISELY and COMPLETELY FULL account trailing segment. the CRSA, any and all CRA insourced DISPUTE Specialist MUST BE Metro 2 Compliance Data Entry Evaluation CERTIFIED. Further, this qualifying certification can be REVOLVED by CONSUMER COMPLAINTS the NYAG Signing Statement. I repeat, to lawfully and or report any claim of information, be it an account or any aspect of such, the must be irrefutable fullness in the truth of reporting, correctness of reporting, COMPLETENESS of reporting, TIMELINESS of reporting and of the allegations, undoubtable ownership, irrefutable responsibility of adverse claims, and or adequate and INFORMATIONAL COMPLIANCE to the CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 data field formatted reporting regulatory standards and obligations to include the 81-month time relevance of account / how /when , PRESENT and RELEVANT PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS. Further lawful reporting demands that the regulatory compliance rules are applied EVENLY and thoroughly from data provider to consumer credit reporting repository. Accuracy and completeness of all of any and all information, particularly derogatory consumer information, must abide by every and one of present MY state's reporting regulations as well as those of federal laws ,even the CDIA METRO 2 COMPLIANCE standards due to the implementation of the Credit Reporting Settlement Agreement (CRSA.)\n \n

Is the Personal Identifier information ostensible in the 426-character P-SEGMENT , correct, and to standards of CERTIFIED METRO 2 COMPLIANCE? ð Please demonstrate adequate proof of precisely , accurate, and applicable VALIDATION of the claimed CREDITOR CLASSIFICATION CODES or eradicate every single one and each any and all of the adversary derogatory accusations injuring me immediately, TODAY even NOW and HERE! Your failure to demonstrate the REQUIRED presentation of composed PROOF as demanded in this declaration would compel me to consult my consumer complaint by-law to the members of the NCRWG, as undoubtedly reporting not only must be , timely, and accurate but also in its COMPLETENESS of DATA ENTRY presented to any entity INCLUDING all consumerreporting repositories. If your firm does not COMPLY in writing to this CEASE and DESIST within 5 days as demanded I will not hesitate to bring suit against your firm in this matter as in the example of Mey v. RFA aka RELIANT FINANCIAL ASSOCIATES By the provisions of the Fair Credit Reporting Act and the standards of reporting compliance implemented with the CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 COMPLIANCE regulations, I demand that these above mentioned derogatory items be investigated and for good removed from my report. It is my understanding that you will recheck these items with the creditor who has posted them. Please remove any information that the creditor cannot verify. I understand that under 15 U.S.C. Sec. 1681i(a), you must this reinvestigation within 30 days of receipt of this . I additionally REQUEST that you please send an updated copy of my credit report to the above address. According to the act, there shall be no charge for this updated report. I also request that you please send notices of corrections to anyone who received my credit report in the past six months. Thank you for your time and help in this matter.\n \n

Discontinuance Notice: Per CRRG versioned 2020 Metro2 Manual guide, when reporting delinquent accounts, the \"INDUSTRY STANDARD for REPORTING\" account delinquencies MUST be followed.  .Per 2020 Metro 2 Manual and the 2020 Credit Reporting Resource Guide (2020 CRRG) ,the Metro 2 format is the standard for adequately accurate, complete, and timely reporting of consumer credit information/data meeting the requisites of the FCRA, FCBA, ECOA regulations as well as ALL APPLICABLE STATE LAWS. With deliberateness, adequate Metro 2 format compliance of reporting mandates that any and all claims are to report ,at minimum, monthly with maximum possible accuracy and completeness as related to the consumers’ credit history profile. CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT Metro 2 format reporting is the requisite for reporting responsibility for each the data furnisher(s) and the repositories aka consumer reporting agencies, per FCRA sections 621 & 623. Per guidelines, all Compliance officers for any associated furnisher and or repository are to ensure any and all required data filled fields are logically and accurately submitted certifiably so to include such aspects as the Compliance Condition Code (CCC), Date of First Delinquency (DOFD), Account Type, Consumer Information Indicator, ECOA Code (Account description), J1 and J2 Segments related to associated borrower information, the Original Creditor Name and Creditor Classification , and any other requisites, mentioned here or not, so to lawfully adhere with compliance to Federal and State Legislation! Undoubtedly, any deviation from the above-mentioned compliance standards jeopardizes the integrity of the data claimed in reporting. Questionable and or deficient reporting\n \n

Sadly, There appears surely at least some aspects of questionable information that I have found on my personal credit report and have below detailed some if not all the discovered suspect reportings. I do not recall any such information of which I listed below as having been proven muchless certifiably consistent with fair and ethical reporting procedures including actions to assure proper accurate and completetimely reporting of claim(s) versus me. OBVIOUSLY, I herenow request that you investigate the source of these accounts and ascertain even if or not that the alleging data reporting furnisher ever actually possessed provable lawfully acquired permissible purpose and is able to verify my complete file information including full name, address, date of birth and SSN#. Please also be advised that the description(s) of the procedure(s) used to determine the accuracy and completeness of each any and all of the information alleged and any each and all of its reporter(s)’ being contested is hereby requested as well, to be provided within 15 days of the completion of your reinvestigation. Under federal law, you have 30 days to complete your reinvestigation. As such I am allowing you 30 days to complete this investigation after which I authorize you to mail me my updated credit reports along with the investigation results so again Please accept my official written notification that I suspect inappropriate information reporting and I'm seeking clarity to if or not the alleged information injurious to me was done so in accordance with laws and adherent to the mandatorily utilized reporting standards. Obviously, I demand elimination of claims not certifiably compliant in reporting accuracy and completion mandates and or not yet physically demonstrated of confirmed documented proof of verification and validation absent incertitudeness. \n \n \n

","\n

According to the Fair Credit Reporting Act, Section 609 (a)(1)(A)\n , you are required by federal law to verify \n - through the physical verification of the original signed consumer contract if any exists and is available to review - any and all accounts you post on a credit report, and per standards mandated for ethical and lawful retaining of PRIVILEGE TO REPORT the claim’s process and format for being reported MUST be certifiably COMPLIANT without deviation nor omission of requisite reported information. Otherwise, anyone paying for your reporting services could fax, mail or email in even a potentially fraudulent account.
According to the provisions of the Fair Credit Reporting Act §611(a)[15 USC1681i(a)]\n , these related items must be reinvestigated or deleted from my credit record within 30 days. During the investigation period, these items must be removed from my credit report as the mere reporting of items prior to debt validation constitutes collection activity. \n I am also requesting the names, addresses and telephone numbers of individuals you contacted during your investigation.\n \n

\n

Please notify me that the above items have been modified as requested and or have been compliantly removed from reporting pursuant to not only the oft-mentioned standards of Metro 2 formatted standards but as well in full accordance to law including perfect adherence to even §611(a)(6) [15 USC§ 1681j (a) (6)]\n . I am also requesting an updated copy of my credit report, which should be sent to the address listed in this official written notice of my consumer complaint demanding undeniable proof of adequate reporting practices. According to the provisions of §612 [15 USC §1681j], \n there should be no charge for this report. If you have any questions or need additional information, please contact me at address noted within this same correspondence. I feel, despite the ongoing pandemic, that 15-20 Days should be ample enough time to get this completed, particularly since this is my NOT my first time contacting your organization.\n \n

\n

The following claim(s) are potentially UNFOUNDED, unproven, and or else wise non-compliant and as so are ILLEGALLY REPORTING so ERADICATE them each and all RIGHT NOW!

The above and below listed questionably included items on my current credit report involving you, I here now request to be removed from reporting due to the potential that each and all are reported either deficient of my state’s reporting regulations, the federal reporting regulations, and or with potential deviation(s) from the mandatorily utilized reporting format standards, namely the Metro 2 Compliance standards, which is the authoritative principles or rules that implies a reported claim was in fact fair, ethical, lawful, true, timely, accurate, adequately complete, and or elsewise undeniable as EXACTLY reported! You have NOT demonstrated factually your successful satisfying of at least the minimal criterion to even assume a continued privilege to report versus me. I contest your reporting privilege and CHALLENGE you to demonstrate proof of you adequacy and successful achieving of PRIVILEGE to report fair information versus me.\n \n

\n

Might I remind you that per my state's and that of the federal reporting regulations each and any aspect of data or information elsewise allegedly reported must be done so to a confirmable degree of MAXIMUM possible accuracy AND completion\n . Per CDIA, the CRRG’ s listed requisites for fair, accurate, complete, and compliant reporting in full accordance with each the FCBA, the FCRA, the ECOA, and each and any applicable other state and or federal regulations for\n lawful reporting is the mandatorily utilized Metro 2 Data-filled field formatted reporting standards.
