You are required to maintain and report data with complete accuracy and compliance.You must not report any claims that you know should be in compliance with regulations. We need to make sure all of your claims are accurate and reported in the correct format. This is required by law (FCRA) as well as reporting standards METRO 2+, so please take care with this!However, I request evidence that shows why my accounts are considered to be in a negative state. The proof of a permissible purpose for the inquiry or account within my report must be included. This letter serves as notice that you are not doing your job properly. It is imperative for this issue to be resolved immediately or else there could be serious consequences, so I'm giving 30 days from now (the date of delivery) in which time hopefully everything can become clear and correct itself with no need for intervention or escalation!I would like to receive physical proof of your actions and my updated credit report. The listed claims appear to be inaccurate. Please provide accurate and verified information for each claim, as the allegations are not true or I'll delete them immediately if that is indeed the case!\n

","\n

I just checked my credit and found some inaccuracies. According to the Fair Credit Reporting Act, Section 611 of FCRA you have a responsibility of promptly deleting any information which is inaccurate or incomplete so it doesn't get reported in my report!This is my understanding as well. It's important to note that under the FCRA, even if an account has only been speculated upon or never confirmed in any way—the burden falls on you (the credit bureau) to provide evidence of its veracity before it can be placed on my credit report.\n

","\n

I am disputing the negative items in my credit profile. I dispute these claims and demand that any information be removed from reports immediately if it is inaccurate or misleading, as this will only harm me further!Per 15 U.S.C § 1681e “Whenever a consumer reporting agency prepares a consumer report it shall follow reasonable procedures to assure maximum possible accuracy of the information concerning the individual about whom the report relates”12 CFR Part 1022 (Regulation V) requires furnishers to:A - Furnish information about accounts or other relationships with a consumer that has integrity.B - Furnish information about accounts or other relationships with a consumer that is accurate.C - Conduct reasonable investigations of consumer disputesThe CRRG standards state that in order to make a report, you must follow their guidelines. “Any deviation from these standards jeopardizes the integrity of data.” This means any mistakes when reporting claims can have serious consequences for accuracy- which affects your federally regulated reports!With that said! I found some mistakes and inaccuracies in your report, which I would like to dispute/challenge.The following claims about me were not reported correctly and I am challenging these inaccurate statements. Please provide proof that the proper reporting standards were followed so this can be resolved immediately!\n

","\n

When I made the decision to use my rights under FCRA, it was with an eye on challenging any information found in credit reports that are not accurate. By fighting back against this injustice, I am ensuring that the information on my credit report is accurate and reliable. I have every right to challenge any inaccuracies in a manner compliant with federal law when they are negatively affecting me financially because of their accuracy or completeness. This is just an allegation. There's no proof that I'm delinquent or derogatory, so how can you report this? With all due respect, the claims within my report are wrong! You have to follow proper procedures if these claims are in your system and to be used in my credit reports! I challenge the accuracy and fairness of your findings by demanding evidence before you make any claims and take such drastic measures against my reputation.I know that you can’t just decide which rules apply to your organization, so I won't let anyone report any false claims. It's important to make sure all of your claims are accurate and reported in the correct format - this is required by law (FCRA) as well as Metro 2 standards. For any negative account I demand documentation / proof proving why your company considers it delinquent or derogatory. You have yet to provide me records documenting how your company verified and validated these accounts / claims. Your proof of each negative claim you placed on my credit report should also include proof of a permissible purpose for any inquiry into the account. It's time for me to get my life back! I need you to send over some physical proof of what has been done and an updated credit report. Either confirm that this matter has been reported correctly or remove it from the report immediately. I am giving you 30 days to investigate.\n

","\n

I am requesting information on my delinquency or derogatory behavior. I want any potential negative information to be confirmed and would like to know the absolute truth and facts about it, even if it is certified. I challenge you to make a document that shows all of the evidence for each claim. The document should be verified as correct, complete, and true. You should be aware that, according to the 2020 CRRG, \"ANY DEVIATION OF THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA.\" The report you sent me does not seem to be accurate. I am not sure if the reporting process was done correctly or if the format is correct. Because of this, I cannot say that your claims are accurate. Even if the collection rights are still valid, which is not clear, your claims would not meet the minimum requirements for a legal and ethical report.\n

","\n

The right to contest my credit report is something that every American has, and I am exercising this privilege. I understand the nature of these proceedings- it's not just about whether or how much money was owed, but also what kind of debt loadurbances can have on your life if they're left unchecked!The report-ability of any derogatory and or delinquent act is oftentimes questionable.I challenge this notion as I do not believe in reporting something unless there's factual documented proof to support it.You must report compliantly and accurately per federal and applicable reporting laws of my state. It is unlawful and unethical to retain any information which you know or should know does not comply with regulations.This letter to you serves as a wake-up call to you to ensure that all data with my credit report is factual and incompliance with Metro 2 format reporting standards. I request that you validate with physical (in writing to me as a response) verifiable proof of permissible purpose for any of the alleged delinquent/derogatory account’s allegations of inquiry(ies).Thankfully, I'm giving you 30 days to complete your investigation into the validity of this claim. If it's current and compliant with regulations then we'll leave things as they are; but if not - well... I demand that you remove them from reporting (my credit report) immediately.I request that you send me physical documents proving your action(s) and my updated personal credit report following any correction(s).The following items appear questionable in reporting! Please ensure that each item below is accurate, reporting compliantly, completed and timely being reported or DELETE immediately:\n

","\n

The Fair Credit Reporting Act gives me the right to contest any information on my credit report that I believe is inaccurate. The data included in it must be documented and validated before its shown to anyone else, because if not then there'll just have been one person who wasn't doing their job - which means more mistakes!I challenge the reportability of the allegations within my credit report. They simply are not true! My credit report is riddled with errors. I will not accept or recognize the allegations and claims within the report as true without further evidence, which meets both federal AND state requirements for reporting! Please remedy the situation immediatelyNon-compliance with regulations and the law is never acceptable! The government is watching you like a hawk. They want to make sure that all your claims are accurate and reported in the correct format, which meets both METRO 2 standards as well as FCRA requirements!I’m requesting evidence to show why my accounts are considered delinquent or derogatory. This includes any proof that the creditor had a permissible purpose for making claimed accounts and inquiries. I will be monitoring the situation and I expect to hear from you within 30 days. I expect you to confirm and verify the items are indeed reporting correctly or remove them permanently from my report. I want you to send me a hard copy of your actions and my updated credit report. The evidence of your actions and my updated credit report should be sent via mail.The allegations appear to be inaccurate. Please provide accurate and verified information for each claim or we will have no choice but take legal action against you!\n

","\n

According to the FCRA Section 611(15 U.S.C. 1681 (l) and the accepted STANDARD of metro 2 data field reporting, I have the right to dispute any information on my credit report that I believe is not correct.I cannot recognize or accept the allegation of delinquency without factual proof. Allegations must be reported with the greatest compliance and accuracy possible.You should not report any claims that you know or should know are not in compliance with regulations and the law.I am writing to inform you that you need to make sure all your claims are factual and certified before reporting them. This is required by the Metro 2 reporting standard. I request that you provide evidence to support the existence of the account and evidence that the account was used for a permissible purpose. I am giving you 30 days to investigate the matter and determine whether it is still being reported accurately and in compliance with regulations. If it is not, I want it removed from the report.I authorize you to take steps to correct my credit and send me physical proof of your actions.The following claims are unverified and require further investigation. Please report any verified claims immediately. Please certify that all claims that have been verified as accurate, complete, and timely reported have been reported in compliance with regulations or remove immediately.\n

","\n

This document is my request for any information on my delinquency or derogatory behavior. I would like this information to be reported accurately and completely in accordance with all established laws and standards. I want any potential negative information to be confirmed. I want to know the absolute truth and facts about it, even if it is certified.You need to have a process for reporting which follows the Metro 2 data field formatted reporting standard. I don't think your report is accurate because of the claims in this complaint. I don't think your report is accurate. I challenge you to make a document that shows all of the evidence for each claim. The document should be verified as correct, complete, and true. You should be aware that, according to the 2020 CRRG: \"ANY DEVIATION OF THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA\".\"The below- noted claims are disputed and have not been confirmed as facts. I am requesting that you remove any false accounts from my credit report. I only want factually accurate, verified, and compliant data documented on my credit report.\n

","\n

The Fair Credit Reporting Act gives me the right to contest any information on my credit report that I believe is inaccurate. The data included in it must be documented and validated before its shown to anyone else, because if not then there'll just have been one person who wasn't doing their job - which means more mistakes!I challenge the reportability of the allegations within my credit report. They simply are not true! My credit report is riddled with errors. I will not accept or recognize the allegations and claims within the report as true without further evidence, which meets both federal AND state requirements for reporting! Please remedy the situation immediately Non-compliance with regulations and the law is never acceptable!The government is watching you like a hawk. They want to make sure that all your claims are accurate and reported in the correct format, which meets both METRO 2 standards as well as FCRA requirements!I’m requesting evidence to show why my accounts are considered delinquent or derogatory. This includes any proof that the creditor had a permissible purpose for making claimed accounts and inquiries. I will be monitoring the situation and I expect to hear from you within 30 days. I expect you to confirm and verify the items are indeed reporting correctly or remove them permanently from my report. I want you to send me a hard copy of your actions and my updated credit report. The evidence of your actions and my updated credit report should be sent via mail.\n

","\n

I am disputing any errors or omissions in reporting required by FCRA section 611 (15 U.S.C. 1681) and METRO 2 compliance criteria. In order to comply with FCRA and METRO 2 compliance regulations, my profile must be accurate and thorough. You must finish your information verification within a reasonable time frame and be able to evaluate and confirm all of the information in my credit report. My credit history, as well as the following information, have never been validated or correctly reported. I will exercise my consumer rights by requesting that factually truthful, verifiable, and compliant data be obtained and placed on my credit report. I also require that any mistakes be fixed permanently and as of now! I will also need you to investigate the origins of each account and guarantee that each creditor has a legitimate basis for all queries on my credit record. If you are not able to do so, then I will need to pursue legal action.\n

","\n

The Fair Credit Reporting Act gives me the opportunity to dispute any information on my credit report that I believe is inaccurate. This law requires all data included in a consumer's file be documented and validated before it can go live for use by creditors, so I take this seriously! The allegations of delinquency and derogatory information against me are false. I will fight back with all my strength!However, I request evidence that shows why my accounts are considered to be in a negative state. The proof of a permissible purpose for the inquiry or account within my report must be included. This letter serves as notice that you are not doing your job properly. It is imperative for this issue to be resolved immediately or else there could potentially be serious consequences, so I'm giving you 30 days from now (the date of delivery) in which time hopefully everything can become clear and correct itself with no need for intervention or escalation!I would like to receive physical proof of your actions and my updated credit report.The listed claims appear to be inaccurate. Please provide accurate and verified information for each claim, as the allegations are not true or I'll delete them immediately if that is indeed the case!\n

","\n

I am writing to you because I am concerned about the accuracy and honesty of your company's data. According to FCRA section 611, it is important that we have accurate records on file with those who rely on them most- including not just customers, but also potential lenders or employers. After doing some research into Metro 2 compliance standards, I have found that there may be some inaccuracies in reporting going forward if these issues are not promptly resolved. I would love any feedback possible before taking action against you later down this road together.The inaccuracies that are currently on my report are having a serious negative impact on my quality of life. The data on my credit report is of high importance and is currently not a representation of who I am financially because it is inaccurate. I am demanding accurate documentation so you can document me - the person who deserves status in society - correctly.Please make sure that all inaccuracies are removed immediately and that I am furnished with a new credit report upon the completion of your investigations into the details of my credit records.\n

","\n

I am contesting the information on my credit report that I believe is not correct. In accordance with the FCRA Section 611(15 U.S.C. 1681 (l) and in accordance with the accepted STANDARD of metro 2 data field reporting. The information has not been proven to be true, correct, or verified.I can't recognize any allegations of wrongdoing without any factual proof. I challenge the reportability of any such claims. According to the federal and state laws that apply to me, you are required to report information accurately and completely.You should not keep or report anything that you know is not in compliance with the law or regulations.I am writing to let you know that you need to make sure everything in my credit report is accurate. This includes making sure that you adhere to all FCRA and METRO 2 format reporting standards.For every account that you’re reporting, I need evidence (physically verifiable) that you verified the information to be accurate and compliant. For every inquiry I request proof that you confirmed that the creditor had a permissible purpose.I am giving you a month to investigate this matter and determine whether it is still accurate, valid and in compliance. If you cannot provide proof that the information is accurate, compliant or valid I demand that you remove it from the report.I would also like for you to mail me physical proof of the actions you have taken to correct my credit report and a new updated report. This will help me stay updated on the progress you are making.The following items on my report appear questionable! Please certify that all claims are true and accurate, complete and timely reported. If not, please delete immediately.\n

","\n

I am formally challenging you to review the data on file for me and ensure that it is accurate and up-to-date. I am citing the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) section 611 as well as Metro 2 compliance standards in doing so. Any inaccuracies or deficiencies in the reporting must be corrected immediately. My credit report needs to be accurate and complete, so please follow these standards to ensure that you are meeting deadlines and maintaining accuracy. The information in my profile is wrong and it needs to be fixed immediately. Thank you for taking action to resolve this.\n

","\n

My rights as a consumer are being violated with this inaccurate information. I have the right to be treated fairly by those who control it, so please provide me all available details on how they came up short in their responsibilities towards accuracy and compliance!The one thing I won't tolerate is negative information. It doesn’t matter if it's certified or not, what matters to me are the facts and truths of anything that may be going on with your company and the data you have concerning my credit profile.I'm concerned about the accuracy of the information in my credit report. I'm unsure if the reporting process was done correctly or whether it's in proper format, so we can't say that your claims are accurate either way.The following claims are controversial and have not been independently verified as true.Please remove any false accounts from my credit report. I am requesting that you take care of this as soon as possible so it does not affect me financially in the future. My credit report is my life. I want only factually accurate, verified and compliant data documented on it!\n

","\n

I am challenging you to review your data on file for me! I insist that all inaccuracies or deficiencies of reporting be corrected in accordance with the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) section 611(15 U.S.C. 1681I) and Metro 2 compliance standards. The information in my profile needs to be accurate and complete. You can document your verification process for all the data within my credit report by following these standards set forth under Metro 2 compliance and FCRA law, which will ensure that you’re meeting deadlines while maintaining accuracy!\n

","\n

I am using my rights under the FCRA to contest any information on my credit report that I believe is not accurate. The data included in my credit report must be documented and validated before it is included on my report. I can't recognize or accept the allegation of delinquency and derogatoriness without factual proof. I challenge the reportability of this allegation, which doesn't meet federal or state reporting requirements. You must report this with the greatest compliance and accuracy possible. You shouldn’t report any claims that you know or should know are not in compliance with regulations or the law.I'm writing to remind you that you need to make sure all your claims are accurate and reported in the correct format. This is required by law (FCRA) and reporting standards (METRO 2).For any account that is alleged to be delinquent or derogatory, I request evidence that shows why the account is considered to be in that state. This should include proof of a permissible purpose for any inquiry into the account. I am giving you 30 days to investigate the matter and confirm that it is being reported correctly or remove it from the report. I would like for you to mail me physical proof of your actions and my updated credit report.These allegations appear to be inaccurate. Please provide accurate and verified information for each claim. If any of these claims are not true, please delete them immediately.\n

","\n

I recently reviewed my credit profile and noticed inaccuracies and/or incomplete information, and accounts that are unverified. I understand that, according to the Fair Credit Reporting Act, Section 611 of the FCRA, you are required to promptly delete all information that is inaccurate, incomplete or which cannot be verified.It is also my understanding that, under the FCRA, 15 U.S.C. & 1681i, every single one - even each any or all of the unproven, non-compliant, incomplete, untrue, incorrect, and/or unverified aspects of any alleged derogatory accounts - must be promptly negated in its entirety, or the alleged accounts must be completely deleted.I am now enacting my consumer and civil rights to compel you to annul with permanent deletion these derogatory accounts, or provide testimony and certification that you are adhering to mandated metro 2 data formatted reporting standards according to regulations. The following derogatory account allegations are either untrue, unverified, incorrect, incomplete, untimely, not mine, not my responsibility, or otherwise not proven in compliance with regulatory federal reporting laws and/or standards, and must be removed immediately.\n

","\n

I am officially challenging you to review your data on file for me! With the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) section 611(15 U S C 1681I) and Metro 2 compliance standards, I challenge all inaccuracies or deficiencies of reporting.The information in my profile needs to be accurate and complete. You can document your verification process for all the data within my credit report by following these standards set forth under Metro 2 compliance and FCRA law, which will ensure that you’re meeting deadlines while maintaining accuracy!The information in my credit report and below is wrong. It was never proven to be factual, so now I have decided to exercise my consumer rights!I know I'm entitled to accurate and current information about my finances. So, when the misrepresentation of facts is found on my credit report it can and has had serious consequences! This means I need you to fix these problems right away before they get worse! I am exercising my right to be informed of any inaccuracies on my credit report. I request that you remove any and all false accounts from our records immediately! I demand that ONLY factually accurate, verified, and compliant data be documented and included on my credit report\n

","\n

I am also requesting a copy of my updated credit report.I have the right to contest any information on my credit report that I believe is inaccurate. So, I am contesting any information on my credit report that I believe is not accurate. The data included in this document must be documented and validated before it can go onto the actual reports!The allegations of delinquency and derogatoriness are without evidence, so I refuse to accept them as true. Let me take a moment to inform you that the reportability of this allegation has been challenged. It doesn't meet federal or state requirements for reporting, so please make sure it's as accurate and thorough in its entirety before submitting anything!The law requires that you make sure all of your claims are accurate and reported in the correct format. This is a great way to ensure compliance with regulations, so we hope this reminder helps! All of our information must be reported accurately and accordance with Metro 2 regulations or else you could face fines! AGAIN! Please take this seriously. I am writing to remind you that all your claims need accurate reporting in order for them be reported correctly, which is required by law (FCRA) and Metro 2 standards.For any account that is alleged to be delinquent or derogatory, I would like evidence showing why you and the company who provided the data to you considers the financial state as such. The law requires that I have proof of a permissible purpose for any inquiry within my report. Therefore, I’m requesting that you verify permissible purpose was provided for each account and inquiry. You have 30 days to investigate this matter and confirm that it is being reported correctly or remove any errors from the report. I am looking forward to receiving your proof of action and my updated credit report.These allegations appear to be false. Please provide evidence for each claim. If any of these claims are not true, please delete them immediately. I am also requesting a copy of my updated credit report.\n

","\n

According to the FCRA Section 611(15 U.S.C. 1681 (l) and the accepted STANDARD of metro 2 data field reporting, I have the right to dispute any information on my credit report that I believe is not correct. When it comes to my credit report, I reserve the right to dispute any information that I deem to be inaccurate. I won't stand for any misinformation being associated with my name and financial history. If there's something on my credit report that doesn't seem right, you can bet that I'll be taking action to get it removed.I cannot recognize or accept the allegation of delinquency without factual proof. There must be some sort of evidence to back up the claim. Otherwise, I cannot and will not recognize or accept the allegation. According to federal and state law, you must report any allegations with the greatest compliance and accuracy possible.You should not report any claims that you know or should know are not in compliance with regulations and the law. If you do report such claims, you could be subject to fines or other penalties. Furthermore, reporting claims that you know are not in compliance could damage the reputation of your company.I am writing to inform you that you need to make sure all your claims are factual and certified before reporting them. This is required by the Metro 2 reporting standard. I request that you provide evidence to support the existence of the account and evidence that the account was used for a permissible purpose. Please provide any documents or records you may have that can help corroborate the account and it’s permissible purpose.I am giving you 30 days to investigate the matter and determine whether it is still being reported accurately and in compliance with regulations. If it is not, I want it removed from the report.I hereby authorize you to take whatever steps are necessary to correct my credit. Please send me physical proof of any actions taken on my behalf. I appreciate your help in making sure my credit is in good standing.Further investigation is required to verify the following claims. These claims remain unverified until further inquiry can confirm them. More research is needed to support these unsubstantiated assertions. Please report any verified claims immediately. Please certify that all claims that have been verified as accurate, complete, and timely reported have been reported in compliance with regulations or remove immediately\n

","\n

I dispute the negative items in my credit profile. I dispute these claims and demand that any information be removed from reports immediately if it is inaccurate or misleading, as this will only harm me further!Upon review of my report, I noticed that several deviations from mandatory standards were present which will most likely affect the validity and accuracy of data in this document. These claims that the information in my report is negative, untrue or incorrect are unsubstantiated. To date I have not received any physical proof to back up these statements and eagerly await a reply from you.Document that you have complied with the reporting requirements, and report without any deviations. Please note that if you have not complied with the requirements, I will need to remove them from my report.Per 15 U.S.C § 1681e “Whenever a consumer reporting agency prepares a consumer report it shall follow reasonable procedures to assure maximum possible accuracy of the information concerning the individual about whom the report relates”Also per 12 CFR Part 1022 (Regulation V) requires furnishers to: A - Furnish information about accounts or other relationships with a consumer that has integrity. B - Furnish information about accounts or other relationships with a consumer that is accurate. C - Conduct reasonable investigations of consumer disputesThe CRRG standards state that in order to make a report, you must follow their guidelines. “Any deviation from these standards jeopardizes the integrity of data.” This means any mistakes when reporting claims can have serious consequences for accuracy- which affects your federally regulated reports!With that said! I found some mistakes and inaccuracies in your report, which I would like to dispute/challenge.The following claims about me were not reported correctly and I am challenging these inaccurate statements. Please provide proof that the proper reporting standards were followed so this can be resolved immediately!\n

","\n

I need you to take action and investigate the inaccuracies on my credit report so that it accurately reflects my financial standing. As per FCRA section 611, it is imperative that you have accurate records on file with those who rely upon them most- which includes not just customers but also potential lenders or employers! After doing some research into Metro 2 compliance standards as well, I've found there may be some inaccuracies in reporting going forward if these issues aren't promptly resolved.\n

","\n

I am disputing the negative items in my credit profile. I dispute these claims and demand that any information be removed from reports immediately if it is inaccurate or misleading, as this will only harm me further!Upon review of my report, I noticed that several deviations from mandatory standards were present which will most likely affect the validity and accuracy of data in this document. These claims that the information in my report is negative, untrue or incorrect are unsubstantiated. To date I have not received any physical proof to back up these statements and eagerly await a reply from you.Document that you have complied with the reporting requirements, and report without any deviations. Please note that if you have not complied with the requirements, I will need to remove them from my report.Per 15 U.S.C § 1681e “Whenever a consumer reporting agency prepares a consumer report it shall follow reasonable procedures to assure maximum possible accuracy of the information concerning the individual about whom the report relates”Also per 12 CFR Part 1022 (Regulation V) requires furnishers to: A - Furnish information about accounts or other relationships with a consumer that has integrity. B - Furnish information about accounts or other relationships with a consumer that is accurate. C - Conduct reasonable investigations of consumer disputesThe CRRG standards state that in order to make a report, you must follow their guidelines. \"Any deviation from these standards jeopardizes the integrity of data.\" This means any mistakes when reporting claims can have serious consequences for accuracy- which affects your federally regulated reports!With that said! I found some mistakes and inaccuracies in your report, which I would like to dispute/challenge.The following claims about me were not reported correctly and I am challenging these inaccurate statements. Please provide proof that the proper reporting standards were followed so this can be resolved immediately!\n

","\n

I am reporting that there are some negative items in my credit profile, but I have not confirmed or accepted that these are accurate. I dispute these claims and demand that any negative information be removed from the reports immediately.The claims that this information in my report is negative, untrue, incorrect, incomplete, untimely, and not verifiable are unsubstantiated. I have yet to be provided physical verifiable proof that the claims of negativity within my report are true.After reviewing my report I noticed several deviations from mandatory reporting standards therefore the data in my report cannot be accurate and complete! With that said, I refute your allegations and challenge you to provide proof that you have the right to report this incomplete negative information about me. Document that you have complied with the reporting requirements, and report without any deviations. If you have not complied with the requirements or there are any negative aspects below that have been challenged, you must remove them from my report.Per 15 U.S.C § 1681e “Whenever a consumer reporting agency prepares a consumer report it shall follow reasonable procedures to assure maximum possible accuracy of the information concerning the individual about whom the report relates” Also per 12 CFR Part 1022 (Regulation V) requires furnishers to: A - Furnish information about accounts or other relationships with a consumer that has integrity. B - Furnish information about accounts or other relationships with a consumer that is accurate. C - Conduct reasonable investigations of consumer disputes According to CRRG, in order to make a lawful report, you must follow the Metro 2 compliance standards. Also as stated in the CRRG “Any Deviation From These Standards Jeopardizes The Integrity of The Data”. This means that any mistakes in reporting claims can make the information less accurate. This is important to remember because it affects the accuracy of any federally regulated reports. With that said! I found some mistakes and inaccuracies in your report and I would like to invoke my rights to dispute/challenge these inaccurate and non-compliant items. If you continue to report claims that are not perfect, it shows that you do not care about my rights as a consumer.I don't think it's fair for you to report on me in a way that isn't confirmed to be ethical and meets the standards of certified reporting.The following claims about me were not reported correctly and do not meet federal requirements.\n

","\n

I am contesting any information on my credit report that is not true or documented. This includes any claims that have not been proven to be correct. I am doing this in accordance with the FCRA and the accepted STANDARD of metro 2 data field reporting.I cannot recognize or accept the allegation of delinquency and derogatoriness without factual document proof. I challenge the reportability of these allegations because it is unsubstantiated. According to federal and state law, you must report any allegation accurately and completely.It is wrong to report any claims that you know or should know are against the law or regulations. I'm writing to inform you that you need to make sure all your claims are factual and reported correctly. This is required by the Metro 2 reporting standard. I request that you provide physical verifiable evidence to support the existence of the account and evidence that the account was used for a permissible purpose.If it is not, I want it removed from the report.I authorize you to mail me physical documentation of your actions and my updated credit report.\n

","\n

I kindly request your assistance in providing me with accurate and complete information regarding any delinquency or derogatory behavior associated with my credit report. It is important that the information reported follows all established laws and standards. I understand that negative information can be damaging, which is why I am requesting that you confirm any potential negative information reported. I value transparency and would like to know the absolute truth and facts.

I believe that the report you provided may not be entirely accurate due to the lack of evidence supporting some of the claims. To ensure the integrity of the data, I kindly ask that you follow the Metro 2 data field formatted reporting standard. Could you please provide me with a document that shows all the evidence for each claim? It is important that this document is verified as correct, complete, and true. According to the 2020 CRRG, any deviation from these standards jeopardizes the integrity of the data. I understand that mistakes can happen, but I want to ensure that the reporting process was done correctly and that the format is correct. Therefore, I cannot confirm the accuracy of your claims until I receive sufficient evidence. Thank you for your cooperation in resolving this matter.\n

","\n

I am compelled to highlight the violation of my consumer rights caused by the dissemination of inaccurate information. Fair treatment by those responsible for its accuracy and compliance is my rightful expectation. I kindly request all available details on their failure to uphold these responsibilities.

I must emphasize my intolerance towards negative information, regardless of certification. The veracity and truthfulness of your company's activities and the data concerning my credit profile are of utmost importance. The provided credit report is unexpectedly inaccurate, raising doubts about adherence to the FCRA and relevant Metro 2 data field formatting standards. I challenge you to produce a verified, complete, and truthful document that presents evidence for each claim. Failure to follow these standards, as outlined in the 2020 CRRG, jeopardizes data integrity, which is a matter of utmost seriousness.\n

","\n

Excuse me, I believe that I have the right to dispute any inaccurate information on my credit report as stated by the Fair Credit Reporting Act. I take the accuracy of my credit report very seriously and would appreciate your assistance in rectifying any errors.
I understand that creditors are required to document and validate the information included in my credit report before using it. I am confident that the allegations of delinquency and derogatoriness against me are false, and I would like to request evidence that supports the negative status of my accounts. I kindly ask that you include proof of a permissible purpose for the inquiry or account within my report.
May I request that you address this matter as soon as possible, please? If not rectified within 30 days from the delivery date, there may be serious consequences, and I would prefer to avoid any intervention or escalation. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

I understand that creditors are required to document and validate the information included in my credit report before using it. I am confident that the allegations of delinquency and derogatoriness against me are false, and I would like to request evidence that supports the negative status of my accounts. I kindly ask that you include proof of a permissible purpose for the inquiry or account within my report.

May I request that you address this matter as soon as possible, please? If not rectified within 30 days from the delivery date, there may be serious consequences, and I would prefer to avoid any intervention or escalation. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.\n

","\n

I have never validated or correctly reported my credit history or the following information. Therefore, I will exercise my consumer rights by requesting that factually truthful, verifiable, and compliant data be obtained and placed on my credit report. I also require that any mistakes be permanently rectified immediately. I also need you to investigate the origins of each account and guarantee that each creditor has a legitimate basis for all queries on my credit record.\n

","\n

It is clear that the claim made against me is unjust and has caused significant harm to my personal, emotional, and financial well-being, as well as my creditworthiness. I am challenging your assumed privilege to report this claim and requesting proof that your reporting practices are ethical, lawful, and compliant with all necessary requirements. My concern is not with the right to collect, but with the apparent lack of fair reporting practices in relation to the specific claim made against me.
I am challenging all data reporting furnishers and receiving repositories to provide physical documentation demonstrating their compliance with all reporting processes, including adherence to the CDIA's most recent industry standards and applicable federal and state regulations. Any deviation from these standards jeopardizes the integrity of the data, and it is not acceptable for entities to report or accept reporting that is non-compliant, whether done knowingly or unknowingly. The minimum standard for reporting is maximum possible accuracy and completion within perfect fidelity to the mandated Metro 2 format reporting standards as outlined in the CDIA's most current CRRG. All data reporting furnishers and receiving repositories should have been compliant in the reporting process, and any deviation from these standards is unacceptable.\n

","\n

Excuse me, I believe that I have the right to dispute any inaccurate information on my credit report as stated by the Fair Credit Reporting Act. I take the accuracy of my credit report very seriously and would appreciate your assistance in rectifying any errors.
I understand that creditors are required to document and validate the information included in my credit report before using it. I am confident that the allegations of delinquency and derogatoriness against me are false, and I would like to request evidence that supports the negative status of my accounts. I kindly ask that you include proof of a permissible purpose for the inquiry or account within my report.
May I request that you address this matter as soon as possible, please? If not rectified within 30 days from the delivery date, there may be serious consequences, and I would prefer to avoid any intervention or escalation. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.\n

","\n

I am reminding you once again that you must remove any claims listed above or below that have not met the minimum criteria required for you to assume the privilege of reporting. If you fail to prove the undeniable facts of each allegation and adhere to the necessary reporting practices mandated by the CDIA's Metro 2 Compliance standards, then I contest the reportability of any such claim. The CDIA's CRRG stipulates that \"ANY DEVIATION FROM THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA.\" Therefore, it is imperative that you accept my challenge to prove the accuracy and compliance of each claim. I demand that you remove any such claim immediately from reporting as I have requested.\n

","\n

The deletion or blocking of accounts resulting from a data breach and unauthorized inquiries is governed by FCRA Section § 605B, specifically addressing the blockage of information arising from fraud or data breaches [15 U.S.C. § 1681c-2]. Additionally, FCRA Section § 604 outlines the permissible purposes of consumer reports [15 U.S.C. § 1681b]. I am writing to formally dispute the presence of accounts on my consumer credit report, as referenced below, which stem from data breaches or fraudulent activities. I request tangible, verifiable evidence that bears my signature or electronic signature. I emphasize that this correspondence represents my interests, and I kindly request your thorough review. These actions were undertaken without my authorization, thus infringing upon my consumer rights as defined by the Fair Credit Reporting Act, Section § 605B [15 U.S.C. § 1681c-2] and Section § 604 [15 U.S.C. § 1681b]. It has come to my attention that these companies initiated these actions without proper validation or original documentation from any of the reporting entities.\n

"],"name":"toptop","random":true},{"info":["\n

To whom it may concern,\n \n \n \n

\n

In accordance with the Fair Credit Reporting Act Section 611 (15 U.S.C. § 1681I) \n and the understood STANDARDS of acceptable lawful COMPLIANT REPORTING STANDARDS such as the METRO 2 Five Points of Compliance and other potentially applicable standards and regulatory requisites of reporting I am rendering this officially writ consumer CHECK OF COMPLIANT REPORTING and CHALLENGE versus any and all DEFICIENCIES of reporting and or inability to DOCUMENT factual reporting verifiability of validness, truth, accuracy, completeness, timeliness, ownership(s) of responsibility, and or certifiability of the mandated compliant PROCESSES of reporting and mandatorily perfect complete certifiable METRO 2 FORMAT compliance \n of reporting standard(s). Beyond this, I am practicing my right to challenge questionable information reporting that I have found on my personal credit report, be it due to potentially erroneous and or misleading claims/data,\n or be it due to UNVERIFIABLE or INVALIDATE and or not CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT REPORTED claims REGARDLESS of circumstances else wise. REPORTING REQUISITES and standards of appropriate reporting are MANDATES NOT OPTIONS\n of reporting, even correct true claims NOT reported precisely according to requisites of certifiable compliant reporting PROCESS and or FORMAT (ie METRO 2 DATA FIELD FORMATTED reporting's) are DEFICIENT of report-ability\n if not ABSOLUTELY documented and provable. I do not recognize the information listed below as having ever been demonstrated factual in reality much less certified compliantly reported in the mandatory processes of reporting\n and with the factually perfect and complete certified mandated format (METRO 2) of reporting standard(s). For the preceding reasons among others, I here now EXERCISE my consumer RIGHTS to DEMAND that ONLY FACTUALLY\n PERFECT TRUE CORRECT VERIFIED VALIDATED CLAIMS that are CERTIFIED COMPLIANTLY REPORTED be reported and DEMAND any deficiencies be ERADICATED else wise. I DEMAND in this lawful request that you investigate the source\n of these accounts and ascertain that the creditor had a permissible purpose for even the account inquiries of which to potentially initiate said alleged accounts, be them true or not, valid or not. OBVIOUSLY at a bare\n minimum any alleged reporting data furnisher would be necessarily required to at least be able to verify my complete file information EXACTLY AS I HAVE INDICATED ABOVE and NO OTHER WAY including full First and Last\n names, My current correct resident address Street Number and Street Name as well as City and State, my factually correct date of birth and the factually correct last four of my reported SSN#. ANY DEFICIENCIES require\n IMMEDIATE and COMPLETE ERADICATION of reporting PERMANENTLY!\n \n

\n

Note: Per 15 UCS 1681 all claims must meet the minimal criterion of being with a maximum possible accuracy and completion. The CDIA influenced 2011-2020 CRRG states on DNP 3-4 that “Any deviation from these standards jeopardizes the Integrity of the data”. Omittance from and or inconsistencies of reporting are clues of likely divergence from at least the minimal necessity for establishing the mandatory adherence to the certifiably compliant Metro 2 formatted reporting standards so remove now or PROVE to ethically retain reportability!\n \n \n \n

\n

INCORRECT and or else wise NOT CERTIFIED COMPLIANTLY REPORTED VALIDATED ACCOUNT INFORMATION CLAIMS thereby UNLAWFULLY REPORTING of which absolutely REQUIRE IMMEDIATE DELETION include at least the the accounts below are reporting improperly so please investigate these:\n \n \n \n

\n

","\n

RE:\n DEMAND to have reported claims demonstrated as factually documented in full truth, accuracy, timeliness, completeness, physical verifiability, validity elsewise AND DEMAN that the adequate claim(s) are of CERTIFIED COMPLIANT REPORTING PROCESS(es) and of the mandated reporting format, i.e. Metro 2 Compliant format standard. FINALLY, DEMAND that any reported item of deficiency and /OR of the inability (or UNWILLINGNESS) to PROVE EACH claim’s VALIDITY and/or CERTIFIED COMPLIANT REPORTING yield an immediate ERADICATION of claim’s derogates ,if any! COMPLIANT REPORTING of PROVEN VALID claims is the REQUIREMENT , NOT OPTION, for lawful ethical reporting practices, ENSURE YOUR OF COMPLIANCE\n \n \n

\n

To Whom it Concerns,\n \n \n \n

\n

DEROGATORY ACCUSATIONS HAS TO BE METRO 2 COMPLIANT TO RETAIN OR REPORT SO DELETE ANY NOT PHYSICALLY WITH PROOF OF PERMISSIBLE PURPOSE FROM THE EXACTLY AND LEGALLY IDENTIFIED ME. I DO NOT AUTHORIZE YOU TO REPORT NOT PROVEN COMPLIANT INFORMATION AND YOU MUST COMPLY.CERTAINLY, YOU ARE AWARE THAT COMPLETE COMPLIANT REPORTING IS A MANDATE NOT AN OPTION, AS SUCH ANY DEROGATORY ACCUSATIONS ASSOCIATED WITH A NOT COMPLIANT ALLEGED ACCOUNT MOST DEFINITELY, IS NOT COMPLIANTLY REPORTING ITSELF IF NOT UNPROVEN TO BE TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, TIMELY, MINE, OR MY RESPONSIBILITY.\n

\n

****To begin, I would like to ensure you have and ONLY RETAIN current, TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, and MANDATED REPORTED information per FCRA regulations, any and all others I DEMAND, as is my lawful RIGHT(s) to do so, that you annul any and all potentially deficient information reported of any delinquent and or derogatory conditioned data ,mentioned or not! Let it be noted that I DO NOT AUTHORIZE you to invalidly, non-verifiably, non-compliantly or elsewise misreport any data deficient or is of deceptive misinformation now nor ever. I REQUEST that you please review and ENSURE your adequate and full accordance to the laws upon which govern your practice of reporting consumer credit profiles, including acceptance of alleged verified valid claims from any data furnisher of which might report to you about me and or my credit profile history and or creditworthiness overall. Be evaluate all involved records physically and or require the data furnisher to certify doing such compliantly any and all information but most specifically any and all personal identifier information. Now, drawing from my most recent and past research (and now confident if not complete comprehension), I have discovered that you nor any entity is permitted to keep any non-compliant information, particularly upon it being challenged. The obvious potential ACCOUNT infractions are as follows:\n

Compliant reporting of ONLY TRUE ACCURATE COMPLETE VERIFIABLY VALID and CERTIFIED as such is a MINIMAL REQUISITE of lawful reporting NOT AN OPTIONAL ONE! I would like to forge forward with a righted disputation challenging what likely is an inaccurate, untrue, incomplete, untimely, not compliant, and or possibly not even of my ownership of responsibility allegation of a derogatory item that I see you currently have on my credit report, possibly causing violating infringements and injury to my credibility. Re: Please accept my official written notification that I suspect inappropriate information reporting and I'm seeking clarity to if or not the alleged information injurious to me was done so in accordance with laws and adherent to the mandatorily utilized reporting standards. Dear Sir or Madam,\n \n

\n

I am reaching out to you about information provided that has me concerned that the adequate and necessary ethical and lawful reporting practices did not occur or did so with reckless abandon! With that I am requesting a through investigation into the matter and immediate actions to legally remedy the misreporting(s) discovered, mentioned by me or not! This notice is not an argument against any claims verifiability nor its validation nor is this complaint an acknowledgement that either exists. Rather, this lawful consumer complaint is my contesting versus the data reporting furnisher(s) very conditional privilege to report if unable, unwilling, untimely, and or elsewise deficient in satisfying at least the established minimal requisites for ethical and lawful reporting of consumer information. In this complaint, I here now challenge any such above-mentioned data reporter and or accepting repository of reported claims to prove by document demonstration that entity's confirmed certifiable compliant reporting process, including no less than the perfect adhering to the mandatory utilized and perfect complete Metro 2 data-filled field formatted reporting standards, of which there cannot exist a deviation from nor omitting from without jeopardizing the integrity of claims made. Questionable reporting fails the federal requirements for all claims to be factually of a maximum possible accuracy AND a maximum possible completeness, for the entity(ies) involved could have and should have been certifiably compliant in its reporting. Non-compliant reporting of even verifiable and or validatable claims fails the CDIA's enacted CRRG minimums for adequately reported consumer credit information. Collectability does not equate necessarily to reportability. Compliance of reporting standards is not optional, but rather a mandatory condition for lawful and ethical reporting. My complaint is that there is not sufficient evidence proving the reported claims of derogatoriness or delinquencies versus me are confirmed to be compliant in its reporting, a requisite to report. \n

It is the claim's report- ability here contested, and my challenge is for proof undeniable of certifiably compliant reporting practices for which you have surmised is satisfying minimal criteria for retained reporting privilege. It is the apparent deficit of evident Fair Reporting Practices that is of my concern and the genesis of my calling into question the claim(s) above identified made versus me. So let it be in clarity that due to my concerns relating to your apparent substantial deviations from the mandatorily perfect, complete, and utilized Metro 2 Data-filled field formatted reporting standards that I here and now forward this written challenge. Understand please that my challenge is to any and each related data reporting furnisher(s) as well as each and any data receiving repository (i.e. CRA) to demonstrate physically (via required documentation) the afore and below-mentioned and each and any other required evidence confirming the absolute adherence to each and any of the requisite certifiably compliant reporting process(es) to include adequate precision in total undeniable accordance with and to the CDIA's most recent announced reporting industry standards ( i.e. the near annual CRRG), each and any of the applicable federal regulations, and each and all applicable state laws and or standards, mentioned or not. Supposed or even legitimate ignorance of the necessary adequate applications of the obligatory measures in relationship to all prospective menacing reported claims lending detriment to my credit worthiness does not alleviate any entity from each and any requisites of reporting mandates. Unless of a circumstance I am unaware, there is no RIGHT TO REPORT, RATHER THERE EXISTS A RIGHT TO COLLECT (OF WHICH IS NOT CONTESTED HERE), YET THERE IS BUT A VERY CONDITIONAL PRIVILEGE TO REPORT IF AND ONLY IF THE REPORTING IS SATISFACTORY OF THE VERY SPECIFIC CRITERIA TO REPORT in full compliance ETHICALLY AND LAWFULLY. Is it not true that no entity can report nor accept reporting NON-COMPLIANTLY, be it done willfully or in ignorance? In obviousness, the minimal standard is to report and or to only accept reporting of claim(s) made only to a degree of MAXIMUM possible accuracy AND completion within perfect fidelity to the mandated Metro 2 format reporting standards as exactly outlined in the CDIA's most current CRRG. Again, per above noted minimal criterion to report, there can be no deviation from the reporting standards and equally it must be in uniform alignment in the claim(s)' reporting accuracy and completion to a degree of no lesser than that of a MAXIMUM POSSIBILITY. I remind you, the data reporting furnisher(s) and each and any receiving repository could have and SHOULD HAVE BEEN CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT IN THE REPORTING PROCESS(ES). IN FACT, PER CDIA written \n CRRG 3-4, \"ANY DEVIATION FROM THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA\n \".\n \n

RE: Notice of consumer enactment of RIGHT to contest unproven or not demonstrated certifiably compliantly reported allegations of derogatoriness\n .\n \n

To Whom it might concerns \n CAPABLE of making any adequate modification(s) and or removal(s) to retain compliant reporting\n \n ,\n \n

\n

To begin I remind you of the FURNISHER RULE\n . Furnishers are governed by the FURNISHER RULE (see Regulation V Promulgated by the CFPB under the FCRA), which requires furnishers to: (1) Furnish information that is ACCURATE and COMPLETE, and (2) Investigate consumer complaints\n about the accuracy of the information they provide.\n \n

\n

The following claim(s) injuriously reported versus me has NOT been yet confirmed to be CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT to mandated reporting standards and or has yet been demonstrated to NOT FAIL to meet at least the minimal federal requirements to report ethically much less legally. As being true, since the PRIVILEGE TO REPORT is NOT nor can be ASSUMED, I here now enact my consumer RIGHT to CONTEST the report-ability of each noted unconfirmed claim \n below and my CHALLENGE is for the demonstration of a factual and testifiable certified compliant reporting process and that the mandated adherence to the perfect Metro 2 formatted reporting standard was in fact obeyed! ANY DEVIATION \n including omittance of requirements brings to concern reporting of information not ethically and or even unlawfully done so. Your PRIVILEGE to report is NOT SUSTAINED so immediately act to become most compliant. To do so,\n Delete NOW or document the confirmed CERTIFIABLE and COMPLIANTLY REPORTED facts for each, any, and all:\n

\n

MY NOTIFICATION TO YOU NOW serves to debunk the possibility that you DO NOT KNOW that you need to ensure all claims are adequately factual and certifiably reported to include in the mandated Metro 2 format reporting standard. For any alleged account, I request that you validate the requisite physically verifiable proof of permissible purpose for any of the alleged delinquent/derogatory account’s allegations of inquiry(ies), TRUE OR NOT! I am willfully allowing you as long as 30 days to complete your requisite reasonable investigation to either confirm claim’s current reporting validity and compliance OR REMOVE FROM REPORTING the matter here now challenged. Please understand that you are NOT OF PRIVILEGE to report (or to continue to do so) ANY not confirmed certifiable compliantly alleged claim that is any or all of being physically untrue, inaccurate, inadequately complete in its reporting, untimely, deficient evidence of ownership of responsibility, and or unverified else wise and or any question as to reported claim(s)’ validity EXACTLY AS REPORTED. CONTINUED non-compliant reporting will be assumed WILLFUL NONCOMPLIANCE \n much less NEGLIGENT NON-COMPLIANCE (even if done in ignorance of requirements) , in violation of FCRA 1681(n) \n and or 1681(o) let alone apparent misapplication of FCRA 1681(e) \n and or FCRA 1681 (i) and participating in the deficient following of FCRA 1681 (s)(2)\n . NO ENTITY is of RIGHT to report, and the PRIVILEGE to report is CONDITIONAL \n upon certifiably COMPLIANT adherence to any and all applicable state and federal reporting laws even the mandatorily utilized Metro 2 Compliant reporting standards as prescribed in the annually CRRG. I also\n request and AUTHORIZE for you to mail me physical documented proof of your adequate action(s) and my then updated personal credit report following your correction(s). To date, Your company continues to participate in the deficient reporting of supposed derogatory item(s) versus me that is/are obviously DEVIANT from writ minimal requisite standards of ethical and lawful reporting. To date any such claim(s) lack perfect demonstrated, complete, and certifiably compliant claims not contestable. Due to the aforementioned unproven and severely deficient claim(s) of minimal and mandatory validated allegations in full compliance of reporting, I here now enact MY CONSUMER RIGHT to DENOUNCE YOUR PRIVILEGE TO REPORT any claim(s) in deviation of reporting standards (Metro 2 Compliance). Your unfair and illegal mis-reporting is severely hurting my credit reputation and good name, and additionally is causing me unjust stress as well as unnecessary real and emotional injuries in dire infraction of lawful reporting practices. I have worked continuously hard to clear my name and my credit reports of the contested and obviously negligently reported credit item(s) with previous consumer complaints to your company identifying this item’s potential as being significantly unsubstantiated in its current reported status and no absoluteness even any declaration that item is not of my ownership nor responsibility, being deviant of standards is it possibly also invalid? Regardless, any claim(s) not adequately confirmed AND demonstrated to be reported in full accordance with any and all applicable state and federal regulatory requirements and standards even are undoubtedly not compliantly reported therefore UNLAWFULLY REPORTED in dire infraction of any PRIVILEGE of reporting you assume. Even if I am not of such assumption as victim, there is undeniable evidence that Identity theft is a growing problem in the United States, and it can happen to anyone, even yourself or anyone on globe as proof of recent breaches at Equifax, TransUnion, Facebook, AOL, Yahoo, the VA, and AT&T have clearly demonstrated let alone me especially if you continue to report deficient of regulations and standards established and assumed obeyed! AGAIN, I ask (actually DEMAND IN WRITING) that you please review any and all reported claims of negativity alleged versus me and do so with intent of clarity, closely and carefully ensuring any claim’s fact of ownership, responsibility and every single aspect of reported claims related to this item, mentioned or not. Per 2011-2020 CRRG, d.n.p. 3-4, “Any deviation from these standards jeopardizes the integrity of the data” so REMOVE NOW any claim not CONFIRMED to be CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT in its ethical and lawful reporting. I do NOT authorize ANY ENTITY continued PRIVILEGE to report deficient of requisites NOR with ANY DEVIATION of the established STANDARD(s) of lawful reporting, today it is the Metro 2 Data Filled Formatted reporting standards. Please also be aware that if this currently seeming unjustified negative mark remains reported on my credit reports for any extended time beyond your required timely removal upon notice of this valid written complaint and if potentially cause is due to fraud and or identity theft you MUST DO SO within 4 business days of your receipt of this notice of non-compliant reporting (be it from willful dereliction of reporting, in unintentional yet ignorance of reporting, or be it potentially the result of a mixed account, mixed report, merged report, and or even potentially act of fraud and certainly if without testimonial and irrefutable proof that I do owe this item, is a then undoubtedly a significant violation of the FCRA & FDCPA, let alone any standard of compliant reporting such as the mandatory certified perfect and complete METRO 2 FORMAT reporting compliance. Therefore, I demand that you permanently delete all fraudulent aspects of this fraudulent item as it clearly was opened as a result of fraud and or identity theft and is of an ownership and responsibility OTHER THAN MY OWN. Failure to respond satisfactorily within 30 days of receipt of this notice AND REMOVE FROM REPORTING WITHIN FOUR DAYS OF RECEIPT will in fact result in my filing of a small claims action against your company, seeking $5,000 per violation for: (1) Defamation (2) Negligent Enablement of Identity Fraud (3) Violations of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (4) Failure to report in a mandatory PERFECT AND CERTIFIED COMPLIANT manner.\n

\n

YOU MUST ERADICATE claim and any related delinquencies and or derogatoriness ASAP! I am a litigious consumer and fully intend on pursuing litigation in this matter to enforce my rights under the FCRA. I demand the notated item to be irrefutably verified and validated in its reality and its complete compliance of reporting (even to the mandatory Metro 2 format perfection and completeness) or deleted immediately. I understand that per the Fair Credit Reporting Act, you are required to notify me of your investigation results within 30 days. I look forward to receiving an updated copy of my credit report reflecting the above correction.\n \n \n

>If you fail to provide any of the information or documentation I have asked for, please say why. If you do not provide it, and do not adequately explain why, I will understand that you are unable to confirm or document your claims.\n

\n

>I would like more information about your firm before I discuss the debt with any entity be it you or not. Does the supposed collecting entity have a debt collection license from my state, if required? If not, say why not. If so, provide the date of the license, the name on the license, the license number, and the name, address and telephone number of the state agency issuing the license.\n

\n

>If the supposed collecting entity is one such that is, has, or will be attempting to contact me from a place outside my state, does such firm have a debt collection license from that place? If so, did such evidence get provided such as even the date of the license, the name(s) on the license, the license number(s), and the name(s), address(es) and telephone number(s) of the most appropriate and applicable state agency issuing the license?\n

","\n

Not an entity today exists that can certifiably ignore its mandated obligations to report compliantly and to 100% truth, correctness, completeness, timeliness, and documented Irrefutable proof of ownership and responsibility of any allegations of adverse aspects to an account or of a derogatory account in and of itself. According to Regulation V 1022.42: Reasonable policies and procedures concerning the accuracy and integrity of furnished information. Furnishers must have strong policies in place to have the highest possible accuracy, but it has not been done in this case. In addition, a per the metro 2 data formatted standards of legal reporting of consumer accounts and profile history and per the Fair Credit reporting act, namely section 609 a1A, it is in CLARITY that you are MANDATED to retain COMPLIANCE at all times, particularly upon notification by an infringed consumer that you are deficient of your requisites to report adequately and a challenge (or dispute) is lodged versus any data information previously NOT proven PHYSICALLY to be armed valid or is UNABLE to be demonstrated as true, accurate, complete, timely, and otherwise fully compliant to laws upon a documented declaration of concern by the consumer. I demand, as is MY RIGHTS to do so and as is your REQUIREMENT to satisfy, for you to ANNUL by deletion or removal any and all allegations DEFICIENT of PHYSICAL EVIDENCE OF COMPLIANCE to reporting laws much less verified and valid. If you are unwilling or UNABLE to do so in a federally defined TIMELY manner you MUST rectify your infractions by RETURNING TO or retaining federal reporting COMPLIANCE TODAY, even RIGHT NOW, .As such, I DEMAND that you CERTIFICATE the verification and validity of the following claims or DELETE NOW: Since the accounts have NOT been shown by you to be properly verified, I demand the accounts listed herein be removed immediately. \n Make no mistake, I intend on pursuing all available remedies under Federal Law to enforce my rights. Failing to remove any and all not compliant and or any and all unverified accounts is damaging my creditworthiness and reputation\n on a continued basis, such that I will deem purposeful, injurious and in need to seek juris rectification. Since the accounts have NOT been shown by you to be properly verified, I demand the accounts listed herein be removed immediately. The FOLLOWING reporting derogatory allegations of information are either UNTRUE, INCORRECT, INCOMPLETE, UNTIMELY, NOT MINE, NOT MY RESPONSIBILITY, or otherwise NOT PROVEN COMPLIANT to regulatory federal reporting laws and or standards and MUST be eradicated immediately, do so TODAY, even right NOW!\n

\n

The obvious infractions are as follows: Please delete this erroneous information immediately or else wise adequately PHYSICALLY VERFIFY PROPERLY the absolute factual documented TRUTH, ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, VALIDITY, METRO 2 FORMAT REPORTING and any and all aspects of mandatorily CERTIFIED COMPLIANCE OF REPORTING otherwise be it mentioned or be it now. Should you be deficient or unwilling to timely demonstrate proof as required I DEMAND that you REMOVE THE FOLLOWING items of reporting:\n

","\n

Please take time and effort to find a copy of my three most recent previous written demands forwarded to you to have unverified accounts removed from my credit report. To date, you have willfully failed to provide me with any information that you are required to under Federal Law. A mere statement that these items are “reported correctly” and therefore “verified” is insufficient. You have not identified who verified the accuracy of the information or how they were verified. Only an individual in your company with firsthand knowledge must be able to, under penalties of perjury in a Court of law testify that they themselves looked at the physical documents necessary to verify the account. When sued, you will also have to explain to the Judge why you failed to provide the documentation as requested by me on several occasions and in full knowledge that it was a violation of law, all of which subjects you to punitive damages as well. The accounts listed below that remain on my credit report are in violation of 15 USC Section 1681. A copy of this letter and all previous letters have been sent to the Consumer Financial Protective Bureau and will be submitted as evidence in a trial should you fail to comply with this Final Offer. Since the accounts have NOT been shown by you to be properly verified, I demand the accounts listed herein be removed immediately. \n Make no mistake, I intend on pursuing all available remedies under Federal Law to enforce my rights. Failing to remove any and all not compliant and or any and all unverified accounts is damaging my creditworthiness and reputation\n on a continued basis, such that I will deem purposeful injurious and in need to seek juris rectification. Since the accounts have NOT been shown by you to be properly verified, I demand the accounts listed herein be removed immediately. The FOLLOWING reporting derogatory allegations of information are either UNTRUE, INCORRECT, INCOMPLETE, UNTIMELY, NOT MINE, NOT MY RESPONSIBILITY, or otherwise NOT PROVEN COMPLIANT to regulatory federal reporting laws and or standards and MUST be eradicated immediately, do so TODAY, even right NOW! The obvious infractions are as follows:\n

\n

Please delete this erroneous information immediately or else wise adequately PHYSICALLY VERFIFY PROPERLY the absolute factual documented TRUTH, ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, VALIDITY, METRO 2 FORMAT REPORTING and any and all aspects of mandatorily CERTIFIED COMPLIANCE OF REPORTING otherwise be it mentioned or be it now. Should you be deficient or unwilling to timely demonstrate proof as required I DEMAND that you REMOVE THE FOLLOWING items of reporting\n :\n

","\n

I have recently been informed that there is negative information reported by the below data reporting furnishers concerning me or some individual potentially mistook as being me. I am referencing files you maintain under my social\n security number. The below denoted item(s) reported by the also detailed accusing data reporting furnisher(s) are contentious at best given fact there appears at least 1+ deviations from the established credit reporting industry’s\n expected abided by reporting standards for consumer credit portfolios, namely that of the mandatorily utilized Metro 2 Data-filled Field Formatted reporting standards of which the CDIA signaled “ANY DEVIATION FROM THESE STANDARDS\n JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA” which sure seems akin to the federal regulatory reporting mandates (LAWS) which hint to requisite that any prospective reporters of information MUST HAVE in play procedures, processes\n and practices to ensure that any allegations made are done so to a degree no lesser than that of a MAXIMUM POSSIBLE ACCURACY and a MAXIMUM POSSIBLE COMPLETENESS. It is NOT A STRETCH to suggest that entities failing to meet\n BOTH the regulatory requisites AND have also failed to act with certifiable compliant reporting procedures, processes and or practices in conjunction with the above noted CDIA statement in concern to non-compliance of the standards\n established surely it is reasonable to wonder if a reporter has acted so egregious to have potentially eradicated their assumed-privilege to report data of derogatory nature versus a consumer. In similar question would be the\n curiosity if or not such a violating entity has acted in willful even unlawful disregard of consumer rights and their own regulatory responsibilities. Did the reporting party(ies) act in willful negligence? Or in reckless abandon\n if not in absolute ignorance despite certainty of fact that any each and all reporters know better or SHOULD HAVE KNOWN BETTER being that reporting standards were in fact established for the very purpose to better ensure a\n reporter’s greater likelihood of successfully abiding by the state and federal reporting requirements of which they are under absolute obligation to obey. With the above statements and considerations please act now to remove\n from reporting any derogatory claim forwarded by any below listed entity of which failed to report adequately by each the regulatory requisites as well as the established and mandatorily utilized credit reporting industry’s\n Metro 2 Compliance standards:

","\n

I t i s obvious the unjust significant injurious status of this claim as reported to my person, character, emotional well-being, and financial reputation let alone my otherwise fair creditworthiness. \n \n \n Your requisite investigation of my complaint and notification of my here now contesting of your otherwise assumed privilege to report MUST BE ethical, lawful, and otherwise perfectly COMPLIANT to all requisites of any entity's presupposed desire to report. It is the claim's report- ability here contested, and my challenge is for proof undeniable of certifiably compliant reporting practices for which you have surmised is satisfying of minimal criteria for retained reporting privilege. The RIGHT for an owed party to lawfully attempt collection is NOT disputed, that is NOT my argument. It is the apparent deficit of evident Fair Reporting Practices that is of my concern and the genesis of my calling into question the claim(s) above identified made versus me. So let it be in clarity that due to my concerns relating to your apparent substantial deviations from the mandatorily perfect, complete, and utilized Metro 2 Data-filled field formatted reporting standards that I here and now forward this written challenge. Understand please that my challenge is to any and each related data reporting furnisher(s) as well as each and any data receiving repository (i.e. CRA) to demonstrate physically (via required documentation) the afore and below-mentioned and each and any other required evidence confirming the absolute adherence to each and any of therequisite certifiably compliant reporting process(es) to include adequateprecision in total undeniable accordance with and to the CDIA's most recent announced reporting industry standards ( i.e. the near annual CRRG), each and any of the applicable federal regulations, and each and all applicable state laws and or standards, mentioned or not. Supposed or even legitimate ignorance of the necessary adequate applications of the obligatory measures in relationship to all prospective menacing reported claims lending detriment to my credit worthiness does not alleviate any entity from each and any requisites of reporting mandates. Unless of a circumstance I am unaware, there is no RIGHT TO REPORT, RATHER THERE EXISTS A RIGHT TO COLLECT (OF WHICH IS NOT CONTESTED HERE), YET THERE IS BUT A VERY CONDITIONAL PRIVILEGE TO REPORT IF AND ONLY IF THE REPORTING IS SATISFACTORY OF THE VERY SPECIFIC CRITERIA TO REPORT in full compliance ETHICALLY AND LAWFULLY. Is it not true that no entity can report nor accept reporting NON-COMPLIANTLY, be it done willfully or in ignorance? In obviousness, the minimal standard is to report and or to only accept reporting of claim(s) made only to a degree of MAXIMUM possible accuracy AND completion within perfect fidelity to the mandated Metro 2 format reporting standards as exactly outlined in the CDIA's most current CRRG. Again, per above noted minimal criterion to report, there can be no deviation from the reporting standards and equally it must be in uniform alignment in the claim(s)' reporting accuracy and completion to a degree of no lesser than that of a MAXIMUM POSSIBILITY. I remind you, the data reporting furnisher(s) and each and any receiving repository could have and SHOULD HAVE BEEN CERTIFIABLY COMPLIANT IN THE REPORTING PROCESS(ES). IN FACT, PER CDIA written \n CRRG 3-4\n , \"ANY DEVIATION FROM THESE STANDARDS JEOPARDIZES THE INTEGRITY OF THE DATA\n \".\n \n

\n

This SHALL OCCUR even above and beyond your apparent misapplication of, willfully ignorance of, or else wise reckless negligence as related to your reporting practices and claims, so ensure to note any deviations to include but not limited to the following ailments as grounds for adequate eradication of claim’s report-ability:\n
