{{ba1}}\n \n

\n

SUBJECT: IMMEDIATE REMOVAL OF NON-COMPLIANT CHARGE-OFF – ACCOUNT(s) Below – LEGAL VIOLATIONS DETECTED

\n

To Whom It May Concern:

\n

BE FOREWARNED: I am an unrelenting advocate for my rights, armed with mastery over the Truth in Lending Act (TILA), the Equal Credit Opportunity Act (ECOA), the Consumer Data Industry Association (CDIA) Metro 2 standards, and all laws governing your reckless reporting practices. I wield compliance as my shield and litigation as my spear. You are hereby ordered to DELETE THE CHARGE-OFF associated with Account(s) Listed below from my credit file across ALL consumer reporting agencies (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)—effective\n IMMEDIATELY—or face a barrage of legal consequences that will dismantle your operation. Your reporting is a blatant violation of federal law and Metro 2 mandates, and I will not permit it to stand.

\n

This serves as your OFFICIAL DIRECTIVE TO CEASE AND DESIST all reporting and collection efforts tied to this baseless charge-off. The CDIA Metro 2 reporting framework demands a pristine, 426-character\n Base Segment and Enhanced Trailing Segment for every tradeline, encompassing—at minimum—the FULL five-field CONSUMER IDENTIFICATION DATA (name, Social Security Number, date of birth, address, phone number)\n and a DETAILED, ACCURATE, SUBSTANTIATED account history, including original terms, payment records, and status codes. Your charge-off entry is defective—marred by [insert errors, e.g., “inaccurate status\n coding,” “missing original loan terms,” “unverified debt origin”]—and fails to include the mandatory Enhanced Trailing Segment, validated in a SECURE DATA TRANSMISSION PROTOCOL. Metro 2 standards explicitly\n state that ANY incomplete, unverified, or placeholder data (e.g., ‘N/A,’ ‘XXX,’ repeating digits) renders the tradeline INVALID and subject to IMMEDIATE DELETION. Your noncompliance is indefensible—remove\n it NOW.

\n

Under the Truth in Lending Act (15 U.S.C. § 1601 et seq.), you are required to disclose and substantiate all credit terms and statuses with absolute clarity and accuracy. Reporting a charge-off\n without providing me the original credit agreement, payment history, and proof of default—aligned with TILA’s transparency mandates—violates your duty to furnish lawful data. Furthermore, the Equal Credit Opportunity Act (15 U.S.C. § 1691) prohibits discriminatory or unfair credit reporting practices, and your failure to validate this charge-off with Metro 2-compliant documentation suggests a breach of ECOA’s requirement for equitable treatment.\n Per the CDIA Metro 2 Manual (2023 Edition), any data furnisher must update tradelines in real-time with a FULLY POPULATED K2 SEGMENT (account status) and J2 SEGMENT (compliance condition\n code)—your omission of these fields nullifies the entry entirely.

\n

I ISSUE THIS IRREVOCABLE DEMAND:

\n
    \n
  1. \n

    ERADICATE THE CHARGE-OFF from Account # [Insert Account Number] across all CRAs, effective IMMEDIATELY, due to your egregious Metro 2 and statutory violations.

    \n
    2. \n
  2. \n

    SUBMIT SWORN AFFIRMATION within 7 business days, certifying under penalty of law that you have manually audited and removed this tradeline in full compliance with TILA, ECOA, and Metro\n 2 standards.

    \n
    3. \n
  3. \n

    TERMINATE ALL COLLECTION ACTIVITY—your illegal reporting obliterates any pretense of enforceability.

    \n
    4. \n
\n

{{#accounts}}
Creditor alleging the negative item # {{index}} and alleged account number and or description :
Account Name #{{index}} : {{account name}}
Account Number # : {{account number}}
\n {{#paraghraphs}}{{randomcoffspin}}{{/paraghraphs}}
{{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}{{/accounts}}\n

\n

The alleged delinquency and or the derogatory claim(s) of information above listed is, as reported, deficient of the minimally required and mandatorily demonstrated document proof evidencing of the claim's current certifiable compliant reporting of negativity(ies) that are in fact also physically verified confirmed and factually true, correct, timely, adequately complete, and or ELSEWISE undoubtable in its validated claims. Being deficient, I DEMAND it and all its aspects of negativity alleged be DELETED FULLY today, even right now so to return to and or retain ethical and lawful reporting requisites and the mandated or elsewise established standards of adequate consumer credit reporting practices.\n \n \n

\n

{{#tables}}{{.}}
Note this is a discontinuance of reporting request. Please attest by document demonstration the confirmation of the above claim’s certitude of all facts alleged to have been physically verified and validated even to every notation, all dates and balances, any compliance condition code(s), and or any aspect(s) for any necessary metro 2 compliance segment and field(s). This claim as reported , as displayed hints to at least the following compliance-based issues.{{/tables}}\n

\n

{{#bankruptcys}}{{.}}

\n

{{/bankruptcys}}

\n

I hereby demand the following immediate actions:

\n

Your refusal to provide a Metro 2-compliant validation of this charge-off—despite my inherent right to accurate reporting—triggers liability under TILA Regulation Z (12 CFR § 1026), which demands precise disclosure\n of credit data, and ECOA Regulation B (12 CFR § 1002), which requires fair and verifiable credit practices. Be advised: I will escalate this to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB),\n the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC), and private counsel, pursuing statutory damages of up to $5,000 per TILA violation, ECOA penalties, and full legal costs.

\n

You have 10 calendar days from receipt to comply—or else. Noncompliance will unleash a formal CRA dispute, regulatory complaints, and a lawsuit that will crush your defenses. Consult your legal\n team NOW—they’ll confirm your peril. This is your last chance to act.

\n

Govern yourself accordingly,

My CURRENT True legal FIRST & LAST name,Street NUMBER & Street NAME ,CITY and STATE is & ONLY IS EXACTLY as Follows: \n \n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}} 
{{address}}\n \n \n

\n

{{poaid}}

\n

{{poa3id}}

\n

\n

\n

Box 740256\nAtlanta, GA 30374"},"createdAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:04.000Z","updatedAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:04.000Z"},{"id":27,"name":"GROK\n LATE","file_name":"GROK LATE","file_html":"\n

Today is {{todaydate}}
\n Credit Report Data Source Credit Report From IdentityIQ 3-in-1 Report\n

\n

My CURRENT True legal FIRST & LAST name,
\n {{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n

\n

Street NUMBER & Street NAME ,CITY and STATE is & ONLY IS EXACTLY as Follows:
{{address}}
\n
My Date of Birth is and only is {{dob}}\n

\n

My Full Social is exactly {{ssn}} \n \n

\n \n MY PERSONAL 20-digit TRACKING NUMBER IS: \n \n {{tracking}}
\n \n Destination of my Consumer Complaint is \n \n \n

\n

{{ba1}}\n \n

\n

\n

SUBJECT: IMMEDIATE REMOVAL OF INACCURATE LATE PAYMENTS – ACCOUNT(s) Below – METRO 2 VIOLATIONS DETECTED

\n

To Whom It May Concern:

\n

TAKE NOTICE: I am an uncompromising enforcer of my consumer rights, wielding expert knowledge of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA), the Consumer Data Industry Association (CDIA) Metro 2 reporting standards, and all federal regulations governing your flawed credit reporting practices. I do not bluff—noncompliance will be met with swift, decisive legal action. You are hereby directed to REMOVE ALL LATE PAYMENT NOTATIONS tied to Account(s) Listed Below—a closed, fully paid-off credit card—from my credit reports at Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion,\n effective IMMEDIATELY. Your inconsistent and inaccurate reporting of alleged late payments is a clear violation of Metro 2 standards and federal law, and I demand its eradication without delay.

\n

This letter is your FORMAL ORDER TO CEASE AND DESIST reporting these erroneous late payments. The account in question, closed and settled with a zero balance has been marred by inconsistent\n late payment markers across reporting periods— The CDIA Metro 2 format mandates a precise, fully populated Base Segment and Account Status Segment (e.g., K1/K2 fields) for every tradeline, requiring COMPLETE\n PAYMENT HISTORY CODES (Field 17A) and DATE OF LAST PAYMENT (Field 11) to reflect accurate, consistent, and verifiable data. Your failure to align these fields with the account’s paid-off status—coupled with\n your haphazard reporting of late payments—violates Metro 2’s requirement for technical accuracy and uniformity across all CRAs.

\n

Under FCRA Section 623(a)(1)(A) (15 U.S.C. § 1681s-2(a)), you are legally obligated to report only information that is accurate, complete, and substantiated with documentary evidence—such as\n original payment records, statements, and account closure confirmation—which you have failed to provide. The Metro 2 Manual (2023 Edition) stipulates that a closed, paid-off account must be coded as Condition Code ‘13’ (Paid or Closed Account/Zero Balance) with NO conflicting delinquency markers unless fully validated. Your inconsistent late payment notations—lacking a corresponding Payment Rating (Field 17B) tied to specific dates and proof—render this tradeline\n non-compliant and subject to immediate deletion. Furthermore, Metro 2 prohibits the use of generic or unverified data in the Payment History Profile (PHP), and any discrepancy\n across CRA reports signals a breach of your duty to ensure uniform accuracy.

\n

\n
\n

REMOVE FROM REPORTING NOW ANY OF THE INJURIOUS ASPECTS OF ALLEGATIONS or ADJUST TO PAID AS AGREED NEVER LATE for any item BELOW NOTED:
\n \n {{#accounts}}
ALLEGED CREDITOR/ DATA FURNISHER : {{account name}}
\n and ALLEGED ACCOUNT #{{index}} : {{account number}}
\n {{#paraghraphs}}{{randomspinlate}}{{/paraghraphs}}{{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}
{{/accounts}}
is possibly unfairly, not certifiably compliant, and or elsewise unlawfully reported. I demand that you \n MODIFY NOW this item alleging Late Payment(s) event as REQUIRED by law! This REQUIRES YOU TO REMOVE FROM REPORTING EACH ANY AND ALL NOT-PROVEN COMPLIANTLY ALLEGED LATE RECORDINGS OR INDICATIONS such that your reporting of my account displays most appropriately or or PAYS AS AGREED, NEVER LATE or PAID AS AGREED NEVER LATE or PAYS AS AGREED, NO LATE PAYMENTS REPORTING or PAID AS AGREED, NO LATE PAYMENTS REPORTED\n or elsewise accurately depicting my true accurate favorable credit worthiness as related to this item of reporting!
{{#paraghraphs}}{{randombottom}}{{/paraghraphs}}\n \n

\n

{{#tables}}{{.}}
Note this is a discontinuance of reporting request. Please attest by document demonstration the confirmation of the above claim’s certitude of all facts alleged to have been physically verified and validated even to every notation, all dates and balances, any compliance condition code(s), and or any aspect(s) for any necessary metro 2 compliance segment and field(s). This claim as reported , as displayed hints to at least the following compliance-based issues.{{/tables}}\n

\n

\n

I DEMAND THE FOLLOWING ACTIONS WITHOUT EXCEPTION:

\n
    \n
  1. \n

    DELETE ALL LATE PAYMENT NOTATIONS from the accounts above across all CRAs, effective IMMEDIATELY, due to your Metro 2 noncompliance and inconsistent reporting.

    \n
    2. \n
  2. \n

    UPDATE THE ACCOUNT STATUS to reflect ‘Closed/Paid in Full’ with a zero balance and NO delinquency history, consistent with Metro 2 Condition Code ‘13’.

    \n
    3. \n
  3. \n

    PROVIDE WRITTEN CONFIRMATION within 7 business days, certifying under oath that you have manually reviewed and corrected this tradeline in full compliance with FCRA and Metro 2 standards.

    \n
    4. \n
\n

Your refusal to rectify this inaccurate reporting—despite the account’s paid-off status—violates FCRA Section 623(a)(2), which mandates prompt correction of errors upon notice, and exposes you\n to liability under 15 U.S.C. § 1681n for willful noncompliance, including statutory damages of $1,000 per violation, punitive damages, and legal fees. Per Metro 2 dispute protocols, failure\n to validate these late payments with a FULLY POPULATED Enhanced Account Segment—submitted via a secure e-Oscar response within 30 days—triggers automatic deletion by the CRAs in my favor. I will ensure this outcome.

\n

You have 15 calendar days from receipt to comply fully. Failure to act will prompt an immediate dispute with all CRAs, a formal complaint to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) and\n Federal Trade Commission (FTC), and a lawsuit to enforce my rights. Consult your legal counsel—they will confirm your vulnerability. This is not a suggestion—it is a mandate.

\n

Sincerely,

\n

CC: Equifax, Experian, TransUnion, CFPB, FTC

\n

In THANKS I close,

My CURRENT True legal FIRST & LAST name,Street NUMBER & Street NAME ,CITY and STATE is & ONLY IS EXACTLY as Follows: \n \n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}} 
{{address}}\n \n \n

\n

{{dlid}}
{{ssnid}}
{{poaid}}

\n

{{poa2id}}
{{poa3id}}

\n

\n

\n

Box 740256\nAtlanta, GA 30374"},"createdAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:04.000Z","updatedAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:04.000Z"},{"id":30,"name":"GROK\n LATE 2","file_name":"GROK LATE 2","file_html":"\n

Today is {{todaydate}}
\n Credit Report Data Source Credit Report From IdentityIQ 3-in-1 Report\n

\n

My CURRENT True legal FIRST & LAST name,
\n {{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n

\n

Street NUMBER & Street NAME ,CITY and STATE is & ONLY IS EXACTLY as Follows:
{{address}}
\n
My Date of Birth is and only is\n {{dob}}\n

\n

My Full Social is exactly {{ssn}} \n \n

\n \n
\n \n Destination of my Consumer Complaint is \n \n \n

\n

{{ba1}}\n \n

\n

\n

To Whom It May Concern:

\n

I am writing to formally dispute the accuracy of information appearing on my credit report under the provisions of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA), 15 U.S.C. § 1681i, which requires consumer reporting agencies\n to conduct a reasonable reinvestigation of disputed information. Specifically, I am challenging the reported late payment on the below-referenced account, which I believe is being reported in violation of\n Metro 2 reporting standards as outlined in the Credit Reporting Resource Guide (CRRG) published by the Consumer Data Industry Association (CDIA).

\n

\n
\n

The late payment in question is listed in the payment history of the below account . This entry is inaccurate and/or incomplete for the following reasons:

\n
    \n
  • \n

    Non-Compliance with Metro 2 Payment History Reporting: Under Metro 2 guidelines, the Payment History Profile (PHP) must accurately reflect the consumer's payment status using specific\n codes (e.g., \"0\" for current, \"1\" for 30-59 days past due). The reported late payment does not align with the Account Status field or the Date of Account Information, suggesting a formatting\n error or failure to update the record properly. If the furnisher (creditor) did not provide complete documentation to support this code, the entry must be deleted as it violates the requirement for\n 100% accuracy and completeness in reporting.

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    Failure to Verify Timeliness and Completeness: Metro 2 requires that all data furnished to credit bureaus be timely, complete, and verifiable. I dispute that the furnisher has provided\n verifiable evidence (such as original payment records or ledgers) confirming the late payment occurred as reported. Without such verification, this constitutes an FCRA violation under § 1681s-2(b),\n which mandates that furnishers investigate disputes and correct or delete inaccurate information.

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    Inconsistency in Reporting Across Bureaus : This late payment is not consistently reported across all three major credit bureaus, indicating a potential error in the furnisher's Metro\n 2 data submission process. Inconsistencies like this undermine the integrity of the report and warrant immediate removal.

    \n


    \n     \n     {{#accounts}}
    ALLEGED CREDITOR/ DATA FURNISHER :     {{account name}}
    \n and ALLEGED ACCOUNT #{{index}} :     {{account number}}
    \n {{#paraghraphs}}{{randomspinlate}}{{/paraghraphs}}{{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}
    \n {{/accounts}}\n
    is possibly unfairly, not certifiably compliant, and or elsewise unlawfully reported. I demand that you \n MODIFY NOW this item alleging Late Payment(s) event as REQUIRED by law! This REQUIRES YOU TO REMOVE FROM REPORTING EACH ANY AND ALL NOT-PROVEN COMPLIANTLY ALLEGED LATE RECORDINGS OR INDICATIONS such that your reporting of my account displays most appropriately or or PAYS AS AGREED, NEVER LATE or PAID AS AGREED NEVER LATE or PAYS AS AGREED, NO LATE PAYMENTS REPORTING or PAID AS AGREED, NO LATE PAYMENTS REPORTED\n or elsewise accurately depicting my true accurate favorable credit worthiness as related to this item of reporting!
    {{#paraghraphs}}{{randombottom}}{{/paraghraphs}}\n \n

    \n
    • \n
\n

{{#tables}}{{.}}
Note this is a discontinuance of reporting request. Please attest by document demonstration the confirmation of the above claim’s certitude of all facts alleged to have been physically verified and validated even to every notation, all dates and balances, any compliance condition code(s), and or any aspect(s) for any necessary metro 2 compliance segment and field(s). This claim as reported , as displayed hints to at least the following compliance-based issues.{{/tables}}\n

\n

Pursuant to FCRA § 1681i(a)(1), you are required to promptly notify the furnisher of this dispute and conduct a reasonable reinvestigation within 30 days. As part of this reinvestigation, I demand the following:

\n
    \n
  • \n

    Provide the method of verification used, including the name and contact information of the person at the furnisher who verified the information, the date of verification, and the specific documents reviewed.

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    Confirm that the furnisher's reporting complies with all Metro 2 fields, including but not limited to the Base Segment (e.g., Account Status, Payment Rating), J1/J2 Segments (if applicable for joint\n accounts), and the 24-month Payment History Profile.

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    If compliance cannot be fully verified or if any aspect of the reporting is found to be non-compliant, delete the late payment notation entirely from my credit report and provide me with an updated copy.

    \n
    • \n
\n

I Failure to comply with these requirements may result in further action, including filing a complaint with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) and pursuing legal remedies for willful\n noncompliance under FCRA § 1681n, which allows for statutory damages, actual damages, punitive damages, and attorney's fees.

\n

I have attached copies of [list any supporting documents, e.g., my recent credit report highlighting the disputed item, payment receipts, or correspondence with the creditor]. Please acknowledge receipt of this\n dispute within 5 business days and provide the results of your reinvestigation in writing.

\n

\n

CC: Equifax, Experian, TransUnion, CFPB, FTC

\n

In THANKS I close,

My CURRENT True legal FIRST & LAST name,Street NUMBER & Street NAME ,CITY and STATE is & ONLY IS EXACTLY as Follows: \n \n

Box 740256\nAtlanta, GA 30374"},"createdAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:05.000Z","updatedAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:05.000Z"},{"id":29,"name":"GROK\n MEDICAL","file_name":"GROK MEDICAL","file_html":"\n

Today Date -- {{todaydate}}\n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}} \n \n \n \n

\n

CURRENT ADDRESS\n \n

\n

{{address}}\n \n \n \n

\n

SSN : \n {{ssn}}\n

\n

Date of Birth : \n {{dob}} \n

\n
\n

\n

Re: Dispute of Medical Collection Account – Metro 2 Compliance and Legal Verification Request

\n

MY PERSONAL 20-digit TRACKING NUMBER IS: \n \n {{tracking}}
\n \n Destination of my Consumer Complaint is \n \n \n

\n

{{ba1}}\n \n

\n

Dear Sir or Madam,

\n

I am writing to formally dispute the accuracy and validity of the medical collection account listed on my credit report under the above-referenced account number, reported by the alleged listed below. Pursuant\n to my rights under federal and state laws, including but not limited to the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA), the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA), the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability\n Act (HIPAA), and Metro 2 compliance standards, I request that you investigate and verify the accuracy, completeness, and compliance of this account’s reporting. I further demand that, if the account cannot\n be fully substantiated as required by law, it be promptly deleted from my credit report.

\n

\n

{{#accounts}}\n \n

\n

Medical Creditor #{{index}} : {{account name}}\n \n \n

\n

Account #{{index}} ALLEGED : {{account number}}\n \n \n

\n

{{#paraghraphs}}{{randomgenspin}}{{/paraghraphs}}\n

\n

{{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}{{/accounts}}\n \n \n

\n

\n

This medical collection account is inaccurate, incomplete, or unverifiable for the following reasons:

\n
    \n
  1. \n

    “I was never properly notified of this debt prior to its reporting, in violation of FDCPA § 809(a).”

    \n
    2. \n
  2. \n

    “The amount reported does not match my records or statements from the healthcare provider.”

    \n
    3. \n
  3. \n

    \"This debt may be related to a medical service covered by insurance, which has not been properly adjudicated.”

    \n
    4. \n
  4. \n

    “The reporting lacks sufficient detail to confirm its validity, such as dates of service or provider information.”

    \n
    5. \n
\n

Legal and Metro 2 Compliance Requests

\n

Under the FCRA (15 U.S.C. § 1681i), you are required to conduct a reasonable investigation of disputed information and delete any item that cannot be verified as accurate and complete. Additionally, as a consumer\n reporting agency (CRA), you must ensure that all data furnished complies with the Metro 2 Format Reporting Standards established by the Consumer Data Industry Association (CDIA). I request the following:

\n
    \n
  1. \n

    Metro 2 Compliance Verification: Provide evidence that this account has been reported in full compliance with all 46 Metro 2 fields, including but not limited to the Date of First Delinquency,\n Account Status, Payment History, and Portfolio Type. Any deviation from these standards renders the reporting non-compliant and subject to removal under FCRA § 1681e(b).

    \n
    2. \n
  2. \n

    Debt Validation: Pursuant to FDCPA § 809(b), I request that the collection agency validate this debt with original documentation, including the healthcare provider’s billing statement,\n proof of service, and evidence of my liability. If this has not been provided to me prior to reporting, the CRA and data furnisher may be in violation of FDCPA § 809(a).

    \n
    3. \n
  3. \n

    HIPAA Compliance: As this is a medical debt, I request confirmation that the reporting of this account complies with HIPAA privacy regulations (45 CFR § 164.502). Disclosure of protected\n health information without my authorization may constitute a violation, further invalidating this entry.

    \n
    4. \n
  4. \n

    Timeliness and Accuracy: Under FCRA § 1681c(a)(4), derogatory information must be reported accurately and within the allowable 7-year period from the Date of First Delinquency. I request\n documentation verifying the correct date and compliance with this statute.

    \n
    5. \n
  5. \n

    No Surprises Act (if applicable): If this debt stems from an out-of-network medical service after January 1, 2022, I request confirmation that the billing complies with the No Surprises\n Act (42 U.S.C. § 300gg-111). Any violation may render the debt unenforceable and improperly reported.

    \n
    6. \n
\n

Action Requested

\n

If the data furnisher or CRA cannot provide full documentation proving that this account is:

\n
    \n
  • \n

    Factually accurate,

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    Reported in compliance with Metro 2 standards,

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    Validated under FDCPA requirements,

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    Compliant with HIPAA privacy rules, and

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    Within FCRA reporting timelines,

    \n
    • \n
\n

then I demand that this account be immediately deleted from my credit report across all bureaus, pursuant to FCRA § 1681i(a)(5)(A). Additionally, if the investigation exceeds the 30-day period\n mandated by FCRA § 1681i(a)(1), I expect the item to be removed as unverifiable.

\n

Enclosures and Mailing Instructions

\n

Enclosed, please find copies of:

\n
    \n
  • \n

    My identification (e.g., driver’s license or utility bill)

    \n
    • \n
  • \n

    A copy of my credit report highlighting the disputed account

    \n

    \n
    • \n
\n

Please conduct your investigation and send me written confirmation of the results, including an updated credit report, to the address listed above. To ensure proper tracking, I am sending this letter via Certified\n Mail with Return Receipt Requested.

\n

\n

Notice of Potential Liability

\n

Failure to comply with the above legal obligations may result in my filing a complaint with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) and pursuing further action for violations of federal law, including\n but not limited to FCRA § 1681n (civil liability for willful noncompliance) and § 1681o (negligent noncompliance).

\n

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. I look forward to your response within the statutory 30-day period.

\n

\n

MY PERSONAL 20-digit TRACKING NUMBER IS: {{tracking}}

\n

My CURRENT True legal FIRST & LAST name,Street NUMBER & Street NAME ,CITY and STATE is & ONLY IS EXACTLY as Follows: {{firstname}} {{lastname}} \n

\n

{{address}}\n \n \n \n

\n

{{dlid}}
{{ssnid}}
{{poaid}}
{{poa2id}}
{{poa3id}}

","tu":{"ba1":"TransUnion \nPO Box 2000 \nChester, PA 19016"},"ex":{"ba1":"Experian\nP.O. Box 9701\nAllen,TX\n 75013"},"paraghraphs":[],"eq":{"ba1":"Equifax\nP.O. Box 740256\nAtlanta, GA 30374"},"createdAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:05.000Z","updatedAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:05.000Z"},{"id":39,"name":"Lates on Collection","file_name":"Lates\n on Collection","file_html":"\n

Date : {{todaydate}}

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}
{{address}}

\n

DOB : {{dob}} SSN : {{ssn}}

\n

Dear : {{ba1}}

\n

\n
\n

\n

I am writing to formally dispute inaccurate and misleading information appearing on my credit report, in violation of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).

\n

\n

The account in question is reported and The furnisher is reporting “late payments” or a monthly payment history on this account that is in Collection (Not the Original Creditor)

\n

{{#accounts}}
Creditor alleging the negative item # {{index}} and alleged account number and or description :
Account Name #{{index}} : {{account name}}
Account Number # : {{account number}}
\n {{#paraghraphs}}{{randomcoffspin}}{{/paraghraphs}}\n {{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}{{/accounts}}\n

\n

{{#tables}}{{.}}
Note this is a discontinuance of reporting request. Please attest by document demonstration the confirmation of the above claim’s certitude of all facts alleged to have been physically verified and validated even to every notation, all dates and balances, any compliance condition code(s), and or any aspect(s) for any necessary metro 2 compliance segment and field(s). This claim as reported , as displayed hints to at least the following compliance-based issues.{{/tables}}\n

\n

This information is factually inaccurate and misleading for the following reasons:

\n
    \n
  1. \n

    Once a debt is charged off or placed for collection, it is no longer an active credit account and therefore cannot accrue new “late payments.”

    \n
    2. \n
  2. \n

    Reporting ongoing delinquencies suggests a continuing payment relationship, which is false and constitutes the reporting of inaccurate information under 15 U.S.C. §1681s-2(a)(1)(A) of the FCRA, which states:

    \n
    \n

    person shall not furnish any information relating to a consumer to any consumer reporting agency if the person knows or has reasonable cause to believe that the information is inaccurate.”\n \n

    \n
    \n
    3. \n
  3. \n

    Additionally, the Credit Reporting Resource Guide (CRRG) — which governs the Metro 2 Format used by all major credit bureaus — clearly specifies that collection accounts must not include payment history\n profiles or late payment indicators.

    \n

    Collection accounts may only reflect:

    \n

    \n
      \n
    • \n

      Account status (“collection” or “paid”),

      \n
      • \n
    • \n

      Original charge-off or placement date,

      \n
      • \n
    • \n

      Current balance, and

      \n
      • \n
    • \n

      Date of first delinquency (DOFD).

      \n
      • \n
    \n

    \n
    4. \n
\n

By reporting “late payments,” the collection agency has furnished data that violates both FCRA §1681s-2(a)(1)(A) (knowingly\n inaccurate reporting) and the Metro 2 data standards required for accurate consumer reporting.

\n

I request that this account be corrected or deleted immediately to comply with federal law and industry reporting standards. Please reinvestigate this matter and provide me with written confirmation of your\n findings.

^BSCF22 Past Due: appears potentially deviant of the requisite lawful and ethical reporting standards and therefore the claim’s integrity is jeopardized per CRRG 3-4

\n

^BSCF17B Payment Status: : appears potentially deviant of the requisite lawful and ethical reporting standards and therefore the claim’s integrity is jeopardized per CRRG 3-4

\n

\n

{{#bankruptcys}}{{.}}{{/bankruptcys}}

\n

\n

Confidently I Close, ,\n \n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}} 
{{address}}\n \n \n

\n

{{dlid}}
{{ssnid}}
{{poaid}}
{{poaid2}}
{{poaid3}}

\n

","tu":{"ba1":"Trans Union\nPO Box 2000 \nChester, PA 19016"},"ex":{"ba1":"EXPERIAN\nPO BOX 4500\nALLEN, TX 75013"},"paraghraphs":[],"eq":{"ba1":"EQUIFAX\nP.O. Box 740256\nAtlanta, GA 30374-0256"},"createdAt":"2025-11-03T16:10:52.000Z","updatedAt":"2025-11-04T18:18:47.000Z"},{"id":23,"name":"Litigation","file_name":"Litigation","file_html":"\n

Jean Kanamhalagi
2908 Southpark Lane
Fort Worth, Texas 76133

\n

DOB: 03/27/1954       SSN: 632-70-8691

\n

WFDS
PO BOX 168048
IRVING, TX 75016
IRVING, TX 75016

\n

03/29/2024

\n

Dear WFDS,

\n

NOTICE OF PENDING LITIGATION SEEKING RELIEF AND MONETARY DAMAGES UNDER FCRA SECTION 616 & SECTION 617.

\n

Please accept this final written OFFER OF SETTLEMENT BEFORE LITIGATION as my attempt to amicably resolve your continued violation of the Fair Credit Reporting Act regarding your refusal to delete UNVERIFIED information from my consumer file.  

\n

I intend to pursue litigation in accordance with the FCRA to seek relief and recover all monetary damages that I may be entitled to under Section 616 and Section 617 if the UNVERIFIED items listed below are not deleted immediately.  

\n

A copy of this letter as well as copies of the three written letters sent to you previously will also become part of a formal complaint to the Federal Trade Commission and shall be used as evidence in pending litigation provided you fail to comply with this offer of settlement. 

\n

Despite three written requests, the unverified items listed below still remain on my credit report in violation of Federal Law.  

\n

You are required under the FCRA to have a copy of the original creditors documentation on file to verify that this information is mine and is correct.  In the results of your investigations, you stated in writing that you “verified” that these items are being “reported correctly”?   Who verified these accounts?  

\n

You have NOT provided me a copy of ANY original documentation (a consumer contract with my signature on it)  as required under Section 609 (a)(1)(A)  & Section 611 (a)(1)(A). Furthermore you have failed to provide the method of verification as required under Section 611 (a) (7). Please be advised that under Section 611 (5)(A) of the FCRA – you are required to “…promptly DELETE\n all information which cannot be verified.”  \n

\n

The law is very clear as to the Civil liability and the remedy available to me (Section 616 & 617) if you fail to comply with Federal Law. I am a litigious consumer and fully intend on pursuing litigation in this matter to enforce my rights under the FCRA.   

\n

I’ve already written to you guys asking for documentation of the investigation I demanded. How many times do I have to write to your team asking for this proof? It shouldn’t take this long to send the paperwork that I asked for. Is your printer broken? 

\n

Your department obviously thinks I'm stupid, but guess what? I am not! Your team obviously thinks I'm not serious I don’t know how else to prove to you that I'm 100% serious.  Tell your team to do its job  Quit breaking the law and  wasting my time and mail me my paperwork 

\n

I demand the following accounts be verified or deleted immediately.

\n


WFHM - 9360326481256

WFDS - 519910447136

\n

Tired of this nonsense Please do your job Thank you

\n


With Regards,

\n


Jean Kanamhalagi

\n

CC: Federal Trade Commission, Office of the Attorney General, Department of Banking and Fair Credit Finance, Office of Thrift Supervision, Better Business Bureau.

\n

CRA REPORT# CREDIT REPORT PER IDENTITYIQ Today is {{todaydate}}

\n My First & LAST name,\n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}

\n With DOB of {{dob}}\n   AND SSN OF {{ssn}}

\n My Street NUMBER & Street NAME ,and My City and State are as Follows:\n

\n

{{address}}

\n

         Today is {{todaydate}}

\n ****To begin, I would like to ensure you have and ONLY RETAIN current, TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE,and MANDATED REPORTED information per FCRA regulations,any and all others I DEMAND,as is my lawful RIGHT(s) to do so,that you annul and and all deficient of any condition,mentioned or not! I DO NOT AUTHORIZE you to mis-report any mis-information now or ever,please review and ENSURE your adequate and full accordance to the laws upon which govern your practice of reporting consumer credit profiles.\n \n

\n

NOTE\n \n Any reported Personal Identifier Information NOT EXACTLY as above detailed I do NOT certify is adequately true, correct, timely, complete, verifiably valid nor else wise certifiably compliant in its adequate lawful requisite reporting process(es) and or with in the precise and complete adherence to the mandatory format of reporting standard, namely Metro 2 Compliant reporting! Any such currently reported personal identifier information is contested and any associated delinquency event(s) and or derogatoriness(es) equally are NOT ASSUMED FACTUALLY VALID and CERTIFIED COMPLIANT in its reporting nor format of reporting so eradicate any such deficient\n

MY PERSONAL 20-digit TRACKING NUMBER IS: {{tracking}}

\n

TO : {{ba1}}

\n

Re : alleged yet unproven to be true,correct, complete, timely, mine, my responsibility,FCRA compliant,andor CRSA CDIA Metro 2 COMPLIANT reporting.FEDERAL laws dictate that any and all derogatory or potentially injurious reporting MUST be all of the aforementioned and can NOT BE ASSUMED without undoubted CERTIFIABLE testimonial of FACTs ensuring the physically verifiability of the CONFIRMED manual validation of any item upon a consumer complaint,such as is this notice here and now.Please RETURN to or retain federally lawful reporting with your unwavering and unconditional annulment of every single one even each any and or all of the allegations accused of me deficient of physical evidence to every and all aspects of said claims,be them true or not. Re:Re::Please remove the medical misinformation immediately! \n \n

\n

To whom it might concern,

\n

You are reporting inaccurate and incomplete information in regards to the above noted medical account. I demand that you contact the Medical facility, as I have already done, and demand a validation of the debt (of course they can’t provide the statement at this time). Since they cannot or will not provide an itemized statement for the services, they are clearly in violation of the FCRA and FDCPA. Please complete your investigation of this Medical Collection and remove it because the provider cannot validate the information you are reporting on my credit report. Might it be known that THIS LETTER of consumer check and challenge for lawful reporting compliance is my officially composed writ formal complaint that you are reporting one or more of the following,ILLEGALLY mind you:\n \n

\n

OBVIOUSLY, in this Notice for my DECLARATION of CHECK of COMPLIANCE (DOCC) I would like to make known my challenge versus any information by which you fail to present demonstrated PROOF physically to m of the adequate testament of FACTS as related to each and every notation and or aspect of the report allegations, how reported,and the certified Metro 2 Compliance status of any and all entities involved and or tangentially related to the unlawful retaining and reporting of misinformation even beyond my composition of writ complaint compelling you to abide by any and all federal laws and or related regulations within MY STATE. As you might well have concluded ,recently while reviewing my report I found a number of likely mistakes and inaccuracies that you are reporting (again,UNLAWFULLY SO might I add), among the most troubling are listed below (see below) and clearly involves a failure by your firm to maintain reasonable procedures to assure maximum possible accuracy of consumer credit information 15 U.S.C. § 1681. It is with CLARITY that it is UNPROVEN these injurious allegations of VERY severe derogatory nature can not be readily assumed to belong to me.In fact,with your apparent consistency with being extraordinarily INCONSISTENT has to make the question to the actual existence even of this claimed circumstance much less likely being been MIXED onto my credit report by an erroneous reporting error because your company can’t maintain accurate information, either WILLFULLY or in IGNORANCE!REGARDLESS, federal laws and civil courts are CONSISTENT in the REQUISITES of all entities involve regularly with reporting of consumer credit reports to be fully and adequately trained and CERTIFIED METRO 2 COMPLIANT.Any claims from an uncertified agent would certainly grant likelihood the information transferred is NOT QUALIFIED for retaining and or reporting per laws of COMPLIANCE for PROVEN ACCURATE and COMPLETE reporting, INCLUDING the full implementation of Implementation of the CRSA enacted CDIA METRO 2 COMPLIANT data entry standards. The item I believe to be incorrect is listed below. I am also including a copy of how this item is reported BY your credit reporting agency.\n

Moreover, I recently requested an investigation regarding inaccurate/erroneous items on my credit file that were being reported incorrectly. In the process of investigating this matter on MY OWN INITIATIVE, I have discovered a POTENTIAL PERSONAL DATA BREACH, since my personal privacy NOW appears to have been violated, I am exercising my rights under the FCRA 611 (a) (7) for a description of the procedure used by your agency in providing all information to the creditor associated with my earlier dispute under FCRA 611 (a) .UNMISTAKABLY,Your bureau is now being LAWFULLY COMPELLED by rightful consume DEMAND to provide detailed information in this matter as this matter has escalated into a pending tort action under Telephone Records and Privacy Protection Act of 2006. To be more specific, based on FCRA 611 (a) (2) (B), you WILL forward all of the relevant information provided by you to the creditor for their investigation of my dispute. Please provide me with all of the information you used for your investigation, as required by FCRA 611 (a) (7).Please reply within 10 days or delete the negative items, as originally requested. If you FAIL to respond to this demand and tort notification, your firm will be added to the pending action as complicit in this data breach of my personal information\n

1. Tell me in writing what information you refuse to remove and why.
2. Tell me in writing what you did to determine that the information was accurate.
3. Note the information as disputed BY the CONSUMER on my credit report\n \n

\n

Per http://www.e-oscar.org/about-e-oscar.aspx , your VERIFICATION service is defined as this:
\n “e-OSCAR is a web-based, Metro 2 compliant, automated system that enables Data Furnishers (DFs), and Credit Reporting Agencies (CRAs) to create and respond to consumer credit history...” ! That being TRUE, even you REALIZE the requisite to be 100% fully and adequately and EXACTLY correct in your reporting evento the regulatory standards of the Metro 2 data field formatted reporting mandates much more than simply reporting true, accurate and complete. Courts have many times gave precedence that deficient PROOF demonstrated physically to a consumer equates to deficient reporting and elimination of the right to retain said allegations muchmore report it. Due to fact you are either unable or unwilling to compose a writ testifiable certificate of fact to the full trueness,correctness,completeness, timeliness,ownership, responsibility,fcra compliance, compliance to my STATE’s reporting regulations,and PROVEN METRO 2 COMPLIANCE you must eradicate any claims of adversary or derogatory nature. I demand that you immediately and now eliminate the following not proven compliant allegations of mis-information:\n \n

\n

According to the Fair Credit Reporting Act, Section 609 (a)(1)(A) , you are required by federal law to verify - through the physical verification of the original signed consumer contract - any and all accounts you post on a credit report. Otherwise, anyone paying for your reporting services could fax, mail or email in even a potentially fraudulent account.
According to the provisions of the Fair Credit Reporting Act § 611(a) [15 USC 1681i(a)], these disputed items must be reinvestigated or deleted from my credit record within 30 days. During the investigation period, these items must be removed from my credit report as the mere reporting of items prior to debt validation constitutes collectionactivity. Iamalsorequestingthe names, addresses and telephone numbers of individuals you contacted during your investigation.\n

Please notify me that the above items have been deleted pursuant to § 611 (a)(6) [15 USC §1681j (a) (6)]. I am also requesting an updated copy of my credit report, which should be sent to the address listed below. According to the provisions of § 612 [15 USC § 1681j], there should be no charge for this report. If you have any questions or need additional information, please contact me at address noted below. I think 15-20 Days should be ample enough time to get this completed since this is my NOT my first time contacting your organization.\n \n

\n

The following claims are UNFOUNDED and as so are ILLEGALLY REPORTING so ERADICATE them each and all RIGHT NOW! \n \n

\n

{{#accounts}}\n \n

\n

Medical creditor #{{index}}\n : {{account name}}\n

\n

ACCOUNT #{{index}} ALLEGED :\n \n {{account number}}\n \n \n

\n

{{#paraghraphs}}{{randommedspin}}{{/paraghraphs}}\n \n

\n

{{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}{{/accounts}}\n \n \n

\n

FURTHER,CONFIRM the five key components of our individual identities in case this data breach becomes yet another case potentially leading to my inclusion as a victim of fraud and or of identity theft duetoYOUR DEFICIENT and NOT PROVEN COMPLIENT RETAINING and or REPORTING of consumer records,particularly that of personal identifiers.. Therefore, I must request that your bureau confirm in writing the following personal information:\n \n

\n

1- FULL LEGAL NAME as it Appears on my Credit report
2- Legal Address of Record
3- SSN # (or redacted last 4 digits)
4- Date of Birth\n
5- Zip Code for my Home Address\n \n

\n

The CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 compliant reporting format REQUIRES the precise and exact fully complete 426-character P-Segment or Trailing Segment that is to include the minimally five portioned PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS to which databasing of alleged tradeline information occurs.Per CRSA,auto-populating ANY data field input entry and or application of Slash Entries (such as 11111 or 00000,etc) into the Metro 2 system is automatic call for deletion due to any and all repeating entry as NULL and VOID.Moreover,the regulatory obligation dictates that any and all data furnishers MUST include an attached TRAILING SEGMENT that absolutely accurately and completely includes ALL of the account of allegation(s) specifics!Must be performed in a REAL-TIME browser LOCKDOWN to be lawful.Per CRSA implementation,if a data furnisher fails to respond within20 calendar days,e-Oscar is to terminate challenge in favor of consumers and or auto-escalate any and all consumer complaints to a certified Metro 2 compliance trained SPECIALIST. Being Phase III of the Implementation of the CRSA,SMART auto-responders are not compliant and unlawful if used by furnishers or accepted by CRAa.Federal laws mandate MANUAL ENTRY for any and all consumer's FULL P-Segment PREVIOUS coding for a RESPONSE,please certificate in testimonial fact to this occurring. Submit/re-submit shuffling to populate the metro 2 data fields are illegal. Responsible, Lawful, ethical, and compliant consumer credit reporting is the REQUISITE technical accuracy in EVERY single item retained and or reported to or by any consumer credit reporting agency. Metro 2 compliance requires exacting P-segment,to include the minimal five(5) portion personal identifiers as well as a PRECISELY and COMPLETELY FULL account trailing segment.Per the CRSA,any and all CRA insourced DISPUTE Specialist MUST BE Metro 2 Compliance Data Entry Evaluation CERTIFIED. Further,this qualifying certification can be REVOLVED by CONSUMER COMPLAINTS per the NYAG Signing Statement.I repeat, to lawfully retain and or report any claim of information,be it an account or any aspect of such,the must be irrefutable fullness in the truth of reporting, correctness of reporting, COMPLETENESS of reporting, TIMELINESS of reporting and of the reported allegations, undoubtable ownership, irrefutable responsibility of adverse claims,and or adequate and complete INFORMATIONAL COMPLIANCE to the CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 data field formatted reporting regulatory standards and obligations to include the 81-month time relevance of account reported/ how reported/when reported,PRESENT and RELEVANT PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS.Further lawful reporting demands that the regulatory compliance rules are applied EVENLY and thoroughly from data provider to consumer credit reporting repository.Accuracy and completeness of all of any and all information,particularly derogatory consumer information,must abide by every and one of current MY state’s reporting regulations as well as those of federal laws ,even the CDIA METRO 2 COMPLIANCE standards due to the implementation of the Credit Reporting Settlement Agreement (CRSA.)\n \n

\n

Is the Personal Identifier information alleged in the reported 426-character P-SEGMENT true,correct, and complete to standards of CERTIFIED METRO 2 COMPLIANCE?\n \n

\n

Please demonstrate adequate proof of precisely true, accurate, and applicable VALIDATION of the claimed reported CREDITOR CLASSIFICATION CODES,or eradicate every single one and each any and all of the adversary derogatory accusations injuring me immediately,TODAY even NOW and HERE!\n \n

\n

Your failure to demonstrate the REQUIRED presentation of composed PROOF as demanded in this declaration would compel me to consult my consumer complaint lawfully to the members of the NCRWG,as undoubtedly reporting not only must be true,timely,and accurate but also in its COMPLETENESS of DATA ENTRY presented to any entity INCLUDING all consumer reporting repositories.\n \n

\n

This is a request under FCRA 611 (a) (7) for a description of the procedure used by your agency in providing all information to the creditor associated with my earlier dispute of the validity of the reported late payments from my credit file your bureau provided to me. To be more specific, based on FCRA 611 (a) (2) (B), you were required to forward all of the relevant information provided by you to the creditor for their investigation of my dispute. After contacting the creditor I have been led to believe that THIS did not take place. This is a clear violation of the FCRA and the FCBA.\n \n

\n

Please provide me with all of the information you used for your investigation. Please reply within 15 days or delete the negative items, as originally requested.\n \n

\n

1.\n Tell me in writing what information you received from this creditor to support the presence of these supposed late payments.\n \n

\n

2.\n Tell me in writing what you did to determine that the information the creditor provided was Accurate.\n \n

\n

3.\n Note how the information was relayed to the creditor and the EXACT information (type/kind) that was provided to your bureau as PROOF of the accuracy of these late payments.\n \n

\n

The CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 compliant reporting format REQUIRES the precise and exact fully complete 426-character P-Segment or Trailing Segment that is to include the minimally five portioned PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS to which databasing of alleged tradeline information occurs.Per CRSA,auto-populating ANY data field input entry and or application of Slash Entries (such as 11111 or 00000,etc) into the Metro 2 system is automatic call for deletion due to any and all repeating entry as NULL and VOID.Moreover,the regulatory obligation dictates that any and all data furnishers MUST include an attached TRAILING SEGMENT that absolutely accurately and completely includes ALL of the account of allegation(s) specifics!Must be performed in a REAL-TIME browser LOCKDOWN to be lawful.Per CRSA implementation,if a data furnisher fails to respond within20 calendar days,e-Oscar is to terminate challenge in favor of consumers and or auto-escalate any and all consumer complaints to a certified Metro 2 compliance trained SPECIALIST. Being Phase III of the Implementation of the CRSA,SMART auto-responders are not compliant and unlawful if used by furnishers or accepted by CRAa.Federal laws mandate MANUAL ENTRY for any and all consumer's FULL P-Segment PREVIOUS coding for a RESPONSE,please certificate in testimonial fact to this occurring. Submit/re-submit shuffling to populate the metro 2 data fields are illegal. Responsible, Lawful, ethical, and compliant consumer credit reporting is the REQUISITE technical accuracy in EVERY single item retained and or reported to or by any consumer credit reporting agency. Metro 2 compliance requires exacting P-segment,to include the minimal five(5) portion personal identifiers as well as a PRECISELY and COMPLETELY FULL account trailing segment.Per the CRSA,any and all CRA insourced DISPUTE Specialist MUST BE Metro 2 Compliance Data Entry Evaluation CERTIFIED. Further,this qualifying certification can be REVOLVED by CONSUMER COMPLAINTS per the NYAG Signing Statement.I repeat, to lawfully retain and or report any claim of information,be it an account or any aspect of such,the must be irrefutable fullness in the truth of reporting, correctness of reporting, COMPLETENESS of reporting, TIMELINESS of reporting and of the reported allegations, undoubtable ownership, irrefutable responsibility of adverse claims,and or adequate and complete INFORMATIONAL COMPLIANCE to the CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 data field formatted reporting regulatory standards and obligations to include the 81-month time relevance of account reported/ how reported/when reported,PRESENT and RELEVANT PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS.Further lawful reporting demands that the regulatory compliance rules are applied EVENLY and thoroughly from data provider to consumer credit reporting repository.Accuracy and completeness of all of any and all information,particularly derogatory consumer information,must abide by every and one of current MY state’s reporting regulations as well as those of federal laws ,even the CDIA METRO 2 COMPLIANCE standards due to the implementation of the Credit Reporting Settlement Agreement (CRSA.)\n \n

\n

Is the Personal Identifier information alleged in the reported 426-character P-SEGMENT true,correct, and complete to standards of CERTIFIED METRO 2 COMPLIANCE?\n \n

\n

Please demonstrate adequate proof of precisely true, accurate, and applicable VALIDATION of the claimed reported CREDITOR CLASSIFICATION CODES,or eradicate every single one and each any and all of the adversary derogatory accusations injuring me immediately,TODAY even NOW and HERE!\n \n

\n

Your failure to demonstrate the REQUIRED presentation of composed PROOF as demanded in this declaration would compel me to consult my consumer complaint lawfully to the members of the NCRWG,as undoubtedly reporting not only must be true,timely,and accurate but also in its COMPLETENESS of DATA ENTRY presented to any entity INCLUDING all consumer reporting repositories.\n \n

\n

By the provisions of the Fair Credit Reporting Act and per the standards of reporting compliance implemented with the CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 COMPLIANCE regulations, I demand that these above-mentioned derogatory items be investigated and permanently removed from my report. It is my understanding that you will recheck these items with the creditor who has posted them. Please remove any information that the creditor cannot verify. I understand that under 15 U.S.C. Sec. 1681i(a), you must complete this reinvestigation within 30 days of receipt of this letter.\n \n

\n

Please send an updated copy of my credit report to the above address. According to the act, there shall be no charge for this updated report. I also request that you please send notices of corrections to anyone who received my credit report in the past six months.\n \n

\n

Thank you for your time and help in this matter.\n \n

\n

Sincerely,\n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}

\n P.s. My NEXT letter will be a notification of my LOITS! So you no need for a legal dictionary, a LOITS notice is a Letter Of Intent To Suit! You BEST be PROVEN COMPLIANT to ALL requirements and standards of FCRA COMPLIANCE and also of the implemented CRSA enacted CDIA implemented Metro2 Compliance mandates as well. I will demand verification that each employee at your firm which MIGHT have seen or conducted any business on the file you allege mine has been properly trained by a certified and qualified instructor of the Metro 2 data field formatted reporting standards. I am NOT shy in detailing my DOUBTS you can withstand the requisites to survive a court hearing versus me as I leverage your DEFICIENCIES for a slew of victories being awarded a minimum of $1000PER VIOLATION PER TIME,and there certainly appears to be a bucket full.So,let’s do this! Anything OTHER than your letter describing to me that you have already begun or completed the annulment of these unproven claims versus me and have eradicated ENTIRELY any and all aspects of records of what you allege being mine (yeah!) will IMMEDIATE compel me to assume your hostile to my demands of proper reporting and I will assume that your ignorance of appropriate and adequate duties are willful and intentionally injurious. Being such, civil suits are obvious however criminal charges are not out the question, particularly if your chichanary led subterfuge brings forth or allows for damages versus me including fraud and or identity theft due to your willful enablement of it. Impositive I could convince a court of your liabilities to me. WHAT SAY YOU? \n

Evidence of my Proof of Identification \n

TCPA. FDCPA, and etc.. EVEN TO THE MANDATORY PERFECT METRO 2 FORMAT Privacy Rule, TCPA, FDCPA, and etc., EVEN TO THE MANDATORY PERFECT METRO 2 FORMAT COMPLIANT REPORTING standards. EXTINGUISH your DEFICIENT REPORTING of this illegal claim of derogatory NOW!

","\n

ANY DEROGATORY CLAIM must be reported in full factual and testimonial certified COMPLIANCE of law, to include but not limited to regulations and standards per the FBA,FCRA,FACTA, HIPAA Privacy Rule, TCPA, FDCPA, and etc., EVEN TO THE MANDATORY PERFECT METRO 2 FORMAT COMPLIANT REPORTING standards. EXTINGUISH your DEFICIENT REPORTING of this illegal claim of derogatory NOW!

IDENTITYIQ Today is \n {{todaydate}}\n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n \n

\n

With DOB of \n {{dob}}  AND THE SSN IS : \n {{ssn}}\n

\n

ADDRESS :
\n {{address}}\n

\n

****To begin with, I would like to ensure you have and ONLY RETAIN current, TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, and MANDATED REPORTED information per FCRA regulations,any and all others I DEMAND, as is my lawful RIGHT(s) to do so, that you annul and and all deficient of any condition, mentioned or not! I DO NOT AUTHORIZE you to mis-report any mis-information now or ever,please review and ENSURE your adequate and full accordance to the laws upon which govern your practice of reporting consumer credit profiles.\n \n

\n

NOTE : \n \n Any reported Personal Identifier Information NOT EXACTLY as above detailed I do NOT certify is adequately true, correct, timely, complete, verifiably valid nor else wise certifiably compliant in its adequate lawful requisite reporting process(es) and or with in the precise and complete adherence to the mandatory format of reporting standard, namely Metro 2 Compliant reporting! Any such currently reported personal identifier information is contested and any associated delinquency event(s) and or derogatoriness(es) equally are NOT ASSUMED FACTUALLY VALID and CERTIFIED COMPLIANT in its reporting nor format of reporting so eradicate any such deficient claim, true or not.
\n \n

\n

{{ba1}}\n \n \n

\n

Re : alleged yet unproven to be true,correct, complete, timely, mine, my responsibility,FCRA compliant,andor CRSA CDIA Metro 2 COMPLIANT reporting.FEDERAL laws dictate that any and all derogatory or potentially injurious reporting MUST be all of the aforementioned and can NOT BE ASSUMED without undoubted CERTIFIABLE testimonial of FACTs ensuring the physically verifiability of the CONFIRMED manual validation of any item upon a consumer complaint,such as is this notice here and now.Please RETURN to or retain federally lawful reporting with your unwavering and unconditional annulment of every single one even each any and or all of the allegations accused of me deficient of physical evidence to every and all aspects of said claims,be them true or not.

To whom it might concern,\n

\n

Notice of my official writ composed DECLARATION of Not Proven Compliant Misinformation that is either or all of the following: DEFICIENT of adequate current status in fullness of TRUTH, ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, TIMELINESS, documented OWNERSHIP, certifiable RESPONSIBILITY, or otherwise irrefutable compliant obligatory and regulatory requisite compliant reporting thereby mandating your immediate actions to rectify and remedy and any all infractionious behavior(s) by retaining or returning to DEMONSTRATED TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, and COMPLIANT METRO 2 data field formatted reporting!\n \n

\n

OBVIOUSLY,in this Notice for my DECLARATION of CHECK of COMPLIANCE (DOCC) I would like to make known my challenge versus any information by which you fail to present demonstrated PROOF physically to m of the adequate testament of FACTS as related to each and every notation and or aspect ofthe report allegations, how reported,and the certified Metro 2 Compliance status of any and all entities involved and or tangentially related to the unlawful retaining and reporting of misinformation even beyond my composition of writ complaint compelling you to abide by any and all federal laws and or related regulations within MY STATE. As you might well have concluded,recently while reviewing my report I found a number of likely mistakes and inaccuracies that you are reporting (again,UNLAWFULLY SO might I add), among the most troubling are listed below (see below) and clearly involves a failure by your firm to maintain reasonable procedures to assure maximum possible accuracy of consumer credit information 15 U.S.C. § 1681. It is with CLARITY that it is UNPROVEN these injurious allegations of VERY severe derogatory nature can not be readily assumed to belong to me.In fact,with your apparent consistency with being extraordinarily INCONSISTENT has to make the question to the actual existence even of this claimed circumstance much less likely being been MIXED onto my credit report by an erroneous reporting error because your company can’t maintain accurate information, either WILLFULLY or in IGNORANCE!REGARDLESS, federal laws and civil courts are CONSISTENT in the REQUISITES of all entities involved regularly with reporting of consumer credit reports to be fully and adequately trained and CERTIFIED METRO 2 COMPLIANT.Any claims from an uncertified agent would certainly grant likelihood the information transferred is NOT QUALIFIED for retaining and or reporting per laws of COMPLIANCE for PROVEN ACCURATE and COMPLETE reporting, INCLUDING the full implementation of Implementation of the CRSA enacted CDIA METRO 2 COMPLIANT data entry standards. The item I believe to be incorrect is listed below. I am also including a copy of how this item is reported BY your credit reporting agency. Moreover, I recently requested an investigation regarding inaccurate/erroneous items on my credit file that were being reported incorrectly. In the process of investigating this matter on MY OWN INITIATIVE, I have discovered a POTENTIAL PERSONAL DATA BREACH, since my personal privacy NOW appears to have been violated, I am exercising my rights under the FCRA 611 (a) (7) for a description of the procedure used by your agency in providing all information to the creditor associated with my earlier dispute under FCRA 611 (a) .UNMISTAKABLY,Your bureau is now being LAWFULLY COMPELLED by rightful consume DEMAND to provide detailed information in this matter as this matter has escalated into a pending tort action under Telephone Records and Privacy Protection Act of 2006. To be more specific, based on FCRA 611 (a) (2) (B), you WILL forward all of the relevant information provided by you to the creditor for their investigation of my dispute. Please provide me with all of the information you used for your investigation, as required by FCRA 611 (a) (7).Please reply within 10 days or delete the negative items, as originally requested. If you FAIL to respond to this demand and tort notification, your firm will be added to the pending action as complicit in this data breach of my personal information.\n \n

\n

1. Tell me in writing what information you refuse to remove and why.
2. Tell me in writing what you did to determine that the information was accurate.
3. Note the information as disputed BY the CONSUMER on my credit report\n \n

\n

According to the Fair Credit Reporting Act, Section 609 (a)(1)(A) , you are required by federal law to verify - through the physical verification of the original signed consumer contract - any and all accounts you post on a credit report. Otherwise, anyone paying for your reporting services could fax, mail or email in even a potentially fraudulent account.\n \n

\n

According to the provisions of the Fair Credit Reporting Act § 611(a) [15 USC 1681i(a)], these disputed items must be reinvestigated or deleted from my credit record within 30 days. During the investigation period, these items must be removed from my credit report as the mere reporting of items prior to debt validation constitutes collection activity. Iamalsorequestingthe names, addresses and telephone numbers of individuals you contacted during your investigation.\n \n

\n

Please notify me that the above items have been deleted pursuant to § 611 (a)(6) [15 USC § 1681j (a) (6)]. I am also requesting an updated copy of my credit report, which should be sent to the address listed below. According to the provisions of § 612 [15 USC § 1681j], there should be no charge for this report. If you have any questions or need additional information, please contact me at address noted below. I think 15-20 Days should be ample enough time to get this completed since this is my NOT my first time contacting your organization.\n \n

\n

The following claims are UNFOUNDED and as so are ILLEGALLY REPORTING so ERADICATE them each and all RIGHT NOW! 
\n \n

\n

{{#accounts}}\n \n

\n

Account Name # {{index}} : {{account name}}
Account Number # {{index}} : {{account number}}\n \n \n
\n {{#paraghraphs}}{{randomnmspin}}{{/paraghraphs}}{{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}{{/accounts}}
\n FURTHER,CONFIRM the five key components of our individual identities in case this data breach becomes yet another case potentially leading to my inclusion as a victim of fraud and or of identity theft duetoYOUR DEFICIENT and NOT PROVEN COMPLIANT RETAINING and or REPORTING of consumer records,particularly that of personal identifiers.. Therefore, I must request that your bureau confirm in writing the following personal information:\n \n

\n

1- \n FULL LEGAL NAME as it Appears on my Credit report
2- \n Legal Address of Record
3- \n SSN # (or redacted last 4 digits)
4- \n Date of Birth
5- \n Zip Code for my Home Address\n \n

\n

The CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 compliant reporting format REQUIRES the precise and exact fully complete 426-character P-Segment or Trailing Segment that is to include the minimally five portioned PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS to which databasing of alleged tradeline information occurs.Per CRSA,auto-populating ANY data field input entry and or application of Slash Entries (such as 11111 or 00000,etc) into the Metro 2 system is automatic call for deletion due to any and all repeating entry as NULL and VOID.Moreover,the regulatory obligation dictates that any and all data furnishers MUST include an attached TRAILING SEGMENT that absolutely accurately and completely includes ALL of the account of allegation(s) specifics!Must be performed in a REAL-TIME browser LOCKDOWN to be lawful.Per CRSA implementation,if a data furnisher fails to respond within20 calendar days,e-Oscar is to terminate challenge in favor of consumers and or auto-escalate\n \n

\n

any and all consumer complaints to a certified Metro 2 compliance trained SPECIALIST. Being Phase III of the Implementation of the CRSA,SMART auto-responders are not compliant and unlawful if used by furnishers or accepted by CRAa.Federal laws mandate MANUAL ENTRY for any and all consumer's FULL P-Segment PREVIOUS coding for a RESPONSE,please certificate in testimonial fact to this occurring. Submit/re-submit shuffling to populate the metro 2 data fields are illegal. Responsible, Lawful, ethical, and compliant consumer credit reporting is the REQUISITE technical accuracy in EVERY single item retained and or reported to or by any consumer credit reporting agency. Metro 2 compliance requires exacting P-segment,to include the minimal five(5) portion personal identifiers as well as a PRECISELY and COMPLETELY FULL account trailing segment.Per the CRSA,any and all CRA insourced DISPUTE Specialist\n \n

\n

MUST BE Metro 2 Compliance Data Entry Evaluation CERTIFIED. Further,this qualifying certification can be REVOLVED by CONSUMER COMPLAINTS per the NYAG Signing Statement.I repeat, to lawfully retain and or report any claim of information,be it an account or any aspect of such,the must be irrefutable fullness in the truth of reporting, correctness of reporting, COMPLETENESS of reporting, TIMELINESS of reporting and of the reported allegations, undoubtable ownership, irrefutable responsibility of adverse claims,and or adequate and complete INFORMATIONAL COMPLIANCE to the CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 data field formatted reporting regulatory\n \n

\n

standards and obligations to include the 81-month time relevance of account reported/ how reported/when reported,PRESENT and RELEVANT PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS.Further lawful reporting demands that the regulatory compliance rules are applied EVENLY and thoroughly from data provider to consumer credit reporting repository.Accuracy and completeness of all of any and all information,particularly derogatory consumer information,must abide by every and one of current MY state’s reporting regulations as well as those of federal laws ,even the CDIA METRO 2 COMPLIANCE standards due to the implementation of the Credit Reporting Settlement Agreement (CRSA.)\n \n

\n

Is the Personal Identifier information alleged in the reported 426-character P-SEGMENT true,correct, and complete to standards of CERTIFIED METRO 2 COMPLIANCE?\n \n

\n

Please demonstrate adequate proof of precisely true, accurate, and applicable VALIDATION of the claimed reported CREDITOR CLASSIFICATION CODES,or eradicate every single one and each any and all of the adversary derogatory accusations injuring me immediately,TODAY even NOW and HERE!\n \n

\n

Your failure to demonstrate the REQUIRED presentation of composed PROOF as demanded in this declaration would compel me to consult my consumer complaint lawfully to the members of the NCRWG,as undoubtedly reporting not only must be true,timely,and accurate but also in its COMPLETENESS of DATA ENTRY presented to any entity INCLUDING all consumer reporting Repositories.\n \n

\n

By the provisions of the Fair Credit Reporting Act and per the standards of reporting compliance implemented with the CRSA enacted CDIA Metro 2 COMPLIANCE regulations, I demand that these above-mentioned derogatory items be investigated and permanently removed from my report. It is my understanding that you will recheck these items with the creditor who has posted them. Please remove any information that the creditor cannot verify. I understand that under 15 U.S.C. Sec. 1681i(a), you must complete this reinvestigation within 30 days of receipt of this letter.

Please send an updated copy of my credit report to the above address. According to the act, there shall be no charge for this updated report. I also request that you please send notices of corrections to anyone who received my credit report in the past six months.\n \n

\n

Thank you for your time and help in this matter.\n \n

\n

Sincerely,\n \n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}

\n

{{dlid}}

\n

{{ssnid}}
{{poaid}}

\n

{{poaid2}}

\n

{{poaid3}}

","\n

My state and the applicable federal regulations and standards for proper lawful reporting requires that any injurious claim of delinquency and or derogatoriness be factual and physically verified as being fully True, ACCURATE, COMPLETE, TIMELY, of a known ownership of responsibility, and else wise undeniably VALIDATED and further mandates that all such allegations are reported in a perfect and certifiable compliant manner such as in relation to the mandatorily perfect correct and complete certificated Metro 2 Format reporting standard(s). Being that the noted allegation(s) of delinquencies and derogatoriness's are reported as one or more fallible conditions of being \"missing or incomplete\", inconsistent, questionable, and or else wise UNPROVEN reporting. Inability to validate and certify compliant reporting is grounds to demand eradication of claims, and this is my REBUTTAL to ANY AND ALL NEGATIVE ACCUSATIONS and my rightful DEMAND TO REMOVE such claims from REPORTING!

","\n

REBUTTAL Notation includes the facts that claims are not to date certified completely compliant perfectly reported derogatory claims must be deleted Or else proven certified physically verifiably valid per FCRA FDCPA and or to the Metro 2 format so eradicate any and all claims of delinquency or adversarial derogatory reporting that is still yet deficient of irrefutable physically verifiable certificate proof of validity to the entirety of the allegation, to include it’s mandatory reporting compliance standards of full truth, correctness, completeness, timeliness, and document facts of such. In summary, Inaccurate misleading or not certified perfect and completely compliant derogatory claims must be deleted Or else proven certified as being physically verified valid per FCRA FDCPA and or to the Metro 2 format so please DO SO NOW to retain federally REQUIRED COMPLIANT REPORTING!

","\n

The alleged delinquent and or derogatory claim(s) of information above listed is deficient the mandatory demonstration of current certifiable compliant reporting of only physically verified factually true, correct, timely, adequately complete, and or ELSEWISE undoubtedly validated claims. Delete today, even right now to return to and or retain ethical and lawful reporting and standards of consumer credit reporting practices.

","\n

Under the FCRA, unverified accounts must be removed and if you are unable to provide me a copy of verifiable proof, you must remove the alleged account. I demand the following accounts be verified or removed immediately.
