ATTENTION: \n \n IDENTITY AFFIDAVIT of Facts : Personal Identifiers removal

\n

Attention: Customer Complaints Department, we kindly request your assistance in addressing a concern of mine.\n \n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n

Address :
{{address}}\n

\n

My Date of Birth is \n {{dob}}\n \n \n \n

\n

My Social Security Number’s is \n {{ssn}}\n \n \n \n

\n

{{ba1}}\n \n

\n

AND
{{ba2}}\n \n

\n

To whom it might concern,\n \n \n \n

\n

IDENTITY AFFIDAVIT

\n

My Personal Tracking Number is {{tracking}}

\n

I, {{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n , hereby declare under penalty of perjury that the following statements are true and correct to the best of my knowledge:

\n
    \n
  1. \n

    Personal Information: My truthful correct present replete uncontested first and last name is {{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n .

    \n

    I reside at {{address}} My date of birth is {{dob}}.

    \n

    My Social Security Number is {{ssn}}.

    \n
    2. \n
  2. \n

    Purpose of Affidavit: I am submitting this affidavit to verify my identity and to request an investigation into any inaccuracies or fraudulent activities,\n or non-compliant reporting that may appear on my credit report maintained by Credit Bureau, {{bureau}}

    \n
    3. \n
  3. \n

    Statement of Identity: I affirm that I am the individual named above and that the information provided herein is accurate. I have not authorized any other\n individual or entity to use my personal information, including my Social Security Number, for any unauthorized purposes.

    \n
    4. \n
  4. \n

    Disputed Information: I request that any inaccurate name, address(es), employers or no longer fully compliant true or accurate personal identifiers be removed\n or corrected from my credit report.

    \n
    5. \n
  5. \n

    Supporting Documentation: I have enclosed copies of the following documents to verify my identity: Copy of my driver’s license, Social Security card, and\n a recent utility bill showing my current address. These documents are provided to assist in the verification process.

    \n
    6. \n
  6. \n

    Request for Action: I respectfully request that {{bureau}} investigate and resolve any discrepancies on my credit report. Please provide me with a written\n response detailing the results of your investigation within the time frame required by the Fair Credit Reporting Act.

    \n
    7. \n
\n

I understand that providing false information in this affidavit is a violation of federal and state laws. I certify that all statements made herein are true and accurate.

\n

I am writing to inform you of the Personal Identifier inaccuracies present on my credit file. It has come to my attention that there are errors in the personal information listed, and I kindly request for these inaccuracies to be promptly corrected.\n \n

\n

It is imperative that all incorrect information be removed from my credit file as it poses a significant risk to my identity and financial security. I am deeply concerned that these inaccuracies may potentially lead to identity theft or fraud, especially if correspondence is being sent to an incorrect address.\n \n

\n

I urge you to take immediate action in rectifying these errors in order to safeguard against any potential harm. Your prompt attention and resolution of this matter would be greatly appreciated.\n \n

\n


\n Please remove all other versions of information similar or alleged as being \n my name from my credit report.\n \n

\n

The addresses in question are not deliverable to me by the U.S. Post Office, and as such, they cannot be reported under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) Section 623 until their accuracy has been verified. It is imperative that only accurate and verifiable information is included in credit reports to ensure fair and transparent credit assessment processes. Therefore, these addresses should not be considered when evaluating my creditworthiness until their accuracy has been confirmed.\n \n \n

\n

REMOVE the displayed below reported Consumer's Current and/or Previous Residence(s) *BSCF40-45 or elsewise unproved of a n d as my\n REQUISITE REPORTED CURRENT CORRECT COMPLETE Current Address is {{address}}.\n I DO NOT AUTHORIZE you to retain nor report any not proven true correct valid and required reported personal identifier information that is not in exact agreement with my submitted\n FACTUALLY CORRECT CURRENT PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS as indicated.

\n

{{addresses}}\n \n \n \n

\n

REMOVE the display reported Consumer's Reported Employers(s) ^NTCU^ below as my REQUISITE REPORTED CURRENT CORRECT COMPLETE Consumer's\n Reported Employers is XXXXX. I DO NOT AUTHORIZE you to retain nor report any not proven true correct valid and required reported personal identifier information that is not in\n exact agreement with my submitted FACTUALLY CORRECT CURRENT PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS as indicated.

\n

{{employers}}\n \n \n \n

\n

REMOVE the display reported Consumer's Primary Name(s) and/or Consumer's Others Name(s) BSCF30-32 of as my REQUISITE REPORTED CURRENT\n CORRECT COMPLETE FIRST & LAST NAME is {{firstname}} {{lastname}} I DO NOT AUTHORIZE you to retain nor report any not proven true correct valid and required reported personal identifier information that is not in exact agreement with\n my submitted FACTUALLY CORRECT CURRENT PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS as indicated.

\n

{{names}}\n \n \n \n

\n

*I DO NOT HAVE nor desire expressed ANY OTHER FEDERALLY REQUISITE PERSONAL IDENTIFIER information so here now move to DELETE any and all OTHER personal identifier data that might\n be reporting despite my objection without right of law to retain authority to report any data much less personal info that is insuﬃcient of verifiability, validity, timeliness,\n or certified compliance of reporting there more! The only personal identifier facts I grant you authority to report and or preserve is definitely as I have submitted above and\n in no manner else wise!

\n


1024.35 (Notice of Error) under Regulation X of the CFPB regulatory reform guidelines for Credit Reporting Agencies.

\n

Please DELETE any recorded personal identifier information\n \n NOT unequivocally indicated as {{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n of address located precisely at {{address}} with exact SSN (or last four) of {{lastfour}} born on {{dob}} I have no required proclaimed OTHER personal identifier info data of which I do not\n contest any prospective reporters to demonstrate privilege to do so over my objection(s), be data undoubted or elsewise!

\n

It is noteworthy that as the injured consumer, I am of no obligation to reveal any imperfections nor any flawed reporting as it is your moral imperative to NOT HAVE ANY for which I may be even able to do so.

\n

Please remove all phone numbers that are listed on my report, otherwise please provide proof that you have verified them to be completely accurate and perfectly factual and certifiably compliant in its reporting. I do not AUTHORIZE you to retain or report any not requisite reported, not certified compliant, potentially outdated, potentially inaccurate, and or else wise unverified even invalid alleged personal identifier \n information.\n \n

\n

Under Consumer Protection laws, I am formally requesting the removal of the noted items from my credit report. I am aware that you are only authorized to share accurate and verified claims that comply with reporting requirements. I do not authorize the publication of any outdated or incorrect information regarding me.\n \n

\n

I understand that you are required to complete this update within 30 days of receiving this letter. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.\n \n

\n

In genuine sincerity I now close,

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n

\n

\n

Cc:

\n

Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB)

\n

1700 G Street NW

\n

Washington, DC 20552

\n

\n

Today is: {{todaydate}}

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}

\n

{{address}}

\n

Report DATA Resource is: CREDIT RPT PER IDENTITYIQ

\n

\n

TO: {{ba1}}

\n

RE:Notice of my official writ composed DECLARATION of Not Proven Compliant Misinformation that is either or all of the following: Namely I compel you to eradicate the reporting adverse derogatory accusations related to the AU- authorized account- reporting currently in my consumer credit files at your location! As we both know- >>You can NOT LEGALLY RETAIN much less report misinformation, and the allegations displayed are likely DEFICIENT of adequate current status in fullness of TRUTH, ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, TIMELINESS, documented OWNERSHIP, certifiable RESPONSIBILITY, or otherwise irrefutable compliant obligatory and regulatory requisite compliant reporting thereby mandating your immediate actions to rectify and remedy and any all infraction-ious behavior(s) by retaining or returning to DEMONSTRATED TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, and COMPLIANT METRO 2 data field formatted Reporting!\n \n

\n

To whom it might concern,\n \n

\n

I recently pulled a copy of my credit report and found that you are reporting the following account on my credit report that should be removed immediately. At one time I was an “Authorized User”, however, I requested to be removed as an authorized user a very long time ago.Any information that is NOT PHYSICALLY PROVEN to be COMPLIANT to every and one even each any and or all of the client's State's and or the federal reporting laws MUST be returned to compliance even should that requisite annulment of item's reporting. No entity is With authority to retain or report any allegations not DEMONSTRATED by certificate of FACT to be fully CURRENT as well as also 100% TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, Timely, or a determined OWNERSHIP of MINE, and or of a determined RESPONSIBILITY of MINE and the presentation of the informational evidence MUST BE IRREFUTABLE to be so,yet OBVIOUSLY it is NOT as currently reporting! YOU MUST ERADICATE the inaccurate ,incomplete, not current, or else wise NOT COMPLIANT information immediately, and do so without prejudice or unethical and unlawful injuries to me, real or imaginary!\n

\n

Per the Fair Credit Reporting Act, if I am not a joint owner, or co-signer of an account it should not be reported on my credit profile. I am requesting that you contact the creditor to confirm that I am not an owner of this account and that I am no longer an authorized user, and remove it from my report as soon as possible. I look forward to receiving a copy of my corrected credit report. Thank you for your help.\n

\n

Here is the erroneous record deficient of compliance or proof of compliance of which you are reporting in subterfuge, illegally!\n

\n

The FOLLOWING reporting derogatory allegations of information are either NOT CURRENT, UNTRUE, INCORRECT, INCOMPLETE, UNTIMELY, NOT MINE, NOT MY RESPONSIBILITY, or otherwise NOT PROVEN COMPLIANT to regulatory federal reporting laws and or standards and MUST be eradicated immediately, do so TODAY, even right NOW! The obvious infractions are as follows:\n

\n

{{#accounts}}
Alleged creditor reporting item:
{{account name}}
Alleged Account at issue: {{account number}}
\n {{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}{{/accounts}}
Notation:If not physically irrefutable you are not authorized to retain or report this allegation so annul in brief today even right now or certificate that your testimony proves compliance and accuracy of every and one even each any and all OF THE data aspects.Subterfuge is unlawful,I demand that you return to or retain compliance as mandated and do so without injury AND or prejudices towards me now or thereafter.
{{#accounts}}
Alleged creditor reporting item:
{{account name}}
Alleged Account at issue: {{account number}}{{/accounts}}
\n Notation: AFFIRM AND CONFIRM-ATE THIS ALLEGATION OF CLAIM YET STILL UNPROVEN. LAWFULLY CERTIFICATE PHYSICALLY THE CREDITOR CLASSIFICATION CODE (S), THE EXACT AND COMPLETE SEQUENCED AND METRO2 DATA FORMATTED 426 CHARACTER P-6 STATEMENT (S) AS WELL AS ALL OF THE APPLICABLE AND REQUISITE TRAILING FRAGMENTS,THE MINIMALLY MANDATED FIVE (5) PORTIONED PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS, EVERY AND ONE OF THE ALPHA-/ NUMERIC-/AND OR ALPHANUMERIC SOURCE CODES THAT DETAIL THE LEFT SIDEDNESS AND OR RIGHT SIDEDNESS OF ANY AND ALL PRECISELY ORDERED RECORDED ACCOUNT DESCRIPTIONS, ALL ASPECTS EXACTLY AND FULLY RELATED TO THE SEQUENCED 386 PIECES OF CONFIRMATION TO COLLECT(-TIONS), EACH CALENDAR DATE RECORDED, EVERY ALLEGED BALANCE INCLUDING THE TALLIED TOTALLINGS AND INVOICES FROM WHICH THEY WERE DERIVED, THE DOCUMENTED LEGAL AND CURRENT COLOR PHOTOGRAPHED IDENTITIES, THE ATTESTED ADDRESSES, THE NONTRANSPORTED AND TRUE MARKS OF EXECUTION FROM THE ONE AND ONLY AND EXACTLY IDENTIFIED ME UPON AN ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF THE DEBT ALLEGED OR EVEN CONDITIONS RELATED, AS WELL AS EVERY SINGLE ONE EVEN EACH ANY AND OR ALL OF THE REQUISITE STATE AND FEDERAL LAWS APPLICABLE, WHETHER KNOWN OR NOT,REGARDLESS IF MENTIONED OR NOT. YOU ARE UNAUTHORIZED TO RETAIN AND OR EVEN REPORT SUBTERFUGE PARTICULARLY IF IT IS POTENTIALLY ENABLING OF FRAUD AND OR IDENTITY THEFT SUCH AS THIS INJURIOUS MIS-REPORTINGS OF MIS-INFORMATION MIGHT VERY WELL APPEAR TO BE. DELETE NOW TO ANNUL THIS UNJUST ACCUSATION AND TO RETURN TO COMPLETE COMPLIANCE TO FEDERAL REPORTING LAWS AS IS OBLIGATED OF YOU.\n
\n

\n

I REPEAT?--->> Per the Fair Credit Reporting Act, if I am not a joint owner, or co-signer of an account it ? should not be reported ?on my credit profile. I am requesting that you contact the creditor to confirm that I am not an owner of this account and that I am no longer an authorized user, and remove it from my report as soon as possible?.\n \n

\n

I look forward to receiving a copy of my corrected credit report. Thank you for your help?.
In GENUINE SINCERITY and APPRECIATION,\n

\n

In Genuine Sincerity, {{firstname}} {{lastname}}

\n

{{ssnid}}
{{poaid}}
{{poaid2}}
{{poaid3}}

\n

Box 740256\nAtlanta,\n GA 30374"},"createdAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:06.000Z","updatedAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:06.000Z"},{"id":18,"name":"Stall Tactic","file_name":"Stall Tactic","file_html":"\n

Date : {{todaydate}} \n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}} \n \n \n

\n

{{address}}\n \n \n

\n

DOB : {{dob}}\n \n

\n

SSN : \n {{ssn}} \n \n \n

\n
\n

{{ba1}}\n \n \n

\n

RE: Failure to Conduct a Timely Reinvestigation – Formal Notice

\n

\n

To Whom It May Concern:

\n

\n

I am writing to provide formal notice that your agency has failed to complete my dispute within the time frame required by federal law.

\n

\n

Recently with the last 30 days, I submitted a dispute regarding multiple inaccurate items on my credit report. Under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) §611(a)(1),\n your agency is required to:

\n

• Conduct a reasonable investigation,

\n

• Notify furnishers, and

\n

• Provide written results within 30 days.

\n

\n

As of today, more than 30 days have passed, and I have not received:

\n

1. A proper and complete investigation,

\n

2. A legally compliant response, or

\n

3. The required description of the procedure used to verify the information (FCRA §611(a)(6)(B)(iii)).

\n

\n

Your failure to comply constitutes a violation of federal law. Stalling, delaying, or failing to investigate disputes in good faith is expressly prohibited under:

\n

• FCRA §607(b) – Duty to follow reasonable procedures

\n

• FCRA §611(a) – Failure to reinvestigate within statutory timelines

\n

• FCRA §623(b) – Furnisher failure to investigate

\n

• FCRA §616-617 – Civil liability for willful or negligent noncompliance

\n

\n

⸻

\n

\n

DEMAND FOR IMMEDIATE ACTION

\n

\n

I am hereby demanding that your agency:

\n

1. Delete the disputed items immediately due to your failure to verify them within the statutory time frame; or

\n

2. Provide full, legally required documentation of verification including:

\n

• The name of the individual who verified the item

\n

• The method of verification

\n

• Copies of all documentation used in your investigation

\n

\n

A generic form letter is not sufficient under federal law.

\n

\n

DISPUTED ITEMS (List clearly)
{{#accounts}}\n \n

\n

Account # {{index}}
{{account name}}
Account Number # {{index}} : {{account number}}
{{/accounts}}\n \n
\n \n \n

\n

These items remain inaccurate, unverified, and incomplete, and must be deleted in compliance with the FCRA.

⸻

\n

\n

NOTICE OF POTENTIAL LEGAL ACTION

\n

\n

If this matter is not corrected within 15 days, I will have no choice but to:

\n

• File formal complaints with the CFPB, FTC, and State Attorney General,

\n

• Request compliance audits under FCRA, and

\n

• Pursue all available civil remedies for damages.

\n

\n

⸻

\n

Gorman v. Wolpoff & Abramson, LLP: In this case, the court ruled against the credit bureau and debt collector for violating the FCRA by failing to conduct a proper investigation within the required timeframe. The court held that the defendants were liable for statutory damages and attorney fees.\n

\n

Davis v. TransUnion, LLC: In this class-action lawsuit, the plaintiffs alleged that TransUnion had violated the FCRA by neglecting to promptly investigate and correct inaccuracies on their credit reports. The court found in favor of the plaintiffs and awarded damages, citing TransUnion's failure to meet its obligations under the FCRA.\n

\n

I expect your agency to comply with federal law and correct these violations immediately. Please send updated results and a corrected credit report to the address above.

\n

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n
\n

\n
\n


Send all future correspondences to the address I provided. I expect you to take this seriously and resolve this issue promptly.\n

\n

Sincerely,

\n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n

\n

{{address}}\n \n \n

\n

{{dlid}}

\n

{{ssnid}}
{{poaid}}

\n

{{poa2id}}
{{poa3id}}

\n

and as such is in apparent deviation from the requisite standard(s) for certifiably compliant reporting, hence the genesis of my rightful consumer complaint contesting reporter's\n privilege to report this claim unless it accepts and successfully fulfills the challenge to prove indisputably its confirmed and demonstrated adequacy of reporting practices and\n process to include no less than the full adherence of their required perfection and completeness of the Credit Reporting Industry's mandatorily utilized Metro 2 Format standards.

TEST NEW-spinner (2)

"],"name":"spinner","random":true}],"eq":{"ba1":"7","ba2":"8","ba3":"9"},"createdAt":"2025-10-13T11:57:07.000Z","updatedAt":"2026-02-21T12:45:21.000Z"},{"id":1,"name":"W1L8","file_name":"W1L8","file_html":"\n

{{todaydate}}\n \n \n

\n

{{firstname}} {{lastname}}\n \n \n \n

\n

DOB: {{dob}}\n

\n

SSN: {{ssn}}\n

\n

ADDRESS
{{address}}\n

\n
\n

After obtaining a copy of my credit report, I discovered that the following item(s) either lack sufficient evidence to support their inclusion in the metro 2 reporting criteria, or are inaccurate, incomplete, late, not my fault, or not my responsibility. The following are items that may be in error and call for an immediate termination of the retainage and/or reporting:\n

\n

{{ba1}}

\n

Whom This May Concern:\n \n \n

\n

Re: My certified letter in notice of an official consumer declaration of complaint for your thus far NOT proven true, NOT proven correct, NOT proven complete, NOT proven timely, or NOT proven compliant mis-information, to include likely the deficient of proven metro 2 compliant data field formatted reporting as MANDATED! I am enacting my consumer and or civil rights to compel you here and now to absolutely and permanently remove any and all aspects of untrue, inaccurate, not complete, not timely, not proven mine, not proven my responsibility, and or not proven adequately and entirely compliant allegations of credit information.\n

\n

The subsequent addresses ( \n \n Consumer's Current and/or Previous Residence(s) *BSCF40-45 ) need to be removed right away since they are either completely inaccurate or just partially compliant. All of these unverified reportable addresses should be deleted, please:\n \n \n

\n

{{addresses}}\n \n \n \n

\n
\n

The subsequent employment \n \n ^NTCU^ accusations must be promptly deleted since they either report inadequate compliance or are almost certainly wholly false: Kindly REMOVE ALL of the following reportable employment claims that have not been proven:\n \n \n

\n

{{employers}}\n \n \n \n

\n
\n

The subsequent aliases (or OTHER names) \n \n BSCF30-32 complaints need to be removed right now since they are either reporting insufficient compliance or possibly even doing so completely wrong. Kindly REMOVE ALL of the following unsubstantiated complaints using reportable aliases (or OTHER names):\n \n \n

\n

{{names}}\n \n \n \n

\n
\n

Both federal and state laws require you to adhere to any and all strict and precise reporting requirements in their entirety. If I were to be forced to direct a consumer claim for a possible resolution through civil and/or criminal courts, I am sure the court and their ruling magistrate would demand irrefutable evidence for every and every aspect of mandated reporting that you are required to report, including full proof in your testimonial certificate, to your exact Metro 2 reporting requirements. The CRSA-enacted and CDIA-implemented Metro 2 Compliance Standards will be one of the many documents of evidence that I will with no hesitation require from you for each allegation of adversary notation and aspects of your claimed account(s) that clearly need to be removed immediately.\n \n

\n

To avoid such an unnecessary and obviously troublesome action for you, please compose undoubted certificates of your lawful actions to irrefutably verify and validate all data for this and all allegations of derogatory account and or aspects of adversary reporting to include at a minimum every notation, each and all dates, unmistakable accounting balances, all transactions and the audits of all such activities, any and all lawfully verified and recorded identifications, the minimal five (5) portioned personal identifiers, each and every of the alpha-/ numeric-/ and or alphanumeric source codes, all of the sequential and precisely exact 426 characters of the P-6 segment (aka P-statement),the 386 pieces to confirmation of a collection (if any), the creditor classification codes, each and all pay status, and else wise mandated portions of metro 2 compliant reporting, whether reported or not. To return to federal and my state’s reporting compliance, as REQUIRED BY LAW, please eradicate any and every aspect of adversary and/or derogatory reporting that is not proven to be in its entirety FULLY TRUE, ACCURATE, COMPLETE, TIMELY, of MY OWNERSHIP, OF MY RESPONSIBILITY, in accordance with each and every obligatory reporting regulation, mentioned here or not! COMPOSE PROOF in a testimonial certificate is demanded; anything less will compel me to determine your actions as HOSTILE and WILLFULLY ignoble to my consumer and civil rights and willfully derelict to proper reporting, a CLEAR VIOLATION of FEDERAL law, and I may indeed seek and be awarded punitive monetary benefits beyond the required RESOLUTIONS that I am here and now DEMANDING!\n \n

\n

The following accounts must be deleted right away:\n \n \n

\n

{{#accounts}}
Alleging Creditor # {{index}} and Account # {{index}} as reported on my credit report:
Account Name :\n {{account name}}
Account Number : {{account number}}\n

\n

Notation: In accordance with CRSA-enacted and CDIA - implemented laws, all reporting must be removed if it cannot be proven to be PROVER COMPLETELY TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, TIMELY, OF KNOW OWNERSHIP AND RESPONSIBILITY AND COMPLIANT WITH Metro 2 Reporting Standards\n
{{dispute1}}{{dispute2}}{{dispute3}}{{/accounts}}\n \n \n

\n

**Obviously, if any of the chicanery and subterfuge noted above that led to the allegation of misreported misinformation in my complaint also resulted in an accusation or inquiry, I would require undeniable and irrefutable physical proof of the verifiable validated and adequately acquired permissible purpose exactly as mandated by laws and or else eradicate in its entirety any and all such not yet demonstrated and certified true, correct, complete,timely,and Metro 2 compliant accusations. To be clear, it is within my consumer and civil rights to DEMAND and RECEIVE documentation of all aspects of perfect reporting, and I am equally within my rights to demand that any and all non-demonstrably proven compliant information be deleted immediately, whether it is true or otherwise!\n \n

\n

Prove compliance to every single aspect of notation and make an adequate truthful certificate of composed testimony as to such, or else you MUST delete ASAP! Let this notice of my official writ be a DECLARATION of Not Proven Compliant Misinformation that is either or all of the following: DEFICIENT of adequate current status in fullness of TRUTH, ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, TIMELINESS, documented OWNERSHIP, certifiable RESPONSIBILITY, or otherwise irrefutable compliant obligatory and regulatory requisite compliant reporting, thereby mandating your immediate actions to rectify and remedy any infraction-ious behavior(s) by retaining or returning to DEMONSTRATED TRUE, CORRECT, COMPLETE, and COMPLIANT METRO 2 data field formatted reporting! Please provide me with all of the information you used for your investigation, as required by FCRA 611(a)(7). Please reply within 10 days or delete the negative items, as originally requested. If you FAIL to respond to this demand and tort notification, your firm will be added to the pending action as complicit in this data breach of my personal information.\n \n

\n

1. Specify what information you won't be removing and why in writing.\n \n

\n

2. Describe what you did to verify the accuracy of the information in writing.\n \n

\n

3. Mark the information on my credit record as being contested or disputed BY the CONSUMER.\n \n

\n

In accordance with the Fair Credit Reporting Act, Section 609(a)(1)(A), you are required by federal law to verify any and all accounts you post to your credit report by physically verifying the original signed agreement. Unless you take precautions, anyone paying for your reporting services can fax, mail, or email in even potentially fraudulent accounts.\n \n

\n

According to the provisions of the Fair Credit Reporting Act, § 611(a) [15 USC 1681i(a)], these disputed items must be reinvestigated or deleted from my credit record within 30 days. During the investigation period, these items must be removed from my credit report, as the mere reporting of items prior to debt validation constitutes collection activity. I am also requesting the names, addresses, and telephone numbers of individuals you contacted during your investigation.\n \n

\n

Please notify me that the above items have been deleted pursuant to § 611 (a)(6) [15 USC § 1681j (a)(6)]. I am also requesting an updated copy of my credit report, which should be sent to the address listed below. According to the provisions of § 612 [15 USC § 1681j], there should be no charge for this report. If you have any questions or need additional information, please contact me at the address noted below. I think 15-20 Days should be ample enough time to get this completed since this is not my first time contacting your organization.\n \n

\n

The CRSA-enacted CDIA Metro 2 compliant reporting format REQUIRES the precise and exact, fully complete 426-character P-Segment or Trailing Segment that is to include the minimally five portioned PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS to which databasing of alleged tradeline information occurs.Per CRSA,auto-populating ANY data field input entry and or application of Slash Entries (such as 11111 or 00000, etc.) into the Metro 2 system is an automatic call for deletion due to any and all repeating entries being NULL and VOID.Moreover,the regulatory obligation dictates that any and all data furnishers MUST include an attached TRAILING SEGMENT that absolutely accurately and completely includes ALL of the account of allegation(s) specifics!Must be performed in a REAL-TIME browser LOCKDOWN to be lawful.Per CRSA implementation,if a data furnisher fails to respond within 20 calendar days,e-Oscar is to terminate the challenge in favor of consumers and/or auto-escalate any and all consumer complaints to a certified Metro 2 compliance-trained SPECIALIST. Being Phase III of the Implementation of the CRSA,SMART auto-responders are not compliant and unlawful if used by furnishers or accepted by CRAa.Federal laws mandate MANUAL ENTRY for any and all consumer's FULL P-Segment PREVIOUS coding for a response; please certificate in testimonial fact to this occurring. Submit/re-submit shuffling to populate the Metro 2 data fields is illegal. Responsible, legal, ethical, and compliant consumer credit reporting is the requirement for technical accuracy in EVERY single item retained and/or reported to or by any consumer credit reporting agency. Metro 2 compliance requires an exacting P-segment to include the minimal five (5) portion personal identifiers as well as a PRECISELY and COMPLETELY FULL account trailing segment.Per the CRSA,any and all CRA-insourced DISPUTE specialists MUST BE Metro 2 Compliance Data Entry Evaluation CERTIFIED. Further,this qualifying certification can be revoked by CONSUMER COMPLAINTS per the NYAG Signing Statement.I repeat, to lawfully retain and or report any claim of information,be it an account or any aspect of such, there must be irrefutable fullness in the truth of reporting, correctness of reporting, COMPLETENESS of reporting, TIMELINESS of reporting and of the reported allegations, undoubtable ownership, irrefutable responsibility of adverse claims,and or adequate and complete INFORMATIONAL COMPLIANCE to the CRSA-enacted CDIA Metro 2 data field formatted reporting regulatory standards and obligations to include the 81-month time relevance of account reported, how reported, when reported, and RELEVANT PERSONAL IDENTIFIERS.Further lawful reporting demands that the regulatory compliance rules be applied equally and thoroughly from the data provider to the consumer credit reporting repository.The accuracy and completeness of all information,particularly derogatory consumer information,must abide by every and every one of my state’s reporting regulations as well as those of federal laws, even the CDIA METRO 2 COMPLIANCE standards due to the implementation of the Credit Reporting Settlement Agreement (CRSA).\n \n

\n

Is the Personal Identifier information alleged in the reported 426-character P-SEGMENT true,correct, and complete to the standards of CERTIFIED METRO 2 COMPLIANCE?\n \n

\n

Please provide sufficient evidence of the claimed reported creditor classification codes' exact truth, accuracy, and applicability, or remove all of the adversary's damaging charges against me right away, TODAY, RIGHT NOW, and HERE!\n \n

\n

Please verify and validate physically each and every claim of this alleged, yet unproven, responsibility or fault. Please demonstrate readily and timely the precise confirming facts of the alleged account, including every single one, even any and or all of its article aspects under federal laws. You must willfully and promptly DELETE TODAY, even right now, the deficient reporting, or else present to me true documented certificated proof of all data, every notation, date, balance, calculation, audit, personal identifiers, each of the requisite 426 characters of the exact and fully compliant P6 statement, any alpha/numeric and or alphanumeric source4 code deciding the leftness or rightness states, and even every aspect of the mandated 386 pieces of confirmation to collection. This series of misreporting seems to me to clearly involve a universal and complete failure by your firm to obtain, retain, maintain, and utilize adequate and lawful regulatory-compliant and reasonable procedures to assure the maximum possible accuracy of consumer credit information as described in at least 15 U.S.C. § 1681. There is little doubt that you have no evidence that this clearly does belong to me, is exactly true, fully complete, within timely definition per federal standards, and has been erroneously placed on my credit report. The items of problematic accusations that I believe to be incorrect in their proper reporting and allowance of reporting per my state and federal laws are detailed both above and below.

In the event that you fail to provide the COMPOSED PROOF REQUIRED BY THIS DECLARATION, I WILL BE FORCED TO LAWFULLY CONSULT MY CONSUMER COMPLAINT TO THE MEMBERS OF THE NCRWG, AS REPORTING MUST BE TRUE, TIMELY, AND ACCURATE IN ITS DATA ENTRY PROMISED TO ANY ENTITY, INCLUDING ALL CONSUMER REPORTING repositories.I demand that these negative things be looked into and permanently erased from my report in accordance with the terms of the Fair Credit Reporting Act and the standards of reporting compliance enforced with the CRSA-issued CDIA Metro 2 COMPLIANCE regulations. I believe you will double-check these things with the creditor who posted them. Any information that the creditor cannot verify should be removed. I am aware that you have 30 days from receiving this letter to complete this reinvestigation in accordance with 15 U.S.C. Sec. 1681i(a).Send a fresh copy of my credit report to the aforementioned address, please. The act specifies that there will be no fee for this updated report. Please send correction letters to everybody who has obtained a copy of my credit report in the previous six months as well.\n \n

\n

I kindly request that you FILM the previously noted MIS-INFORMATION in advance.

\n

NAME : {{firstname}} {{lastname}}
\n \n \n

\n

Evidence of my Proof of identification
{{dlid}}
{{ssnid}}
{{poaid}}
{{poa2id}}
{{poa3id}}\n
